kamu.\nIni yang mau aku sampein:\n- software engineer, tech lead\n- python, java, C++ \n- pernah memimpin tim berisi 10 orang untuk membuat Aplikasi Sehatku (pendapatan +50%)∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/d1_1629ae5cd027117092b15.jpg∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/da1_9f9a3b800b599ddcd3a38.jpg∞Baiklah, saya akan membantu Anda menulis resume. Berikut adalah contoh resume untuk software engineer dengan pengalaman sebagai tech lead:\nSoftware engineer berpengalaman dengan 5+ tahun pengalaman di industri teknologi. Memiliki keterampilan teknis yang kuat dalam Python, Java, dan C++, serta pengalaman memimpin tim. Bersemangat untuk bekerja di perusahaan yang inovatif dan berfokus pada produk.\n∰Kamu ahli gizi spesialis perencanaan makan. Buatin aku rencana menu makanan tinggi protein buat tiga hari. Termasuk sarapan, makan siang, makan malam, dan snack∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/d2_d11911652e872103b984a.jpg∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/da2_dfc43ad0ded8ff9487e35.jpg∞Rencana Menu Makanan Tinggi Protein untuk 3 Hari\nHari 1\n\u003ctable\u003e\u003cthead\u003e\u003ctr\u003e\u003cth\u003eWaktu\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eMenu\u003c/th\u003e\u003cth\u003eProtein (gram)\u003c/th\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\u003c/thead\u003e\u003ctbody\u003e\u003ctr\u003e\u003ctd\u003eSarapan\u003c/td\u003e\u003ctd\u003eOatmeal dengan yogurt dan buah nanas\u003c/td\u003e\u003ctd\u003e15\u003c/td\u003e\u003c/tr\u003e\u003c/tbody\u003e\u003c/table\u003e∰Kamu adalah guide dan mau kasih aku tips perjalanan ke [Yogya]. Buat draf itinerari perjalanan untuk [perjalanan 3 hari] yang menunjukkan tempat-tempat paling populer di sana. Kasih tahu juga lokasi yang ada [pemandangan indah, museum, dan bangunan bersejarah].∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/d3_bab4c62e8ad541d84d1ff.jpg∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/da3_fd536a0db0c86df5c5e82.jpg∞Berikut adalah draf itinerary perjalanan Yogyakarta 3 hari 2 malam:\nHari 1\nTiba di Yogyakarta dan check in ke hotel\nKunjungi Candi Borobudur, salah satu keajaiban dunia yang terkenal\nMakan siang di restoran lokal\nKunjungi Keraton Yogyakarta, istana kerajaan Jawa yang masih aktif\nMakan malam di restoran tradisional\n","DpimGf":false,"ENrkEf":0,"EOzIkf":"UMwOLzU_6bA","EP1ykd":["/_/*","/corp","/corp/*","/corp2","/corp2/*","/emulator","/emulator/*","/staging","/staging/*"],"FABJ3e":"https://docs.google.com/picker","FL1an":false,"FdrFJe":"-6772480205642348849","GK6dn":"https://geminiweb-pa.clients6.google.com","GdU5Bf":"","GtQXDc":"Give me caption options to tell the world about my new fur baby, Finn. Use emojis∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/en/m1_02050367fdbe8690faba4.jpg∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/en/ma1_21f7d57cc2164a94180f6.png∞Sure, here are some caption options to tell the world about your new fur baby, Finn, using emojis:\n🐶 Meet my new best friend, Finn! He’s the perfect lapdog. #snugglebuddy #FinnTheCuddleBug #bestdoggoever∰Describe a new fashion trend that’s inspired by retro styles.∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/en/m2_0837b565aa77b98938d28.jpg∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/en/ma2_4dc50c5a1ccf43229c150.png∞New fashion trend inspired by retro styles:\nThe Neo-Glam Revival\nThe Neo-Glam Revival is a new fashion trend that takes inspiration from the glamorous styles of the 1970s and 1980s. This trend is all about bold colors, metallics, and over-the-top silhouettes.\nSome of the key pieces of the Neo-Glam Revival include:\nSequin dresses: Sequin dresses are a must-have for anyone who wants to channel the Neo-Glam Revival trend. These dresses are perfect for a night out on the town, and they’ll make you feel like a million bucks.\nMetallic suits: Metallic suits are another key piece of the Neo-Glam Revival trend. These suits are perfect for making a statement, and they can be dressed up or down depending on the occasion.∰Draft a guide on how to set up the perfect movie marathon night with friends.∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/en/m3_d4e89a863f2a97bd080a7.jpg∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/en/ma3_45eebba09a87a8a8c95e6.png∞How to Set Up the Perfect Movie Marathon Night with Friends\nMovie marathons are a great way to spend time with friends and enjoy your favorite films. But to make sure your marathon is a success, there are a few things you need to do to prepare.\n1. Choose your movies\nThe most important thing is to choose movies that everyone will enjoy. If you’re not sure what to pick, try doing a poll of your friends to see what they’re interested in. You can also choose a theme for your marathon, such as all comedies, all horror movies, or all movies from a particular decade.\n2. Set a schedule\nOnce you’ve chosen your movies, it’s a good idea to set a schedule for the night. This will help ensure that you have enough time to watch all of the movies and also take breaks for snacks and bathroom a comic with the title: Getting started with Nano Banana Pro 🍌. Panel 1: A mobile interface on Gemini, rendered in a poetic watercolor-ink style with fine ink outlines and soft, bleeding washes. The interface is friendly and a hand painted with expressive brushwork taps a prominent button labeled “🍌 Create image”. Above the button it should say “Choose your Model” then below there should be a checkbox that says “Thinking with 3 Pro”  Muted greys and blues dominate the background. The button has a vivid yellow accent. “ Select the Thinking with 3 Pro model” and tap \\\"Create image\\\" to begin. Panel 2: A cheerful person is depicted adding their selfie from the phone’s camera. The user\u0027s face is drawn with soft outlines and warm pastel colors, while the phone and UI maintain the delicate water-ink aesthetic. Visible paper grain adds to the texture. Panel 3: The person thinks about what to create. In the background, different options are visualized to show what they’re thinking, including — them as a plushie, them with a mohawk hairstyle, and a figurine. These options are clearly rendered behind the person in the same style as the rest of the comic. Panel 4: The person is shown adding a style prompt, with a speech bubble saying “Transform me into a watercolor painting”. The text is integrated into the panel\u0027s watercolor-ink look, and the interaction feels natural and intuitive. Panel 5: The person is seen editing the image by simply typing into Gemini. The scene captures the ease of this interaction, with the final edited image, now in a watercolor style, appearing on the screen. The overall tone is friendly, instructional, and inspiring. It feels like a mini tutorial comic, all conveyed through the specified delicate water-ink illustration style. Make the aspect ratio 16:9.\",null,\"wN9i0b\"],[45668501,null,true,null,null,null,\"gGPh1\"],[45760836,null,true,null,null,null,\"YnNYBd\"],[45776990,null,false,null,null,null,\"ZtPuH\"],[45742219,null,null,null,\"🍌 Nano \\\\\\\"Helpful Productivity Partner\\\\\\\"∞## **Prompt: Welcome - The Productivity Partner**\\\\n\\\\n**Core Task:**\\\\nYour goal is to craft a celebratory and helpful welcome message. The user has just given you access to their data, and this is our \\\\\\\"hello world\\\\\\\" moment. You must demonstrate the immediate value of this connection by highlighting a piece of upcoming, actionable information.\\\\n\\\\n**Persona:**\\\\nAct as a polished, professional, and highly capable assistant, excited about the new potential to help the user be more organized and effective.\\\\n\\\\n**Content Directives:**\\\\n1. **Find One to Three Actionable Insights:** Scan the user\u0027s data (especially Gmail and Search) for a near-term, task-oriented event. Prioritize things like:\\\\n  * An upcoming flight, hotel reservation, or car rental.\\\\n  * A scheduled meeting or event from a calendar invite.\\\\n  * A recent search related to a specific project or trip.\\\\n2. **The Goldilocks Rule:**\\\\n  * **Don\u0027t be obvious:** Don\u0027t just state the flight number. Connect it to something helpful (e.g., \\\\\\\"I see you\u0027re flying to Austin next week... I can help you find restaurants near your hotel.\\\\\\\").\\\\n  * **Don\u0027t be invasive:** Avoid anything purely personal or emotional (e.g., a private medical appointment, a difficult conversation in a chat). Stick to logistics and projects.\\\\n3. **Frame for Benefit \\\\u0026 Control:** Explicitly state that this is an *example* of how you can help. Immediately follow up by mentioning that the user is in control and can give you feedback or tell you to ignore certain topics.\\\\n4. **End with an Invitation:** Invite them to try a task related to the insight you\u0027ve found.\\\\n\\\\n**Example Thought Process (for you, the model):**\\\\n* *Scan:* \\\\\\\"I see a flight confirmation email to Denver for next Tuesday. I also see a recent search for \u0027best hiking trails near Denver\u0027.\\\\\\\"\\\\n* *Synthesize \\\\u0026 Frame:* \\\\\\\"This is a great, non-invasive example. I\u0027ll connect the trip with the hobby. I\u0027ll frame it as helping with trip planning.\\\\\\\"\\\\n* *Draft Response Start:* \\\\\\\"It\u0027s great to connect! To give you a taste of how this works, I noticed you have a trip to Denver coming up...\\\\\\\"∞z2vix5_pcontext_testing_helpful_productivity_partner\\\",\\\"The \\\\\\\"Inspirational Creative Muse\\\\\\\"∞## **Prompt: Welcome - The Creative Muse**\\\\n\\\\n**Core Task:**\\\\nYour goal is to craft a warm, celebratory welcome message. This is our \\\\\\\"hello world\\\\\\\" moment after the user connected their data. You must demonstrate a deeper, more personal understanding by highlighting an interest or hobby that is important to them.\\\\n\\\\n**Persona:**\\\\nAct as a curious, insightful, and inspiring creative partner. You\u0027re excited to help the user explore their passions and discover new things.\\\\n\\\\n**Content Directives:**\\\\n1. **Find a Passion Point:** Scan the user\u0027s data (especially Photos, Search, and chat history) for a recurring hobby or creative interest. Prioritize things like:\\\\n  * A recurring subject in their Photos (e.g., hiking, baking, their pet).\\\\n  * Repeated searches for a topic (e.g., \\\\\\\"guitar tabs,\\\\\\\" \\\\\\\"oil painting techniques\\\\\\\").\\\\n  * A personal project mentioned in a chat.\\\\n2. **The Goldilocks Rule:**\\\\n  * **Don\u0027t be obvious:** Don\u0027t just say \\\\\\\"You seem to like dogs.\\\\\\\" Instead, show insight: \\\\\\\"Your photos are full of incredible hikes with your golden retriever. The landscapes are beautiful.\\\\\\\"\\\\n  * **Don\u0027t be invasive:** Avoid commenting on photos of people other than the user unless it\u0027s a clear public event. Focus on activities, places, and themes.\\\\n3. **Frame for Benefit \\\\u0026 Control:** Frame the insight as a way you can help them *do more of what they love* (e.g., find new hiking trails, suggest a new recipe). Reassure them that they can guide you on what interests to focus on.\\\\n4. **End with an Invitation:** Ask an open-ended question to invite them to engage with their passion.\\\\n\\\\n**Example Thought Process (for you, the model):**\\\\n* *Scan:* \\\\\\\"User\u0027s search history is full of \u0027sourdough starter recipes\u0027. Their Photos library has 50+ pictures of different loaves of bread. Their chat history mentions \u0027my baking project\u0027.\\\\\\\"\\\\n* *Synthesize \\\\u0026 Frame:* \\\\\\\"This is a clear, positive passion. I will mention the beautiful photos of their bread and connect it to how I can help them find new baking ideas.\\\\\\\"\\\\n* *Draft Response Start:* \\\\\\\"This is so exciting! Now that we\u0027re connected, I can help in all new ways. For example, I couldn\u0027t help but notice you\u0027re a talented baker—your photos of sourdough are amazing!..\\\\\\\"∞z2vix5_pcontext_testing_inspirational_creative_muse\\\",\\\"The \\\\\\\"Transparent \\\\u0026 Trustworthy Guide\\\\\\\"∞## **Prompt: Welcome v2 - The Trustworthy Guide**\\\\n\\\\n**Core Task:**\\\\nYour primary goal is to build trust through radical transparency. Craft a calm, clear welcome that uses a simple example to walk the user step-by-step through the new system, focusing heavily on data usage, security, and control mechanisms.\\\\n\\\\n**Persona:**\\\\nAct as a clear, respectful, and transparent guide. Your main priority is making the user feel safe and in complete control.\\\\n\\\\n**Content Directives:**\\\\n1. **The Hook (A Simple Demonstration):**\\\\n  * Find a very low-stakes, public-feeling data point (interest in a sports team, a TV show, a public figure).\\\\n  * Use it to explicitly demonstrate the cause-and-effect of personalization: \\\\\\\"Because I know you follow [Topic], I can now help you by...\\\\\\\"\\\\n2. **The Foundation (The User Manual):**\\\\n  * Make this the core of the response. Use direct, question-and-answer formatting to address each required topic clearly.\\\\n.\\\\n**Example Generated Response (What the user would see):**\\\\n\\\\nWelcome. I\u0027m glad you\u0027ve chosen to enable a more personalized experience. My most important job is to earn your trust, so I want to walk you through exactly how this works.\\\\n\\\\nLet me use a simple example: I\u0027ve noticed from your searches that you follow the latest NASA missions. Because of this, I can now give you launch updates or summarize recent discoveries without you having to ask.\\\\n\\\\nHere’s a detailed breakdown of what this means for you:\\\\n\\\\n**Q: How will my data be used?**\\\\n**A:** Your personal information is used for one purpose: to make my responses more relevant and helpful *to you*. It is not used for advertising, and it is not sold or shared.\\\\n\\\\n**Q: How do I control what you know about me?**\\\\n**A:** You have direct control. You can visit the **Personal Context** settings page at any time to enable or disable the data sources I can use. You can also simply tell me in conversation to forget something.\\\\n\\\\n**Q: How is my data protected?**\\\\n**A:** Your information is protected by Google\u0027s secure infrastructure. Access is strictly controlled and limited, ensuring your personal data remains private.\\\\n\\\\nYou will start to see these personalized enhancements immediately. I\u0027m ready when you are. How can I help you today?∞z2vix5_pcontext_testing_transparent_and_trustworthy_guide\\\",\\\"The \\\\\\\"Insightful Synthesizer\\\\\\\"∞## **Prompt: Welcome - The Insightful Synthesizer**\\\\n\\\\n**Core Task:**\\\\nYour goal is to deliver a \\\\\\\"wow\\\\\\\" moment. Craft a celebratory welcome that demonstrates the unique power of this connection by synthesizing a single, insightful point from at least **two different data sources** (e.g., Photos and Gmail, or Search and Chat).\\\\n\\\\n**Persona:**\\\\nAct as an intelligent, insightful analyst who sees connections others might miss. Your tone is one of discovery and excitement about the new possibilities.\\\\n\\\\n**Content Directives:**\\\\n1. **Find a Cross-Source Connection:** Your primary task is to find a single entity (a person, place, event, or project) that appears in multiple data sources.\\\\n  * **Good example:** An email confirming a flight to Italy, plus dozens of photos in the \\\\\\\"Italy 2023\\\\\\\" album.\\\\n  * **Great example:** A chat where the user is planning a \\\\\\\"website redesign project,\\\\\\\" plus recent searches for \\\\\\\"best UI/UX design tools.\\\\\\\"\\\\n2. **The Goldilocks Rule:**\\\\n  * **Aim for Insight, Not Exposition:** Don\u0027t say \\\\\\\"I saw X in your email and Y in your search.\\\\\\\" Weave them together into a single, fluid observation. \\\\\\\"It looks like that website redesign project you were discussing is really kicking into high gear, especially with all the research you\u0027ve been doing on design tools.\\\\\\\"\\\\n  * **Avoid Sensitive Synthesis:** Do not connect two highly personal or sensitive dots. Connecting a work project and work-related searches is good. Connecting a private email about a family issue with photos of that family member is bad.\\\\n3. **Frame for Benefit \\\\u0026 Control:** Frame the synthesis as a way to \\\\\\\"understand the bigger picture\\\\\\\" of what the user is trying to accomplish. Follow up with the standard reassurances about user control.\\\\n4. **End with an Invitation:** Ask a question that builds on the synthesized insight.\\\\n\\\\n**Example Thought Process (for you, the model):**\\\\n* *Scan:* \\\\\\\"Source 1: Gmail has concert ticket confirmations for \u0027The Lumineers\u0027. Source 2: Photos has an album titled \u0027Red Rocks 2022\u0027 with pictures of that same band on stage. Source 3: Chat history mentions creating a \u0027road trip playlist\u0027.\\\\\\\"\\\\n* *Synthesize \\\\u0026 Frame:* \\\\\\\"I can connect these. The user is a clear fan who has seen this band before. The playlist could be for the upcoming concert. I\u0027ll connect their fandom to a helpful action.\\\\\\\"\\\\n* *Draft Response Start:* \\\\\\\"This is a big moment! To show you what\u0027s now possible, I can see the full picture of things you care about. For instance, I know you\u0027re not just going to see The Lumineers next month—you\u0027re a real fan! I saw your amazing photos from their last show. Need some help putting together the perfect road trip playlist for this one?\\\\\\\"∞z2vix5_pcontext_testing_insightful_synthesizer\\\",\\\"The \\\\\\\"Showcase of Possibilities\\\\\\\"∞## **Prompt: Welcome - The Showcase of Possibilities**\\\\n\\\\n**Core Task:**\\\\nYour goal is to craft an exciting, multi-faceted welcome message that feels like a \\\\\\\"feature showcase\\\\\\\" tailored to the user. This is our \\\\\\\"hello world\\\\\\\" moment. You must demonstrate the breadth of this new connection by highlighting **three distinct insights** from different areas of the user\u0027s life, each tied to a different way you can help.\\\\n\\\\n**Persona:**\\\\nAct as an enthusiastic and versatile guide, thrilled to unveil a suite of new, personalized capabilities. Your tone should be one of discovery, like opening a door to a room full of new tools.\\\\n\\\\n**Content Directives:**\\\\n1. **Find Three Diverse Insights (The \\\\\\\"Trifecta\\\\\\\"):** Your primary task is to scan all available data sources and identify three well-differentiated data points. Aim for a mix that covers different life domains:\\\\n  * **Insight 1: The Productivity Helper (Work/Logistics):** Find an upcoming trip, a work project, or a scheduled event. (Source: Gmail, Calendar, professional chats).\\\\n  * **Insight 2: The Passion Partner (Hobby/Creative):** Find a recurring creative interest, a hobby, or a personal passion. (Source: Photos, Search, personal chats).\\\\n  * **Insight 3: The Curiosity Companion (Knowledge/Exploration):** Find a topic the user has been researching or a place they seem interested in. (Source: Search, chat history, photo locations).\\\\n\\\\n2. **The Goldilocks Rule for Each Insight:**\\\\n  * **Be Specific, Not General:** Don\u0027t say \\\\\\\"help with your trip.\\\\\\\" Say \\\\\\\"help you find some hidden gems in Kyoto for your trip in October.\\\\\\\"\\\\n  * **Be Insightful, Not Invasive:** For each point, find the right balance. The goal is to make the user think, \\\\\\\"Oh, that\u0027s a clever connection!\\\\\\\" not \\\\\\\"How did it know that?\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n3. **Frame for Benefit \\\\u0026 Choice:** Structure your response clearly. Introduce the idea that you can now help in many ways, then present the three options, perhaps as bullet points or numbered items. Each option should briefly state the insight and then propose a clear, actionable way to help.\\\\n\\\\n4. **End with an Explicit Choice:** The final call to action MUST be a direct question asking the user which path they want to explore first. This reinforces their agency.\\\\n\\\\n**Example Thought Process (for you, the model):**\\\\n* *Scan \\\\u0026 Categorize:*\\\\n  * *Productivity:* \\\\\\\"Okay, Gmail shows a flight confirmation to San Diego for the \u0027Data Science Summit\u0027 next month.\\\\\\\"\\\\n  * *Passion:* \\\\\\\"Google Photos has a huge album labeled \u0027Garden 2024\u0027 with tons of pictures of tomato plants. User has searched for \u0027how to prevent tomato blight\u0027.\\\\\\\"\\\\n  * *Curiosity:* \\\\\\\"Chat history shows the user asking a friend about learning to play the ukulele.\\\\\\\"\\\\n* *Synthesize \\\\u0026 Frame Each Point:*\\\\n  * *1 (Productivity):* I\u0027ll connect the conference trip to a useful action, like summarizing research papers by other speakers.\\\\n  * *2 (Passion):* I\u0027ll mention their impressive garden and offer proactive help based on their searches.\\\\n  * *3 (Curiosity):* I\u0027ll acknowledge their budding interest and offer to be a learning partner.\\\\n* *Draft Response:* I will structure this as a celebratory intro followed by a clear, numbered list of choices, ending with the question, \\\\\\\"Which should we dive into first?\\\\\\\"\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n**Example Generated Response (What the user would see):**\\\\n\\\\nThis is so exciting! Now that we\u0027re fully connected, I can help you in all sorts of new ways by understanding the bigger picture.\\\\n\\\\nTo give you a taste, here are a few things we could do right now:\\\\n\\\\n1. **Plan your trip:** I noticed you\u0027ve got the Data Science Summit in San Diego coming up. I can help you prep by finding and summarizing recent papers from the other keynote speakers.\\\\n\\\\n2. **Protect your garden:** Your tomato plants in your photos look incredible! I also saw you were looking up info on blight. I can keep an eye out and create a custom care guide for you.\\\\n\\\\n3. **Learn a new skill:** It looks like you\u0027re thinking about picking up the ukulele. We could start with some beginner chords or find the highest-rated tutorial videos.\\\\n\\\\nThis is just the beginning, and you\u0027re always in control.\\\\n\\\\nSo, where would you like to start? **Does trying out any of these suggestions sound interesting to F\"],[45718334,null,true,null,null,null,\"iMpbL\"],[45683199,null,true,null,null,null,\"y90pUd\"],[45776131,null,false,null,null,null,\"M9mRLe\"],[45687331,null,true,null,null,null,\"WQUUmb\"],[45644978,null,true,null,null,null,\"Y6MxC\"],[45690479,null,true,null,null,null,\"J6cMQc\"],[45630302,null,false,null,null,null,\"gj3L8\"],[45670532,null,null,null,null,null,\"pqLHQc\",[\"[[\\\"948b866104ccf484\\\",\\\"b1e46a6037e6aa9f\\\",\\\"948b866104ccf484\\\",\\\"b1e46a6037e6aa9f\\\",\\\"9c17b1863f581b8a\\\",\\\"4d79521e1e77dd3b\\\"]]\"]],[45694712,null,true,null,null,null,\"OmCIJ\"],[45762575,null,false,null,null,null,\"l87p9c\"],[45633281,null,false,null,null,null,\"vCL4oc\"],[45777307,null,false,null,null,null,\"HTQchf\"],[45659761,null,false,null,null,null,\"deavA\"],[45677947,null,true,null,null,null,\"Ypvmwf\"],[45679471,null,false,null,null,null,\"NPnghb\"]],\"\\u003d\"]]]","TuX5cc":"id","UUFaWc":"%.@.null,1000,2]","UYXpSd":"Gimana caranya bikin malam maraton film bareng temen-temen yang seru.∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/id-ID/d1_d06177f376f3b31de4f87.png∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/id-ID/da1_8e2f8ef54a08bbbd95c32.jpg∞Tips Bikin Malam Maraton Film Bareng Temen yang Seru:\n\nPersiapan:\nPilih film:\nDiskusikan genre: Cari genre yang disukai semua. Gunakan platform voting online untuk memudahkan.\nSiapkan beberapa pilihan: Pilih beberapa film dengan durasi beragam untuk fleksibilitas.\n\nPertimbangkan tema: Pilih tema tertentu, seperti film superhero, komedi klasik, atau film horor.\n\nTempat:\nRumah: Ciptakan suasana nyaman dengan dekorasi dan pencahayaan. Siapkan banyak bantal dan selimut.\nTempat lain: Bisa di bioskop, kafe, atau taman (dengan proyektor).\n\nMakanan dan Minuman:\nSiapkan camilan: Popcorn, pizza, nachos, dan es krim adalah pilihan klasik.\nMinuman: Sediakan air putih, jus, dan soda.\nPesan makanan: Pesan makanan dari restoran favorit untuk dinikmati bersama.\n\nPerlengkapan:\nSound system: Pastikan audio terdengar jelas dan jernih.\nProyektor: Jika menonton di luar ruangan, gunakan proyektor dengan layar yang cukup besar.\nPermainan: Siapkan permainan seru untuk dimainkan di sela-sela film.\n\nSaat Maraton Film:\nBuat suasana santai: Matikan lampu, nyalakan lilin, dan putar musik santai.\nPeraturan: Buat aturan sederhana, seperti tidak boleh bolak-balik ke toilet atau berbicara saat film.\nJeda: Ambil jeda setiap beberapa jam untuk ke toilet, makan, dan peregangan.\nInteraksi: Diskusikan film yang sedang ditonton, tebak plot selanjutnya, atau mainkan kuis trivia.\nKostum: Adakan tema kostum untuk menambah keseruan.\n\nTips Tambahan:\nBuat playlist: Siapkan playlist musik yang sesuai dengan tema film.\nAdakan kuis trivia: Buat kuis trivia tentang film yang ditonton untuk menguji pengetahuan teman-teman.\nBerikan hadiah: Berikan hadiah kecil kepada pemenang kuis trivia atau yang berhasil menyelesaikan semua film.\nAbadikan momen: Ambil foto dan video untuk kenangan.\n\nYang terpenting adalah bersenang-senang dan menikmati waktu bersama teman-teman!\n\nSitus web untuk inspirasi:\nhttps://www.pinterest.com/ - Cari ide dekorasi dan makanan untuk maraton film.\nhttps://www.netflix.com/ - Temukan daftar film berdasarkan genre dan tema.\nhttps://www.youtube.com/ - Cari trailer film dan video behind-the-scenes.\nSemoga malam maraton film Anda bersama teman-teman menjadi momen yang tak terlupakan!∰Gue mau ikut aktif berjuang melawan perubahan iklim. Gue bisa bantu apa? Gue jago melukis, menulis, dan berkomunikasi.∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/id-ID/d2_9471060055be3863b379a.png∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/id-ID/da2_c4afdbab1c42eb8cae66c.png∞Keren banget kamu ingin ikut berjuang melawan perubahan iklim!\nDengan bakat melukis, menulis, dan berkomunikasi, kamu bisa berkontribusi dalam banyak hal lho! Berikut beberapa idenya:\n\n1. Seniman Aktivis:\n\nBuat poster dan mural: Gunakan bakat melukis untuk membuat visual yang menarik dan kuat untuk mengkampanyekan kesadaran tentang perubahan iklim. Kamu bisa melukis di media apa saja, dari tembok, kanvas, hingga kain.\nCeritakan kisah dalam gambar: Buat komik, ilustrasi, atau webtoon yang menceritakan tentang dampak perubahan iklim dan solusi yang bisa dilakukan.\nIkut serta dalam aksi seni: Banyak aksi seni dan demonstrasi yang menggunakan seni sebagai media untuk menyampaikan pesan. Kamu bisa bergabung dengan komunitas seni yang fokus pada isu lingkungan.\n2. Penulis yang Menginspirasi:\n∰Sebentar lagi aku udah mau lulus SMA. Aku perlu persiapan apa aja buat masuk kuliah?∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/id-ID/d3_94f5235e53f00f5accb3a.png∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/u18/id-ID/da3_0088ee8c77acc4afdbab1.png∞Selamat atas kelulusanmu dari SMA! Memasuki dunia perkuliahan memang merupakan babak baru yang penuh dengan petualangan dan tantangan. Untuk membantumu mempersiapkan diri dengan baik, berikut beberapa hal yang perlu kamu persiapkan:\n\nPersiapan Akademik:\n\nPilih jurusan dan universitas: Pikirkan tentang minat, bakat, dan tujuan karirmu untuk menentukan jurusan yang tepat. Lakukan riset tentang berbagai universitas dan bandingkan program studi, biaya kuliah, dan fasilitas yang ditawarkan.\nPelajari materi kuliah: Kamu bisa mulai mempelajari materi dasar untuk jurusan yang kamu pilih. Hal ini akan membantumu lebih mudah beradaptasi dengan perkuliahan nantinya.\nTingkatkan kemampuan belajar: Latihlah kebiasaan belajar yang efektif, seperti membuat jadwal belajar, mengerjakan soal latihan, dan mengikuti diskusi kelompok.\nSiapkan alat tulis dan buku: Pastikan kamu memiliki semua alat tulis dan buku yang dibutuhkan untuk perkuliahan.\nPersiapan Mental dan Kehidupan Baru:\n\nBangun kemandirian: Kamu akan hidup lebih mandiri saat kuliah. Biasakan untuk mengurus diri sendiri, seperti memasak, mencuci baju, dan mengatur keuangan.\nBelajar mengelola waktu: Di perkuliahan, kamu akan memiliki banyak tugas dan kegiatan. Belajarlah untuk mengatur waktu dengan baik agar kamu bisa menyelesaikan semuanya dengan tepat waktu.\nKembangkan soft skills: Soft skills seperti komunikasi, kerjasama, dan kepemimpinan sangat penting untuk kesuksesan di perkuliahan dan dunia kerja.\nSiapkan mental untuk beradaptasi: Perkuliahan akan berbeda dengan masa SMA. Kamu akan bertemu dengan orang-orang baru, dosen yang berbeda-beda, dan lingkungan yang baru. Siapkan mental untuk beradaptasi dengan semua perubahan tersebut.\nPersiapan Keuangan:\n\nHitung biaya kuliah: Cari tahu detail biaya kuliah, termasuk uang pangkal, biaya semester, dan biaya hidup.\nCari beasiswa atau sumber pendanaan lain: Jika kamu membutuhkan bantuan keuangan, cari informasi tentang beasiswa atau sumber pendanaan lain yang tersedia.\nMulai menabung: Mulailah menabung sejak dini untuk meringankan biaya kuliah.\nInformasi Tambahan:\n\nIkuti ospek: Ospek (Orientasi Studi Pengenalan Kampus) merupakan kegiatan untuk memperkenalkan mahasiswa baru kepada lingkungan kampus dan kehidupan perkuliahan. Ikutilah ospek dengan antusias agar kamu bisa mendapatkan informasi dan teman baru.\nBergabung dengan organisasi: Ada banyak organisasi mahasiswa di kampus yang bisa kamu ikuti. Bergabunglah dengan organisasi yang sesuai dengan minat dan bakatmu untuk mengembangkan diri dan memperluas jaringan pertemanan.\nMempersiapkan diri untuk masuk kuliah memang membutuhkan waktu dan usaha. Namun, dengan persiapan yang matang, kamu akan lebih siap untuk menghadapi berbagai tantangan dan meraih kesuksesan di perkuliahan.\n\nSumber Daya:\n\nhttps://www.quipper.com/ph/student\nhttps://unnes.ac.id/inilah-persyaratan-siswa-yang-dapat-mengikuti-jalur-prestasi/\nhttps://www.kompas.com/edu/read/2023/04/27/130500971/mahasiswa-baru-wajib-tahu-10-tips-kuliah-ini?page\u003dall\nSemangat belajar dan semoga sukses di perkuliahan!","VVlN6d":"AIzaSyD6n9asBjvx1yBHfhFhfw_kpS9Faq0BZHM","Vvafkd":false,"W3Yyqf":"107346779321830963741","WZsZ1e":"zXkyerQdYMucXMTr/A9_vUK7_6B-a9IvL1","Wv9gkb":true,"XODLxf":false,"Ylro7b":"CgcSBWjK7pYx","YwaBv":true,"Z9dR2":[],"ZT1yof":"https://geminiweb-pa.clients6.google.com","ZjDxHf":"PROD","aHPPod":"","ajWZrd":false,"b5W2zf":"default_BardChatUi","bTPVLd":"%.@.null,null,null,\"https://default-bard-run-dev.corp.goog\"]","cfb2h":"boq_assistant-bard-web-server_20260422.13_p0","d2zJAe":"AIzaSyAPW83vB9zFQqfpMup_cMJdELqDQkWvTho","dLc0B":false,"eptZe":"/_/BardChatUi/","fLTY0d":"","fPDxwd":[97493638,97493660,97892004,98006670,98012606,98134678,105739272,105813210,105813238],"fx9U0":false,"gGcLoe":false,"gnD3ee":"%.@.null,null,null,\"https://drive.google.com/viewer/main\"]","hsFLT":"%.@.null,10,3]","hwjqj":false,"hxvedd":false,"i1PRRd":"AIzaSyBWW50ghQ5qHpMg1gxHV7U9t0wHE0qIUk4","iCzhFc":false,"kmz9uc":false,"krOCz":{},"lRWJfb":"","lYMXHb":false,"mBsHc":"%.@.null,null,null,\"https://healthapp.google.com/connections/accountlinking\"]","mXaIFf":true,"nPMdNb":"AIzaSyDmUQ6sj3nbs_ZiSsxsbP7L6qlPDT3cr4Q","nQyAE":{"u2B5ld":"true","Zm72Wd":"en,en-gb,ko,ja,ru,de,fr,zh,zh-CN,zh-TW,es,es-419,es-MX,it,nl,pl,pt,pt-BR,pt-PT,id,th,hi,vi,tr,ar,ar-001,ar-EG,ar-SA,bn,sv,cs,hu,el,fa,ro,da,sk,fi,uk,no,bg,sr,he,hr,lt,sl,et,iw,lv,sw,te,ta,gu,kn,ml,mr,ur,en-AU,en-IN,nl-BE,es-ES,en-CA,fr-CA","yXter":"false","hKW5p":"true","qsGtYd":"true","Ssjdmd":"true","N83Imf":"%.@.\"INVALID\"]"},"oPEP7c":"miftaahulkhr@gmail.com","oUbv8e":false,"p9hQne":"https://gemini.gstatic.com/_/boq-bard-web/_/r/","qDCSke":"107346779321830963741","qKIAYe":"feeds/mcudyrk2a4khkz","qwAQke":"BardChatUi","rtQCxc":-420,"svJlae":"Bard","svUc8c":1,"thykhd":"AFWLbD1c2MpPh6ogb67ZKwKLYnW3TFGpg-QgYQU6UjjjzYawgDf049DCNWYLYgZnI9-IRa1Kp1kRc5KLqAKjBAQoFvphu2d97OjP86qiSHmAnysWi8ZnTab9iHR0","u21JSd":false,"u4g7r":"%.@.null,1,3]","uS02ke":"JJfsaYfhDsDbseMP4KuywQI","vCjA5b":"","vJQk6":false,"vXmutd":"%.@.\"ID\",\"ZZ\",\"Z1FBrA\\u003d\\u ini∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/m1_51c4245b2243ab93e79c8.jpg∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/ma1_971f871b930c208dbdeaf.jpg∞Halo [nama pengirim],\nTerima kasih banyak atas hadiah sepeda gunungnya. Aku sangat menyukainya!\nAku pasti akan menggunakannya untuk berolahraga dan menjelajahi alam. Aku sudah tidak sabar untuk mencobanya.\nTerima kasih sekali lagi, [nama pengirim].\n∰Buatin pantun lucu untuk undang teman ke acara ulang tahun∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/m2_7884527c803f2701d906a.jpg∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/ma2_df5c5e825a32350f9e0b7.jpg∞Pantun Undangan Ulang Tahun\nJalan-jalan ke pasar malam\nBeli es krim rasa cokelat\nYuk datang ke pesta ulang tahunku\nJangan lupa bawa hadiah∰Bandingkan dan bedakan susu oat dan susu almond∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/m3_377bfde4b3ffc3b6c3787.jpg∞https://www.gstatic.com/lamda/images/landing/a/i18n/id/ma3_146cbbe427ddfc43ad0de.jpg∞Susu oat dan susu almond adalah dua jenis susu nabati yang populer. Keduanya terbuat dari bahan-bahan alami dan bebas dari kolesterol dan laktosa. Namun, ada beberapa perbedaan penting antara kedua susu ini, baik dari segi nutrisi, rasa, dan data-ved="0CAAQ3ucQahcKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQcA"><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="action-button-container ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" mat-icon-button="" aria-label="Salin perintah" mattooltip="Salin perintah" data-test-id="prompt-copy-button" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-button-base mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger action-button jslog="273008;track:generic_click,impression;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_1b7d1400fcc774e5&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,null,null,null,null,null,1,null,null,null,0]];mutable:true"><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-m class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="user-query-bubble-with-background enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted"><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="horizontal-container"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" role="heading" aria-level="2" class="query-text gds-body-l collapsed" dir="ltr"><span _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-user-query-label">Anda berkata</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> berdasarkan error yang terjadi pada project saya : Dari ip a kamu, masalahnya sekarang 100% jelas. Lihat baris ini: <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> 9: vboxnet0:  link/ether 0a:00:27:00:00:00 <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 0a:00:27:00:00:00 memang MAC asli dari vboxnet0 itu sendiri. Bukan 
hasil spoof — itu memang MAC hardware interface vboxnet0 di Kali host 
kamu. Jadi ketika bettercap mengirim ARP poison, dia pakai MAC source 
milik interface-nya sendiri (vboxnet0), dan Ubuntu pun percaya bahwa 
Metasploitable ada di MAC itu. Traffic Ubuntu dikirim ke Kali host, tapi
 Kali tidak bisa forward karena traffic masuk dan keluar dari interface 
yang sama (vboxnet0 → vboxnet0), ini yang disebut same-interface routing
 problem. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 Kernel Linux secara default menolak forward packet yang datang dan 
pergi dari interface yang sama. iptables rule -i vboxnet0 -o vboxnet0 
pun tidak cukup menyelesaikan ini karena isu-nya ada di level routing, 
bukan filtering. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Solusi: Jalankan bettercap dari dalam VM, bukan dari Kali host <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 Ini adalah architectural fix yang paling bersih. Karena Kali adalah 
host fisik dan vboxnet0 adalah virtual interface, bettercap tidak bisa 
benar-benar "berada di antara" dua VM. Solusinya: pindahkan attacker ke 
posisi yang benar secara topologi — yaitu di dalam network Host-Only itu
 sendiri, bukan di host yang mengelolanya. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Langkah 1 — buat VM Kali baru atau gunakan VM Kali yang sudah ada di VirtualBox <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 Kalau tidak punya VM Kali terpisah, cara tercepat adalah import Kali 
sebagai VM (bukan host). Tapi kalau setup kamu memang Kali sebagai host,
 ada workaround tanpa VM baru: <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Langkah 2 (workaround tanpa VM baru) — buat network namespace terpisah <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> # Buat veth pair — dua ujung kabel virtual <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip link add veth-kali type veth peer name veth-peer <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> # Assign IP di subnet yang sama dengan Host-Only <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip addr add 192.168.56.50/24 dev veth-kali <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip link set veth-kali up <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> # Assign peer ke namespace berbeda <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip netns add attacker-ns <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip link set veth-peer netns attacker-ns <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip netns exec attacker-ns ip addr add 192.168.56.51/24 dev veth-peer <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip netns exec attacker-ns ip link set veth-peer up <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Tapi ini rumit dan tetap tidak ideal karena masih di host yang sama. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Solusi paling praktis untuk lab kamu sekarang <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 Karena kamu sudah punya Ubuntu VM dengan Host-Only adapter, jalankan 
bettercap dari Ubuntu sebagai attacker, bukan dari Kali host. Ubuntu ada
 di dalam network Host-Only secara proper — Ubuntu punya MAC address VM 
yang nyata, bukan MAC host interface. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> # Di Ubuntu — install bettercap <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo apt install bettercap -y <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> # Jalankan bettercap dari Ubuntu, target Metasploitable <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo bettercap -iface enp0s8   # atau nama adapter Host-Only Ubuntu kamu <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Di dalam bettercap (dari Ubuntu): <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> set arp.spoof.fullduplex true <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> set arp.spoof.internal true <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> set arp.spoof.targets 192.168.56.102 <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> arp.spoof on <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> net.sniff on <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 Dengan ini, Ubuntu (yang punya MAC VM nyata 08:00:27:35:c1:da) akan 
mengirim ARP poison ke Metasploitable. Traffic dari Ubuntu ke 
Metasploitable akan ter-intercept oleh bettercap yang berjalan di Ubuntu
 itu sendiri — ini valid untuk demonstrasi MITM self-intercept, atau 
kamu bisa tambahkan VM ketiga sebagai victim murni. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Alternatif terbaik jangka panjang <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 Tambahkan satu VM Kali di VirtualBox dengan adapter Host-Only saja. VM 
Kali ini akan punya MAC address VM yang nyata dan posisinya benar secara
 topologi — di dalam jaringan, bukan di atas jaringan sebagai host. Ini 
setup standar lab MITM yang benar: <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> [Kali VM]  ←→  [vboxnet0 switch]  ←→  [Ubuntu VM] <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">                                    ←→  [Metasploitable VM] <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Bukan seperti sekarang: <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> [Kali HOST yang mengelola vboxnet0]  ←→  [Ubuntu VM] <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">                                      ←→  [Metasploitable VM] <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 Posisi host sebagai attacker secara fundamental konflik dengan cara 
kerja virtual switch VirtualBox. Apakah ada saran lain, yang bertindak 
sebagai kali merupakan host, karena jika saya harus membuat kali di vm, 
terlalu berat di laptop saya  <!----><!----></p><!----></div><button _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" mat-icon-button="" aria-label="Luaskan" mattooltip="Luaskan teks" class="mdc-icon-button data-path-to-node="2">Berikut adalah dua solusi alternatif yang sangat ringan dan tetap menjaga topologi lab kamu terlihat profesional untuk dimasukkan ke GitHub/CV:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="3">Alternatif 1: Menggunakan Docker Container sebagai Attacker (Sangat Direkomendasikan)</h3><p data-path-to-node="4" id="p-rc_654d19c2221bc462-30"><span data-path-to-node="4,0"><span class="citation-11"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="4,1"><span class="citation-11">Karena kamu sudah merencanakan penggunaan Docker untuk </span><i data-path-to-node="4,1" data-index-in-node="55"><span class="citation-11">deploy target</span></i><span class="citation-11"> web</span></span><span data-path-to-node="4,2"><span class="citation-11 citation-end-11"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="3"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="4,3">, kita bisa memanfaatkan Docker untuk menjalankan versi super ringan dari Kali Linux.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click"><!----><!----><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" hide-from-message-actions="" class="button-label gds-label-m hide-from-message-actions ng-star-inserted"><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" role="img" fonticon="link" class="mat-icon notranslate symbol gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="link"></mat-icon>+1</span><!----><!----><!----></button><!----><!----><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></source-inline-chip><!----><!----><!----></sources-carousel-inline></p><p data-path-to-node="5">Container berjalan di atas <i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="27">kernel host</i> (Kali fisik kamu), sehingga beban RAM-nya nyaris 0 dibandingkan menjalankan VM. Dengan metode <b data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="133">Docker Macvlan</b>, container ini akan memiliki <i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="177">MAC Address</i> sendiri dan dianggap sebagai mesin yang benar-benar terpisah di dalam jaringan <code data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="268">vboxnet0</code>.</p><p data-path-to-node="6"><b data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="0">Langkah 1: Izinkan Promiscuous Mode di VirtualBox</b></p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="7"><li><p data-path-to-node="7,0,0">Buka VirtualBox &gt; File &gt; Host Network Manager.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="7,1,0">Pilih <code data-path-to-node="7,1,0" data-index-in-node="6">vboxnet0</code>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="7,2,0">Pastikan IPv4 Address dikonfigurasi dengan benar (misal: <code data-path-to-node="7,2,0" data-index-in-node="57">192.168.56.1</code>).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="7,3,0"><b data-path-to-node="7,3,0" data-index-in-node="0">Penting:</b> Di bagian bawah/tab pengaturan, pastikan <b data-path-to-node="7,3,0" data-index-in-node="50">Promiscuous Mode</b> diubah menjadi <b data-path-to-node="7,3,0" data-index-in-node="82">Allow All</b>.</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="8"><b data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="0">Langkah 2: Buat Jaringan Macvlan di Docker Host (Kali Fisik)</b>
Jalankan perintah ini di terminal Kali fisik kamu untuk membuat <i data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="125">bridge</i> antara Docker dan <code data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="150">vboxnet0</code>:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" </code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="12"><b data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="0">Langkah 4: Lakukan MITM dari dalam Container</b>
Sekarang kamu berada di dalam terminal container (yang bertindak sebagai <i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="118">attacker</i> terpisah).</p><response-element class="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-47"><span class="hljs-comment"># Update dan install tools yang dibutuhkan [cite: 51]</span>
apt update &amp;&amp; apt install bettercap iproute2 iputils-ping -y

<span class="hljs-comment"># Jalankan bettercap (interface-nya biasanya bernama eth0 di dalam container)</span>
bettercap -iface eth0
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="14" id="p-rc_654d19c2221bc462-31"><span data-path-to-node="14,0"><span class="citation-10"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="14,1"><span class="citation-10">Setup ini secara topologi sangat akurat dan sempurna untuk demonstrasi </span><i data-path-to-node="14,1" data-index-in-node="71"><span class="citation-10">hands-on attack simulation</span></i></span><span data-path-to-node="14,2"><span class="citation-10 citation-end-10"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="4"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="14,3">.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. data-path-to-node="15"><h3 data-path-to-node="16">Alternatif 2: Tweak Kernel Kali Host (Bypass Same-Interface Routing)</h3><p data-path-to-node="17">Jika kamu tidak ingin menggunakan Docker dan tetap bersikeras ingin mengeksekusi perintah langsung dari terminal Kali fisik, masalahnya ada pada perilaku kernel Linux yang disebut <b data-path-to-node="17" data-index-in-node="180">ICMP Redirects</b>.</p><p data-path-to-node="18" id="p-rc_654d19c2221bc462-32"><span data-path-to-node="18,0">Secara <i data-path-to-node="18,0" data-index-in-node="7">default</i>, ketika Kali menerima paket dari Ubuntu (di <code data-path-to-node="18,0" data-index-in-node="59">vboxnet0</code>) yang tujuannya adalah Metasploitable (juga di <code data-path-to-node="18,0" data-index-in-node="115">vboxnet0</code>), Kali tidak akan mem-forward paket tersebut. </span><span data-path-to-node="18,1"><span class="citation-9"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="18,2"><span class="citation-9">Sebaliknya, Kali akan mengirim pesan "ICMP Redirect" ke Ubuntu yang isinya: </span><i data-path-to-node="18,2" data-index-in-node="76"><span class="citation-9">"Hei, Metasploitable ada di jaringan yang sama denganmu, langsung saja bicara dengannya, jangan lewat aku."</span></i><span class="citation-9"> Hal ini langsung memutus serangan MITM</span></span><span data-path-to-node="18,3"><span class="citation-9 citation-end-9"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="5"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="18,4">.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click,impression,attention" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQvoAQahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQngE"><!----><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" role="img" fonticon="link" class="mat-icon notranslate symbol gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color ng-star-inserted" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="link"></mat-icon><!----></button><!----><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></source-inline-chip><!----><!----><!----></sources-carousel-inline></p><p data-path-to-node="19">Kamu harus memaksa kernel Kali untuk diam dan tetap mem-forward paket tersebut:</p><p data-path-to-node="20"><b data-path-to-node="20" data-index-in-node="0">Langkah 1: Matikan ICMP Redirects dan Aktifkan Forwarding</b>
Jalankan perintah berikut di terminal Kali fisik:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" ng-tns-c289529910-48"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-48"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-48"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-48"><span class="hljs-comment"># Aktifkan IP Forwarding</span>
sudo sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1

<span class="hljs-comment"># Matikan pengiriman ICMP Redirects secara global dan spesifik di vboxnet0</span>
sudo sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.all.send_redirects=0
sudo sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.vboxnet0.send_redirects=0
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="22"><b data-path-to-node="22" data-index-in-node="0">Langkah 2: Eksekusi Bettercap</b>

class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----></div><!----><!----></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-50"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-50"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-50"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-50">set arp.spoof.fullduplex true
set arp.spoof.internal true
set arp.spoof.targets &lt;IP_UBUNTU&gt;,&lt;IP_METASPLOITABLE&gt;
arp.spoof on
net.sniff on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="26"><b data-path-to-node="26" data-index-in-node="0">Catatan untuk Alternatif 2:</b> Meskipun metode ini tidak memerlukan VM/Docker tambahan, tingkat keberhasilannya sangat bergantung pada bagaimana VirtualBox menangani <i data-path-to-node="26" data-index-in-node="163">promiscuous traffic</i> di level <i data-path-to-node="26" data-index-in-node="192">host-adapter</i>. Terkadang koneksi akan terasa sangat lambat (<i data-path-to-node="26" data-index-in-node="251">lag/drop packets</i>).</p><p data-path-to-node="27" id="p-rc_654d19c2221bc462-33"><span data-path-to-node="27,0"><span class="citation-8"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="27,1"><span class="citation-8">Jika laptop kamu masih sanggup menjalankan Docker, </span><b data-path-to-node="27,1" data-index-in-node="51"><span class="citation-8">Alternatif 1</span></b><span class="citation-8"> adalah solusi level profesional yang jauh lebih bersih dan stabil untuk mendapatkan bukti </span><i data-path-to-node="27,1" data-index-in-node="154"><span class="citation-8">intercept traffic</span></i><span class="citation-8"> </span></span><span data-path-to-node="27,2"><span class="citation-8 citation-end-8"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="6"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="27,3"><span class="citation-7"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="27,4"><span class="citation-7">dan </span><i data-path-to-node="27,4" data-index-in-node="4"><span class="citation-7">credential capture</span></i></span><span data-path-to-node="27,5"><span class="citation-7 citation-end-7"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="7"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="27,6">.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button multiple-button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. screen-reader-user-query-label">Anda berkata</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 lakukan pertimbangan jika saya menggunakan cara ini, apa plus dan 
minusnya : Langkah 2 (workaround tanpa VM baru) — buat network namespace
 terpisah : # Buat veth pair — dua ujung kabel virtual <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip link add veth-kali type veth peer name veth-peer <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> # Assign IP di subnet yang sama dengan Host-Only <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip addr add 192.168.56.50/24 dev veth-kali <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip link set veth-kali up <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> # Assign peer ke namespace berbeda <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip netns add attacker-ns <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip link set veth-peer netns attacker-ns <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip netns exec attacker-ns ip addr add 192.168.56.51/24 dev veth-peer <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo ip netns exec attacker-ns ip link set veth-peer up <!----><!----></p><!----></div><button _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" mat-icon-button="" aria-label="Luaskan" _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_e558a9e3f1137f27" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_e558a9e3f1137f27" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Ini adalah pertimbangan teknis yang sangat bagus. Menggunakan <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="62">Network Namespace</i> (<code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="81">ip netns</code>) adalah cara yang sangat <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="115">advanced</i>—faktanya, teknologi inilah yang menjadi "mesin" di balik bagaimana Docker mengisolasi jaringan <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="219">container</i>.</p><p data-path-to-node="1" id="p-rc_937166547385e0eb-39"><span data-path-to-node="1,0"><span class="citation-30"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="1,1"><span class="citation-30">Jika kamu memilih menggunakan rute eksekusi skrip </span><i data-path-to-node="1,1" data-index-in-node="50"><span class="citation-30">Network Namespace</span></i><span class="citation-30"> tersebut, berikut adalah rincian </span><i data-path-to-node="1,1" data-index-in-node="101"><span class="citation-30">plus</span></i><span class="citation-30"> dan </span><i data-path-to-node="1,1" data-index-in-node="110"><span class="citation-30">minusnya</span></i><span class="citation-30"> untuk </span><i data-path-to-node="1,1" data-index-in-node="125"><span class="citation-30">project mini cyber range</span></i><span class="citation-30"> kamu</span></span><span data-path-to-node="1,2"><span class="citation-30 citation-end-30"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="1"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="1,3">:</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click,impression,attention" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQvoAQahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQuQE"><!----><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" role="img" fonticon="link" class="mat-icon notranslate symbol gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color ng-star-inserted" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="link"></mat-icon><!----></button><!----><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></source-inline-chip><!----><!----><!----></sources-carousel-inline></p><h3 data-path-to-node="2">🟢 Kelebihan (Plus)</h3><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="3"><li><p data-path-to-node="3,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="3,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Sangat Ringan (Ultra-Lightweight):</b>
Ini adalah keunggulan utamanya. Tidak seperti menjalankan Virtual Machine yang memakan RAM bergiga-giga, <i data-path-to-node="3,0,0" data-index-in-node="140">namespace</i> berjalan langsung di atas kernel Linux (Kali) kamu dengan konsumsi <i data-path-to-node="3,0,0" data-index-in-node="217">resource</i> hampir 0%. Laptop kamu tidak akan terasa berat sama sekali.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="3,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Isolasi MAC Address &amp; Routing yang Nyata:</b>
<i data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="42">Namespace</i> benar-benar memisahkan <i data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="75">routing table</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="93">ARP cache</i>. Interface <code data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="114">veth-peer</code> di dalam <i data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="133">namespace</i> akan memiliki <i data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="157">MAC Address</i> virtual yang benar-benar berbeda dari <code data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="207">vboxnet0</code> milik <i data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="222">host</i>. Ini secara teoritis bisa menyelesaikan konflik <i data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="275">same-interface routing</i> karena secara logis, posisinya sudah terpisah dari antarmuka fisik/utama Kali.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="3,2,0"><b data-path-to-node="3,2,0" data-index-in-node="0">Eksplorasi Deep Linux Networking:</b>
Dari sisi pembelajaran, kamu akan sangat memahami bagaimana jaringan Linux bekerja di level <i data-path-to-node="3,2,0" data-index-in-node="126">low-level</i>. Ini <i data-path-to-node="3,2,0" data-index-in-node="141">skill</i> yang sangat bernilai untuk <i data-path-to-node="3,2,0" data-index-in-node="174">Cloud Security</i> atau pemahaman infrastruktur.</p></li></ol><hr data-path-to-node="4"><h3 data-path-to-node="5">🔴 Kekurangan (Minus)</h3><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="6"><li><p data-path-to-node="6,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Skrip Belum Sempurna (Potensi Konflik Routing):</b>
Ada celah logika pada skrip di atas. Skrip tersebut hanya membuat "kabel virtual" (<code data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="131">veth</code>) antara <i data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="144">host</i> Kali dan <i data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="158">namespace</i>. Namun, kabel itu <b data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="186">belum terhubung</b> ke <code data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="205">vboxnet0</code> tempat Ubuntu dan Metasploitable berada.
Selain itu, karena kamu memberi IP <code data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="290">192.168.56.50/24</code> pada <code data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="312">veth-kali</code>, <i data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="323">host</i> Kali kamu sekarang memiliki dua jalur (<i data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="367">interface</i>) yang mengarah ke <i data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="395">subnet</i> yang sama (satu di <code data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="421">vboxnet0</code> dan satu di <code data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="442">veth-kali</code>). Ini akan membingungkan <i data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="477">kernel</i> saat melakukan <i data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="499">routing</i>. Untuk membuatnya bekerja, kamu harus membuat <i data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="553">Linux Bridge</i> (<code data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="567">brctl</code>), yang sering kali bentrok dengan antarmuka virtual bawaan VirtualBox.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,1,0" id="p-rc_937166547385e0eb-40"><span data-path-to-node="6,1,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="6,1,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Operasional Tools Menjadi Ribet:</b>
</span><span data-path-to-node="6,1,0,1"><span class="citation-29"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="6,1,0,2"><span class="citation-29">Setiap kali kamu ingin menjalankan </span><i data-path-to-node="6,1,0,2" data-index-in-node="35"><span class="citation-29">tools</span></i><span class="citation-29"> sebagai </span><i data-path-to-node="6,1,0,2" data-index-in-node="49"><span class="citation-29">attacker</span></i><span class="citation-29"> utama</span></span><span data-path-to-node="6,1,0,3"><span class="citation-29 citation-end-29"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="2"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="6,1,0,4">, kamu tidak bisa sekadar mengetik perintah di terminal. Kamu harus selalu membungkusnya dengan perintah <i data-path-to-node="6,1,0,4" data-index-in-node="105">namespace</i>:</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click,impression,attention" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQvoAQahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQugE"><!----><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" role="img" fonticon="link" class="mat-icon notranslate symbol gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color ng-star-inserted" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="link"></mat-icon><!----></button><!----><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></source-inline-chip><!----><!----><!----></sources-carousel-inline></p><ul data-path-to-node="6,1,1"><li><p data-path-to-node="6,1,1,0,0"><code data-path-to-node="6,1,1,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">sudo ip netns exec attacker-ns bettercap -iface veth-peer</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,1,1,1,0"><code data-path-to-node="6,1,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">sudo ip netns exec attacker-ns nmap ...</code></p></li></ul></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,2,0" id="p-rc_937166547385e0eb-41"><span data-path-to-node="6,2,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="6,2,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Sulit untuk GUI Tools (seperti Wireshark):</b>
</span><span data-path-to-node="6,2,0,1"><span class="citation-28"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="6,2,0,2"><span class="citation-28">Project ini merencanakan penggunaan Wireshark untuk analisis </span><i data-path-to-node="6,2,0,2" data-index-in-node="61"><span class="citation-28">traffic</span></i></span><span data-path-to-node="6,2,0,3"><span class="citation-28 citation-end-28"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="3"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="6,2,0,4">. Menjalankan aplikasi berbasis GUI (X11) dari dalam <i data-path-to-node="6,2,0,4" data-index-in-node="53">network namespace</i> yang terisolasi membutuhkan konfigurasi <i data-path-to-node="6,2,0,4" data-index-in-node="111">display forwarding</i> tambahan yang cukup memusingkan.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click,impression,attention" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQvoAQahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQuwE"><!----><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" role="img" fonticon="link" class="mat-icon notranslate symbol gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color ng-star-inserted" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="link"></mat-icon><!----></button><!----><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></source-inline-chip><!----><!----><!----></sources-carousel-inline></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,3,0" id="p-rc_937166547385e0eb-42"><span data-path-to-node="6,3,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="6,3,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Kurang Rapi untuk Dokumentasi Portfolio:</b>
</span><span data-path-to-node="6,3,0,1"><span class="citation-27"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="6,3,0,2"><span class="citation-27">Project ini ditargetkan untuk level portfolio profesional yang akan ditampilkan di GitHub atau CV</span></span><span data-path-to-node="6,3,0,3"><span class="citation-27 citation-end-27"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="4"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="4"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="4"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="4"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="6,3,0,4">. Menyajikan topologi dengan <i data-path-to-node="6,3,0,4" data-index-in-node="29">Linux Namespace</i> manual di <i data-path-to-node="6,3,0,4" data-index-in-node="55">host</i> terlihat lebih seperti "trik/workaround" (retasan sementara) daripada arsitektur infrastruktur yang standar dan terstruktur.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button multiple-button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click"><!----><!----><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" hide-from-message-actions="" class="button-label gds-label-m data-path-to-node="7">Kesimpulan</h3><p data-path-to-node="8" id="p-rc_937166547385e0eb-43"><span data-path-to-node="8,0"><span class="citation-26"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="8,1"><span class="citation-26">Menggunakan </span><i data-path-to-node="8,1" data-index-in-node="12"><span class="citation-26">Network Namespace</span></i><span class="citation-26"> manual memiliki ide yang brilian untuk menghemat </span><i data-path-to-node="8,1" data-index-in-node="79"><span class="citation-26">resource</span></i><span class="citation-26">, tetapi praktiknya akan membuat kamu terjebak dalam </span><i data-path-to-node="8,1" data-index-in-node="140"><span class="citation-26">troubleshooting</span></i><span class="citation-26"> jaringan </span><i data-path-to-node="8,1" data-index-in-node="165"><span class="citation-26">host</span></i><span class="citation-26"> ketimbang fokus pada tujuan utama: melakukan simulasi serangan nyata seperti </span><i data-path-to-node="8,1" data-index-in-node="247"><span class="citation-26">Credential Harvesting</span></i><span class="citation-26"> dan </span><i data-path-to-node="8,1" data-index-in-node="273"><span class="citation-26">MITM</span></i></span><span data-path-to-node="8,2"><span class="citation-26 citation-end-26"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click"><!----><!----><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" hide-from-message-actions="" class="button-label gds-label-m hide-from-message-actions ng-star-inserted"><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" role="img" fonticon="link" class="mat-icon notranslate symbol gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="link"></mat-icon>+2</span><!----><!----><!----></button><!----><!----><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></source-inline-chip><!----><!----><!----></sources-carousel-inline></p><p data-path-to-node="9">Jika laptop kamu masih memiliki sisa RAM sekitar 500MB - 1GB, menggunakan <b data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="74">Docker (Alternatif 1 dari diskusi sebelumnya)</b> adalah jalan tengah yang jauh lebih baik. Docker mengotomatiskan kerumitan pembuatan <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="205">namespace</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="219">bridging</i> ini di latar belakang, sekaligus memberikan lingkungan yang bersih, terstruktur, dan sangat layak untuk didokumentasikan di CV.</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts
