_ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_69a6e1f35f39b79d" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Memang istilah Docker kadang terdengar sangat teknis. Mari kita bedah dengan analogi yang paling sederhana tentang apa itu Docker, dan kenapa ini jadi "penyelamat" untuk <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="170">project cyber lab</i> kamu.</p><h3 data-path-to-node="1">Analogi Sederhana: Rumah vs. Kamar Apartemen</h3><p data-path-to-node="2">Bayangkan laptop kamu adalah sebidang tanah.</p><ul data-path-to-node="3"><li><p data-path-to-node="3,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="3,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Virtual Machine (VirtualBox):</b> Ini ibarat <b data-path-to-node="3,0,0" data-index-in-node="41">membangun rumah baru</b> di atas tanah tersebut. Kamu harus membuat pondasi baru, sistem saluran air baru, dan meteran listrik sendiri (OS lengkap dengan kernelnya). Karena mandiri 100%, ini sangat berat dan menguras sumber daya (RAM &amp; CPU).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="3,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Docker:</b> Ini ibarat <b data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="19">kamar apartemen</b>. Gedungnya sudah ada (OS laptop kamu), saluran air dan listriknya meminjam dari gedung utama (berbagi Kernel OS Host). Tapi, kamar apartemen ini punya pintu yang bisa dikunci, jadi aktivitas di dalamnya terisolasi dari kamar lain. Karena tidak perlu membangun pondasi dari nol, Docker <b data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="320">sangat amat ringan</b>.</p></li></ul><hr data-path-to-node="4"><h3 data-path-to-node="5">Mengapa HARUS pakai Docker dalam kasus kamu?</h3><p data-path-to-node="6">Masalah utama yang kamu hadapi sebelumnya adalah <b data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="49">"Same-Interface Routing"</b>. Kali Linux (sebagai sistem utama/host) kebingungan melakukan serangan <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="145">Man-In-The-Middle</i> (MITM) karena dia menerima dan harus melempar kembali data serangan dari "pintu" (<i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="245">interface</i> jaringan) yang sama.</p><p data-path-to-node="7">Untuk mengatasi ini, aturannya adalah: <b data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="39">Attacker harus punya mesin dan identitas jaringan (MAC Address) yang terpisah.</b></p><p data-path-to-node="8">Kamu punya dua pilihan untuk memisahkan mesin attacker:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="9"><li><p data-path-to-node="9,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="9,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Bikin VM Kali Linux baru:</b> (Bikin "rumah baru"). Laptop kamu akan menangis karena harus menjalankan OS utama + VM Ubuntu + VM Metasploitable + VM Kali secara bersamaan. RAM bisa habis.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="9,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="9,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Pakai Docker:</b> (Bikin "kamar apartemen"). Kita menjalankan sistem operasi Kali Linux "versi saku" di dalam Docker. Ini memecahkan masalah tanpa membuat laptop kamu <i data-path-to-node="9,1,0" data-index-in-node="163">ngelag</i>.</p></li></ol><hr data-path-to-node="10"><h3 data-path-to-node="11">Apa Peran Docker di Project Ini?</h3><p data-path-to-node="12">Dalam skenario <i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="15">lab</i> kamu, Docker memiliki tiga peran krusial:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="13"><li><p data-path-to-node="13,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="13,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Menjadi Attacker Bayangan yang Ringan (Resource Efficiency)</b>
Alih-alih mengalokasikan 2 GB RAM untuk menjalankan Kali Linux utuh, Docker hanya memakai sekitar 100-200 MB RAM. Kamu mendapatkan terminal Kali Linux dengan semua <i data-path-to-node="13,0,0" data-index-in-node="224">tools</i> peretasan (seperti <code data-path-to-node="13,0,0" data-index-in-node="249">bettercap</code>), tapi dengan beban seringan membuka beberapa <i data-path-to-node="13,0,0" data-index-in-node="305">tab browser</i>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="13,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Memiliki "KTP" Jaringan Sendiri (Network Isolation)</b>
Dengan fitur bernama <b data-path-to-node="13,1,0" data-index-in-node="73">Docker Macvlan</b>, Docker bisa membuatkan <i data-path-to-node="13,1,0" data-index-in-node="112">MAC Address</i> (KTP fisik jaringan) dan <i data-path-to-node="13,1,0" data-index-in-node="149">IP Address</i> yang benar-benar baru untuk Kali Linux versi saku tersebut. Saat Kali Docker ini masuk ke jaringan <code data-path-to-node="13,1,0" data-index-in-node="259">vboxnet0</code>, Ubuntu dan Metasploitable akan melihatnya sebagai komputer fisik yang benar-benar berbeda. Serangan MITM pun bisa berjalan mulus!</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,2,0"><b data-path-to-node="13,2,0" data-index-in-node="0">Lingkungan Sekali Pakai yang Bersih (Disposable)</b>
Docker itu <i data-path-to-node="13,2,0" data-index-in-node="60">ephemeral</i> (sementara). Kalau kamu melakukan eksperimen aneh-aneh dan sistem Kali Dockernya rusak, kamu tinggal matikan. Detik itu juga dia hilang tanpa menyisakan file sampah. Mau coba lagi? Tinggal ketik satu perintah <code data-path-to-node="13,2,0" data-index-in-node="279">docker run</code>, dan dalam 2 detik Kali Linux yang baru dan bersih sudah siap dipakai lagi.</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="14"><b data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="0">Singkatnya:</b> Docker berperan sebagai jalan pintas yang cerdas. Dia memberikan kamu mesin <i data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="88">attacker</i> yang posisinya benar secara jaringan untuk menyadap data, tapi tidak membebani laptop kamu seperti halnya Virtual Machine biasa.</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click"><!----><!----><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" hide-from-message-actions="" class="button-label gds-label-m hide-from-message-actions ng-star-inserted"><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" role="img" fonticon="link" class="mat-icon notranslate symbol gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="link"></mat-icon>+1</span><!----><!----><!----></button><!----><!----><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></source-inline-chip><!----><!----><!----></sources-carousel-inline></p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="3"><b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="0">2. Menjadi Mesin "Attacker" yang Ringan dan Terisolasi (Solusi Masalah Jaringan)</b>
Menyambung masalah <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="100">same-interface routing</i> yang kamu alami dengan VirtualBox (<code data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="158">vboxnet0</code>), Docker mendapat peran tambahan sebagai penyelamat performa:</p><ul data-path-to-node="4"><li><p data-path-to-node="4,0,0">Docker digunakan untuk menjalankan Kali Linux versi super ringan sebagai mesin penyerang (<i data-path-to-node="4,0,0" data-index-in-node="90">attacker</i>), menggantikan kebutuhan membuat Virtual Machine Kali Linux baru yang berat.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="4,1,0">Melalui fitur <b data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="14">Docker Macvlan</b>, Docker memberikan "KTP jaringan" (<i data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="64">MAC Address</i> dan IP) yang benar-benar terpisah untuk Kali Linux tersebut. Ini memanipulasi topologi agar seolah-olah Kali Linux adalah mesin fisik yang berbeda di dalam jaringan.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="4,2,0" id="p-rc_bccc338eed46013a-54"><span data-path-to-node="4,2,0,0"><span class="citation-55"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="4,2,0,1"><span class="citation-55">Isolasi ini memungkinkan serangan </span><i data-path-to-node="4,2,0,1" data-index-in-node="34"><span class="citation-55">ARP Spoofing</span></i><span class="citation-55"> dan </span><i data-path-to-node="4,2,0,1" data-index-in-node="51"><span class="citation-55">Packet Sniffing</span></i><span class="citation-55"> (MITM) berjalan mulus tanpa ditolak oleh sistem </span><i data-path-to-node="4,2,0,1" data-index-in-node="115"><span class="citation-55">routing kernel host</span></i></span><span data-path-to-node="4,2,0,2"><span class="citation-55 citation-end-55"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="5"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="4,2,0,3">.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click,impression,attention" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQvoAQahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQ6wE"><!----><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" role="img" fonticon="link" class="mat-icon notranslate symbol gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color ng-star-inserted" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="link"></mat-icon><!----></button><!----><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></source-inline-chip><!----><!----><!----></sources-carousel-inline></p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="5" id="p-rc_bccc338eed46013a-55"><span data-path-to-node="5,0"><span class="citation-54"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="5,1"><span class="citation-54">Secara keseluruhan, Docker memungkinkan kamu mendemonstrasikan kerentanan sistem jaringan dan web dalam lab terkontrol (gabungan VM + Docker) secara komprehensif, tanpa harus membuat laptop kamu </span><i data-path-to-node="5,1" data-index-in-node="195"><span class="citation-54">overheat</span></i></span><span data-path-to-node="5,2"><span class="citation-54 citation-end-54"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="6"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="5,3">.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. data-path-to-node="1">Dalam rancangan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="16">project</i> kamu, Docker memegang peran ganda yang membuat keseluruhan lab menjadi sangat efisien dan ringan:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="2"><li><p data-path-to-node="2,0,0"><span class="citation-92"></span></p><p data-path-to-node="2,0,1" id="p-rc_8389288029c7be38-62"><span data-path-to-node="2,0,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="2,0,1,0" data-index-in-node="0"><span class="citation-92">Sebagai Penyedia Target Web (Victim Environment):</span></b><span class="citation-92"> Docker digunakan untuk menjalankan (</span><i data-path-to-node="2,0,1,0" data-index-in-node="86"><span class="citation-92">deploy</span></i><span class="citation-92">) aplikasi-aplikasi yang memang didesain rentan, seperti DVWA, Juice Shop, dan WebGoat</span></span><span data-path-to-node="2,0,1,1"><span class="citation-92 citation-end-92"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="2"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="2,0,1,2">. </span><span data-path-to-node="2,0,1,3"><span class="citation-91"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="2,0,1,4"><span class="citation-91">Di sinilah kamu akan mempraktikkan </span><i data-path-to-node="2,0,1,4" data-index-in-node="35"><span class="citation-91">Web Attack</span></i><span class="citation-91"> seperti </span><i data-path-to-node="2,0,1,4" data-index-in-node="54"><span data-index-in-node="0"><span class="citation-90">Sebagai Mesin Penyerang (Attacker Environment):</span></b><span class="citation-90"> Docker juga menjalankan </span><i data-path-to-node="2,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="72"><span class="citation-90">container</span></i><span class="citation-90"> Kali Linux dengan jaringan khusus (</span><i data-path-to-node="2,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="117"><span class="citation-90">Macvlan</span></i><span class="citation-90">) sebagai </span><i data-path-to-node="2,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="134"><span class="citation-90">attacker</span></i><span class="citation-90"> utama</span></span><span data-path-to-node="2,1,1,1"><span class="citation-90 citation-end-90"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="4"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="2,1,1,2">. </span><span data-path-to-node="2,1,1,3"><span class="citation-89"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="2,1,1,4"><span class="citation-89">Ini adalah solusi cerdas untuk mem-bypass masalah </span><i data-path-to-node="2,1,1,4" data-index-in-node="50"><span class="citation-89">routing</span></i><span class="citation-89"> (same-interface) di VirtualBox, sehingga serangan </span><i data-path-to-node="2,1,1,4" data-index-in-node="108"><span class="citation-89">Network Attack</span></i><span class="citation-89"> seperti MITM, </span><i data-path-to-node="2,1,1,4" data-index-in-node="137"><span class="citation-89">ARP Spoofing</span></i><span class="citation-89">, dan </span><i data-path-to-node="2,1,1,4" data-index-in-node="155"><span class="citation-89">Packet Sniffing</span></i><span class="citation-89"> bisa sukses tereksekusi tanpa membebani laptop</span></span><span data-path-to-node="2,1,1,5"><span class="citation-89 class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button></div><!----><!----></div></model-thoughts><!----></div><!----></div><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><h2 _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text contains-extensions-response processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_9cc5c27a668022d0" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_9cc5c27a668022d0" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Rancangan arsitektur ini sangat matang dan menyelesaikan akar masalah secara elegan. Alih-alih membebani laptop dengan membuat mesin virtual (VM) baru, penggunaan Docker Macvlan mengisolasi <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="190">routing</i> jaringan dengan sangat rapi.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Berikut adalah analisis dan langkah penerapan dari topologi rancangan baru tersebut, dijelaskan dengan bahasa yang lugas.</p><h3 data-path-to-node="2"><b data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="0">Mengapa Macvlan Menyelesaikan Masalah?</b></h3><p data-path-to-node="3">Masalah utama pada <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="19">setup</i> lama adalah <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="37">same-interface routing problem</b>. Saat Kali Linux fisik (<i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="92">host</i>) bertindak sebagai <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="116">attacker</i> menggunakan antarmuka <code data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="147">vboxnet0</code>, paket data yang ditangkap harus dikembalikan lagi melalui antarmuka yang sama. Kernel Linux secara <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="256">default</i> akan menolak (<i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="278">drop</i>) paket yang keluar-masuk dari satu pintu yang sama untuk mencegah terjadinya <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="360">loop</i> jaringan.</p><p data-path-to-node="4">Penggunaan Docker dengan mode jaringan lain juga tidak akan efektif:</p><ul data-path-to-node="5"><li><p data-path-to-node="5,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="5,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Docker Bridge:</b> Menggunakan sistem NAT. Lalu lintas akan di-NAT sebelum keluar ke <code data-path-to-node="5,0,0" data-index-in-node="81">vboxnet0</code>, sehingga memanipulasi ARP tidak akan mempan.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="5,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="5,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Docker Host:</b> Menggunakan <i data-path-to-node="5,1,0" data-index-in-node="25">MAC Address</i> mesin utama (Kali), sehingga masalah <i data-path-to-node="5,1,0" data-index-in-node="74">same-interface routing</i> akan terulang kembali.</p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="6"><b data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="0">Docker Macvlan</b> adalah solusi paling presisi. Macvlan memungkinkan setiap <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="73">container</i> memiliki <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="92">MAC Address</i> uniknya sendiri. Di mata jaringan, <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="139">container</i> Bettercap, DVWA, dan WebGoat akan terlihat seperti komputer fisik terpisah yang terkoneksi langsung ke kabel jaringan <code data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="267">vboxnet0</code>, meskipun aslinya berjalan di satu mesin induk yang sama.</p><hr data-path-to-node="7"><h3 data-path-to-node="8"><b data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="0">Langkah-Langkah Penerapan</b></h3><p data-path-to-node="9"><b data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="0">1. Membuat Jaringan Dasar (Macvlan Network)</b>
Langkah pertama adalah membuat ruang jaringan khusus bernama <code data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="105">mitm-net</code> yang menempel (<i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="129">parent</i>) pada antarmuka <code data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="152">vboxnet0</code>.</p><ul data-path-to-node="10"><li><p data-path-to-node="10,0,0">Jalankan perintah ini di terminal Kali Linux fisik:
<code data-path-to-node="10,0,0" data-index-in-node="52">docker network create -d macvlan --subnet=192.168.56.0/24 -o parent=vboxnet0 mitm-net</code></p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="11"><b data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="0">2. Menggelar Target Web Rentan</b>
Setelah jaringan terbentuk, jalankan <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="68">container</i> aplikasi target. Berikan IP statis pada masing-masing target agar mudah disasar selama simulasi serangan.</p><ul data-path-to-node="12"><li><p data-path-to-node="12,0,0"><i data-path-to-node="12,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Deploy</i> target pertama (DVWA):
<code data-path-to-node="12,0,0" data-index-in-node="30">docker run -d --name dvwa --network mitm-net --ip 192.168.56.20 vulnerables/web-dvwa</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="12,1,0"><i data-path-to-node="12,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Deploy</i> target kedua (WebGoat):
<code data-path-to-node="12,1,0" data-index-in-node="31">docker run -d --name webgoat --network mitm-net --ip 192.168.56.21 webgoat/webgoat-8.0</code></p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="13"><b data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="0">3. Menerjunkan Attacker (Bettercap Container)</b>
Jalankan <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="55">container</i> Kali Linux minimalis yang akan bertindak sebagai mesin penyerang utama. Tambahkan hak istimewa jaringan (<code data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="170">NET_ADMIN</code> dan <code data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="184">NET_RAW</code>) agar <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="198">container</i> ini diizinkan untuk memodifikasi paket jaringan dan melakukan <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="270">sniffing</i>.</p><ul data-path-to-node="14"><li><p data-path-to-node="14,0,0">Jalankan <i data-path-to-node="14,0,0" data-index-in-node="9">container</i> penyerang:
<code data-path-to-node="14,0,0" data-index-in-node="30">docker run -it --name attacker --network mitm-net --ip 192.168.56.10 --cap-add=NET_ADMIN --cap-add=NET_RAW kalilinux/kali-rolling /bin/bash</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="14,1,0">Setelah masuk ke terminal <i data-path-to-node="14,1,0" data-index-in-node="26">container</i>, instal alat utama:
<code data-path-to-node="14,1,0" data-index-in-node="56">apt update &amp;&amp; apt install bettercap -y</code></p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="15"><b data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="0">4. Eksekusi Serangan MITM &amp; Sniffing</b>
Sekarang, mesin penyerang, target web, dan mesin korban (Ubuntu VM) sudah berada di satu arena dengan <i data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="139">MAC Address</i> masing-masing.</p><ul data-path-to-node="16"><li><p data-path-to-node="16,0,0">Buka Bettercap dari dalam <i data-path-to-node="16,0,0" data-index-in-node="26">container</i> <i data-path-to-node="16,0,0" data-index-in-node="36">attacker</i>:
<code data-path-to-node="16,0,0" data-index-in-node="46">bettercap -iface eth0</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="16,1,0">Jalankan serangan <i data-path-to-node="16,1,0" data-index-in-node="18">ARP Spoofing</i> dengan target Ubuntu VM (misal IP <code data-path-to-node="16,1,0" data-index-in-node="65">.56.101</code>) agar seluruh lalu lintas HTTP menuju DVWA atau WebGoat melewati mesin penyerang dan kredensial <i data-path-to-node="16,1,0" data-index-in-node="169">login</i> bisa tertangkap.</p></li></ul><hr data-path-to-node="17"><h3 data-path-to-node="18"><b data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="0">Peringatan Batasan Sistem</b></h3><p data-path-to-node="19">Terdapat satu mekanisme keamanan bawaan dari Macvlan: <b data-path-to-node="19" data-index-in-node="54">Isolasi Host ke Container</b>.</p><p data-path-to-node="20">Mesin induk (Kali Linux fisik) tidak diizinkan berkomunikasi langsung dengan <i data-path-to-node="20" data-index-in-node="77">container</i> yang ada di dalam jaringan Macvlan tersebut. Artinya, kamu tidak akan bisa membuka <i data-path-to-node="20" data-index-in-node="170">browser</i> di Kali fisik dan mengakses DVWA di <code data-path-to-node="20" data-index-in-node="214">192.168.56.20</code>. Akses akan <i data-path-to-node="20" data-index-in-node="240">timeout</i>.</p><p data-path-to-node="21">Ini bukan sebuah kegagalan sistem, melainkan desain Macvlan. Untuk keperluan lab ini, kamu harus mengakses target web (DVWA/WebGoat) murni menggunakan <i data-path-to-node="21" data-index-in-node="151">browser</i> dari dalam <b data-path-to-node="21" data-index-in-node="170">Ubuntu VM</b> yang berperan sebagai mesin korban, yang mana ini justru membuat simulasi serangan menjadi sangat realistis.</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer contains-extensions-response gap class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_2bbd6807dd9981c2" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_2bbd6807dd9981c2" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Ah, tenang saja! Ini <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="21">error</i> yang sangat umum terjadi saat mengetik perintah di terminal Linux.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Akar masalahnya murni ada pada penulisan tanda hubung (<i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="55">dash</i> atau strip). Di Linux dan Docker, opsi kata panjang (seperti <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="121">name</i>, <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="127">network</i>, <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="136">driver</i>) <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="144">harus menggunakan tanda strip ganda (<code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="181">--</code>)</b>, bukan strip tunggal (<code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="207">-</code>).</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Ketika kamu mengetik <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="21">-name</code> (strip tunggal), Docker mengiranya kamu memasukkan gabungan opsi pendek (<code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="100">-n</code>, <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="104">-a</code>, <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="108">-m</code>, <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="112">-e</code>), itulah kenapa muncul pesan <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="144">unknown shorthand flag: 'n'</code>.</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Berikut adalah perbaikan <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="25">syntax</i> untuk kedua perintahmu. Kamu bisa langsung <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="75">copy-paste</i> perintah di bawah ini:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="4">1. Perbaikan Command <code data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="21">docker network create</code></h3><p data-path-to-node="5">Kamu kurang menambahkan tanda strip ganda (<code data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="43">--</code>) pada parameter opsinya.</p><p data-path-to-node="6"><b data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="0">Perintah yang benar:</b></p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-94 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-94">docker network create \
  --driver macvlan \
  --subnet=192.168.56.0/24 \
  --gateway=192.168.56.1 \
  --opt parent=vboxnet0 \
  mitm-net
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><h3 data-path-to-node="8">2. Perbaikan Command <code data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="21">docker run</code> WebGoat</h3><p data-path-to-node="9">Sama seperti sebelumnya, ubah strip tunggal menjadi strip ganda pada opsi <code data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="74">--name</code>, <code data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="82">--network</code>, dan <code data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="97">--ip</code>. (Kecuali <code data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="112">-d</code> karena itu memang opsi pendek untuk <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="151">detach</i>).</p><p data-path-to-node="10"><b data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="0">Perintah yang benar:</b></p><response-element class="" _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_b1a684a6dccc07d2" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_b1a684a6dccc07d2" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Ah, ini <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="8">error</i> klasik Docker! Pesan <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="35">repository does not exist or may require 'docker login'</code> muncul karena Docker Hub tidak bisa menemukan <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="137">image</i> dengan nama <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="155">webgoat/goat-and-wolf</code>. Kemungkinan <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="190">image</i> gabungan tersebut sudah usang, dihapus dari publik, atau repositorinya diprivat oleh pengembangnya.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Solusinya sangat mudah. Kita cukup mengganti nama <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="50">image</i> ke versi resmi WebGoat yang dijamin tersedia untuk publik (sesuai dengan rancangan awal kita).</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Berikut adalah perintah yang sudah diperbaiki menggunakan <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="58">image</i> resmi <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="70">webgoat/webgoat</code> (versi stabil terbaru). Silakan <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="118">copy-paste</i> perintah ini:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-105 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div ng-tns-c289529910-105 ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Download kode" mat-icon-button="" mattooltip="Download kode" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button ng-tns-c289529910-105"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-105"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-105"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-105">docker run -d \
  --name webgoat \
  --network mitm-net \
  --ip 192.168.56.21 \
  webgoat/webgoat:latest
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="4"><b data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="0">Apa yang akan terjadi selanjutnya?</b>
Karena ini pertama kalinya laptop kamu menggunakan <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="86">image</i> tersebut, Docker akan otomatis mengunduhnya (<i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="137">pulling</i>) dari internet. Proses ini akan memakan waktu beberapa saat tergantung kecepatan koneksi.</p><p data-path-to-node="5">Tunggu sampai proses unduh selesai dan terminal memunculkan deretan kombinasi angka dan huruf yang panjang (ID Container). Jika ID tersebut muncul, artinya WebGoat sudah berhasil berjalan diam-diam di latar belakang dan siap diserang!</p><p data-path-to-node="6">Kabari kalau proses <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="20">deploy</i> target web ini sudah beres, agar kita bisa langsung menerjunkan <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="91">container</i> mesin penyerang (Bettercap).</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="thoughts-wrapper"><!----><model-thoughts _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" data-test-id="model-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c35387575="" class="ng-tns-c35387575-108 ng-star-inserted" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" xapautoid="" class="model-thoughts ng-tns-c35387575-108" id="xap-auto-id-8"><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" class="thoughts-header ng-tns-c35387575-108"><button _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" mat-button="" data-test-id="thoughts-header-button" class="mdc-button mat-mdc-button-base thoughts-header-button ng-tns-c35387575-108 mat-mdc-button mat-unthemed" mat-ripple-loader-uninitialized="" mat-ripple-loader-class-name="mat-mdc-button-ripple" aria-controls="xap-auto-id-8" aria-expanded="false" jslog="247951;track:generic_click,impression"><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-button__ripple"></span><span class="mdc-button__label"><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" class="thoughts-header-button-content animated-content"><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" role="status" class="thoughts-header-button-label ng-tns-c35387575-108"><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" class="ng-tns-c35387575-108 ng-star-inserted">Tampilkan alur berpikir</span><!----></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" class="thoughts-header-button-icons ng-tns-c35387575-108"><!----><mat-icon class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button></div><!----><!----></div></model-thoughts><!----></div><!----></div><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><h2 _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_c79edbeef19f80fd" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_c79edbeef19f80fd" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Wah, luar biasa! Selamat, kamu sudah berhasil melewati rintangan <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="65">syntax error</i> dan berhasil menjalankan seluruh infrastruktur lab (<i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="130">attacker</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="143">target web</i>) menggunakan Docker Macvlan. Ini pencapaian yang sangat bagus!</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Sekarang menjawab pertanyaan pentingmu: <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="40">Mengapa <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="48">192.168.56.101</code>?</b></p><p data-path-to-node="2">Angka <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="6">192.168.56.101</code> pada perintah <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="35">set arp.spoof.targets</code> merujuk pada <b data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="70">IP Address dari Mesin Korban (Ubuntu VM)</b> tempat kamu akan membuka <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="136">browser</i> untuk mensimulasikan pengguna biasa.</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Mari kita bedah cara kerja perintah tersebut agar kamu makin paham konsep <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="74">Man-in-the-Middle</i> (MITM):</p><h3 data-path-to-node="4">Konsep <code data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="7">arp.spoof.targets</code></h3><p data-path-to-node="5">Dalam serangan MITM dengan mode <i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="32">Full Duplex</i> (<code data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="45">set arp.spoof.fullduplex true</code>), kamu sebagai penyerang (Bettercap) harus menipu <b data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="125">dua pihak sekaligus</b> dan berdiri di tengah-tengah mereka.</p><p data-path-to-node="6">Perintah ini:
<code data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="14">set arp.spoof.targets 192.168.56.101,192.168.56.20</code></p><p data-path-to-node="7">Artinya kamu memerintahkan Bettercap untuk:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="8"><li><p data-path-to-node="8,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Menipu Mesin Korban (<code data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="21">192.168.56.101</code> - Ubuntu VM):</b> Bettercap akan berbisik ke Ubuntu, <i data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="85">"Hei Ubuntu, saya adalah server DVWA."</i></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="8,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Menipu Server Target (<code data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="22">192.168.56.20</code> - DVWA Container):</b> Bettercap akan berbisik ke DVWA, <i data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="88">"Hei DVWA, saya adalah komputer Ubuntu."</i></p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="9">Hasilnya? Ketika pengguna di Ubuntu mencoba <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="44">login</i> ke DVWA, lalu lintas datanya tidak langsung menuju server, melainkan <b data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="119">mampir dulu</b> ke mesin <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="140">attacker</i> kamu (Bettercap di <code data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="168">192.168.56.10</code>). Di sinilah kamu bisa menangkap <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="215">username</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="228">password</i> mereka.</p><hr data-path-to-node="10"><h3 data-path-to-node="11">⚠️ Tindakan Penting Sebelum Melanjutkan</h3><p data-path-to-node="12">Angka <code data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="6">192.168.56.101</code> yang ada di panduan sebelumnya hanyalah <b data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="61">contoh/asumsi</b> IP dari Ubuntu VM kamu.</p><p data-path-to-node="13">Sebelum kamu menekan <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="21">Enter</i> di terminal Bettercap, kamu <b data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="55">WAJIB</b> memastikan berapa IP asli dari Ubuntu VM kamu.</p><p data-path-to-node="14"><b data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="0">Langkah Pengecekan:</b></p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="15"><li><p data-path-to-node="15,0,0">Nyalakan dan masuk ke dalam <b data-path-to-node="15,0,0" data-index-in-node="28">Ubuntu VM</b> di VirtualBox kamu.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="15,1,0">Buka terminal di dalam Ubuntu VM tersebut.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="15,2,0">Ketik perintah: <code data-path-to-node="15,2,0" data-index-in-node="16">ip a</code> atau <code data-path-to-node="15,2,0" data-index-in-node="26">ifconfig</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="15,3,0">Cari IP address yang ada di rentang <code data-path-to-node="15,3,0" data-index-in-node="36">192.168.56.x</code> (biasanya pada interface <code data-path-to-node="15,3,0" data-index-in-node="74">enp0s8</code> atau sejenisnya).</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="16"><b data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="0">Jika IP Ubuntu VM kamu ternyata <code data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="32">192.168.56.105</code></b>, maka perintah di Bettercap harus kamu ubah menjadi:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-115 ng-star-inserted" gds-title-s ng-tns-c289529910-115 ng-star-inserted" style=""><span _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-115">Cuplikan kode</span><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="buttons class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Salin kode" mat-icon-button="" jslog="179062;track:generic_click,impression;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_c79edbeef19f80fd&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_09412829f86553d2&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]];mutable:true"><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----></div><!----><!----></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-115"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-115"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-115"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-115">set arp.spoof.targets 192.168.56.105,192.168.56.20
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="18"><i data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="0">(Kamu juga bisa memasukkan IP Juice Shop <code data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="41">.22</code> atau WebGoat <code data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="58">.21</code> sebagai target kedua jika ingin menguji serangan ke aplikasi tersebut).</i></p><hr data-path-to-node="19"><h3 data-path-to-node="20">Catatan Tambahan soal Peringatan di Terminal</h3><p data-path-to-node="21">Saya melihat ada pesan ini di terminal Bettercap kamu:
<code data-path-to-node="21" data-index-in-node="55">[12:26:32] [sys.log] [war] Could not detect gateway.</code></p><p data-path-to-node="22"><b data-path-to-node="22" data-index-in-node="0">Abaikan saja pesan ini.</b> Ini sangat wajar terjadi. Karena jaringan <code data-path-to-node="22" data-index-in-node="66">mitm-net</code> (Macvlan) yang kita buat ini adalah jaringan <i data-path-to-node="22" data-index-in-node="120">Host-Only</i> internal untuk simulasi lab, jaringan ini memang tidak memiliki <i data-path-to-node="22" data-index-in-node="194">gateway</i> asli (seperti <i data-path-to-node="22" data-index-in-node="216">router</i> internet). Serangan MITM internal antar mesin (Ubuntu ke Container) akan tetap berjalan dengan sempurna.</p><p data-path-to-node="23">Silakan cek IP Ubuntu VM kamu, sesuaikan targetnya, lalu jalankan <code data-path-to-node="23" data-index-in-node="66">arp.spoof on</code> dan <code data-path-to-node="23" data-index-in-node="83">net.sniff on</code>. Kabari saya jika kamu sudah berhasil menangkap <i data-path-to-node="23" data-index-in-node="144">traffic</i> pertamamu!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts complete"><!----><!----><!----><sources-list _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="sources-list ng-star-inserted"><overview-carousel _nghost-ng-c2960487965="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_e139eb3875e3dfcd" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_e139eb3875e3dfcd" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Sempurna! Rangkaian perintah itu berarti mesin <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="47">attacker</i> (Bettercap) kamu sekarang sudah aktif mencegat dan merekam paket data di jaringan. Serangan <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="148">Man-in-the-Middle</i> sedang berjalan secara <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="189">real-time</i>.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Sekarang adalah momen pembuktian (simulasi <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="43">Credential Harvesting</i>). Berikut adalah langkah eksekusi selanjutnya:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="2">1. Beralih ke Mesin Korban (Ubuntu VM)</h3><ul data-path-to-node="3"><li><p data-path-to-node="3,0,0">Masuk ke dalam layar Virtual Machine Ubuntu kamu.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="3,1,0">Buka aplikasi <i data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="14">browser</i> bawaan (seperti Firefox).</p></li></ul><h3 data-path-to-node="4">2. Hasilkan Lalu Lintas Data (<i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="30">Generate Traffic</i>)</h3><ul data-path-to-node="5"><li><p data-path-to-node="5,0,0">Akses <i data-path-to-node="5,0,0" data-index-in-node="6">website</i> target dengan mengetik alamat IP dari <i data-path-to-node="5,0,0" data-index-in-node="52">container</i> DVWA di <i data-path-to-node="5,0,0" data-index-in-node="70">address bar</i>: <code data-path-to-node="5,0,0" data-index-in-node="83">http://192.168.56.20</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="5,1,0"><i data-path-to-node="5,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Catatan Penting: Pastikan menggunakan <code data-path-to-node="5,1,0" data-index-in-node="38">http://</code> secara eksplisit, bukan <code data-path-to-node="5,1,0" data-index-in-node="70">https://</code>.</i></p></li></ul><h3 data-path-to-node="6">3. Lakukan Simulasi Login</h3><ul data-path-to-node="7"><li><p data-path-to-node="7,0,0">Saat halaman otentikasi DVWA terbuka, cobalah <i data-path-to-node="7,0,0" data-index-in-node="46">login</i> menggunakan kredensial bawaan sistem.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="7,1,0">Username: <code data-path-to-node="7,1,0" data-index-in-node="10">admin</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="7,2,0">Password: <code data-path-to-node="7,2,0" data-index-in-node="10">password</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="7,3,0">Tekan tombol <b data-path-to-node="7,3,0" data-index-in-node="13">Login</b>.</p></li></ul><h3 data-path-to-node="8">4. Panen Kredensial di Mesin Penyerang</h3><ul data-path-to-node="9"><li><p data-path-to-node="9,0,0">Segera kembali ke terminal Kali fisik kamu (tempat Bettercap sedang berjalan).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="9,1,0">Perhatikan <i data-path-to-node="9,1,0" data-index-in-node="11">output</i> log yang terus bergulir. Kamu akan melihat Bettercap berhasil membongkar paket data <i data-path-to-node="9,1,0" data-index-in-node="102">login</i> tersebut karena tidak dienkripsi.</p></li></ul><h3 data-path-to-node="10">👉 Output yang Diharapkan</h3><p data-path-to-node="11">Di terminal Bettercap, kamu akan menangkap log <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="47">sniffing</i> (biasanya ditandai dengan warna merah atau kuning) yang menampilkan rekaman <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="132">POST request</i> HTTP. Kamu akan melihat data sensitif terekspos dalam bentuk teks terang (<i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="219">plaintext</i>), kurang lebih seperti ini:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-125 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div ng-tns-c289529910-125"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-125"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-125"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-125">[net.sniff.http] 192.168.56.101:54321 -&gt; 192.168.56.20:80 POST /login.php
... username=admin&amp;password=password&amp;Login=Login ...
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="13">Jika baris <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="11">username</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="24">password</i> itu muncul, selamat! Kamu telah sukses melakukan demonstrasi <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="94">MITM</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="103">Credential Harvesting</i>. Ini adalah bukti visual yang sangat kuat untuk menjelaskan <b data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="185">mengapa protokol HTTP sangat rentan di jaringan lokal</b>.</p><p data-path-to-node="14">Pastikan kamu langsung menekan <code data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="31">Ctrl + Shift + PrtScn</code> atau menggunakan alat <i data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="75">snipping</i> untuk mengambil <i data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="100">screenshot</i> terminal tersebut. Gambar ini adalah aset krusial yang akan dimasukkan ke dalam dokumentasi <i data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="203">portfolio</i> CV kamu!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_fdb9543f9829cade" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_fdb9543f9829cade" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Oke, <b data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="5">stop prosesnya dulu!</b> Silakan ketik <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="40">arp.spoof off</code> lalu tekan Enter, atau tekan <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="83">Ctrl + C</code> untuk menghentikan <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="111">spam</i> log tersebut.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Pesan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="6">error</i> <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="12">[war] arp.spoof could not find spoof targets</code> itu artinya Bettercap sudah berteriak memanggil IP target di jaringan, tapi <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="133">tidak ada satupun mesin yang menjawab</b>. Ibaratnya, Bettercap mencoba menipu orang yang tidak ada di ruangan.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Ada 3 kemungkinan utama mengapa ini terjadi. Mari kita perbaiki satu per satu:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="3">1. IP Ubuntu VM Kamu Bukan <code data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="27">192.168.56.101</code></h3><p data-path-to-node="4">Seperti yang saya sebutkan di catatan sebelumnya, <code data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="50">192.168.56.101</code> itu <b data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="69">hanya IP contoh</b>. Jika IP asli Ubuntu VM kamu berbeda, Bettercap tidak akan bisa menemukannya.</p><ul data-path-to-node="5"><li><p data-path-to-node="5,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="5,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Solusi:</b> 1. Buka layar Ubuntu VM kamu.
2. Buka terminal di dalam Ubuntu, ketik <code data-path-to-node="5,0,0" data-index-in-node="78">ip a</code>.
3. Cari IP yang awalnya <code data-path-to-node="5,0,0" data-index-in-node="108">192.168.56.xxx</code>.
4. Gunakan IP tersebut untuk mengganti <code data-path-to-node="5,0,0" data-index-in-node="163">.101</code> di perintah Bettercap nanti. <i data-path-to-node="5,0,0" data-index-in-node="197">(Pastikan juga Ubuntu VM kamu sedang dalam keadaan menyala, ya!)</i></p></li></ul><h3 data-path-to-node="6">2. ARP Table Perlu "Dipancing" (Tes Ping)</h3><p data-path-to-node="7">Kadang-kadang, antarmuka jaringan Macvlan butuh "pemanasan" agar bisa mendeteksi <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="81">MAC Address</i> mesin lain di jaringan VirtualBox.</p><ul data-path-to-node="8"><li><p data-path-to-node="8,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Solusi:</b> Di dalam terminal <i data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="26">container</i> <i data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="36">attacker</i> kamu (boleh keluar dari Bettercap dulu dengan ngetik <code data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="98">exit</code>), lakukan tes <i data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="117">ping</i> ke target:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-135 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-135 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" jslog="223238;track:impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_fdb9543f9829cade&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_8a3c4e58c2249045&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]]" style="display: block;" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQhtANahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQ4QM"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block-decoration header-formatted gds-title-s ng-tns-c289529910-135 ng-star-inserted" style=""><span _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-135">Bash</span><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="buttons ng-tns-c289529910-135 ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Download kode" mat-icon-button="" mattooltip="Download kode" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Salin kode" mat-icon-button="" jslog="179062;track:generic_click,impression;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_fdb9543f9829cade&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_8a3c4e58c2249045&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]];mutable:true"><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="content_copy"></mat-icon><!----><span class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----></div><!----><!----></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-135"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-135"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-135"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-135">ping -c 3 192.168.56.20
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="8,0,2"><i data-path-to-node="8,0,2" data-index-in-node="0">(Ini untuk mengecek apakah container attacker bisa melihat container DVWA. Kalau hasilnya <code data-path-to-node="8,0,2" data-index-in-node="90">Destination Host Unreachable</code>, berarti ada yang salah dengan jaringannya).</i></p></li></ul><h3 data-path-to-node="9">3. Promiscuous Mode VirtualBox Belum "Allow All"</h3><p data-path-to-node="10">Ini adalah pengaturan krusial di VirtualBox yang sering terlewat. Jika ini ditolak, serangan <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="93">ARP Spoofing</i> Macvlan ke VM lain akan diblokir oleh VirtualBox.</p><ul data-path-to-node="11"><li><p data-path-to-node="11,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="11,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Solusi:</b></p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="11,0,1"><li><p data-path-to-node="11,0,1,0,0">Buka VirtualBox (aplikasi utamanya).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="11,0,1,1,0">Buka <b data-path-to-node="11,0,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="5">File</b> &gt; <b data-path-to-node="11,0,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="12">Tools</b> &gt; <b data-path-to-node="11,0,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="20">Network Manager</b> (atau Host Network Manager).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="11,0,1,2,0">Pilih <code data-path-to-node="11,0,1,2,0" data-index-in-node="6">vboxnet0</code>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="11,0,1,3,0">Di bagian bawah (tab Adapter), cari pengaturan <b data-path-to-node="11,0,1,3,0" data-index-in-node="47">Promiscuous Mode</b>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="11,0,1,4,0">Pastikan nilainya diubah menjadi <b data-path-to-node="11,0,1,4,0" data-index-in-node="33">Allow All</b>.</p></li></ol></li></ul><hr data-path-to-node="12"><p data-path-to-node="13"><b data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="0">Langkah Kamu Selanjutnya:</b>
Coba pastikan dulu berapa IP Address asli dari Ubuntu VM kamu menggunakan perintah <code data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="109">ip a</code> di dalam Ubuntunya. Kalau sudah ketemu IP-nya, kabari saya, biar kita susun ulang perintah Bettercap-nya!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text contains-extensions-response processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_dbf1613b31ba8384" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_dbf1613b31ba8384" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Gambar yang kamu kirim menunjukkan konfigurasi <b data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="47">Host Network Manager</b>. Konfigurasi IP <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="84">192.168.56.1</code> dan <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="101">Netmask</i> <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="109">255.255.255.0</code> di situ <b data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="131">sudah sangat benar</b>.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Pesan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="6">error</i> <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="12">Destination Host Unreachable</code> saat melakukan tes <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="60">ping</i> berarti <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="73">container attacker</i> kamu sudah mencoba mengirim sinyal ke jaringan, tapi jalurnya terputus atau tidak ada yang membalas.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Dalam arsitektur <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="17">Docker Macvlan</i> yang dikawinkan dengan VirtualBox, ada <b data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="71">3 penyebab utama</b> mengapa ini terjadi. Mari kita perbaiki satu per satu:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="3">1. Interface <code data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="13">vboxnet0</code> Sedang "Tidur" (DOWN)</h3><p data-path-to-node="4">Ini adalah "penyakit" bawaan VirtualBox di Linux. Jika tidak ada mesin virtual (VM) yang sedang menyala aktif, VirtualBox sering kali mematikan antarmuka <code data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="154">vboxnet0</code> secara otomatis. Jika <code data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="185">vboxnet0</code> mati, maka seluruh <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="213">container</i> Macvlan yang menempel padanya akan terisolasi total.</p><p data-path-to-node="5"><b data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="0">Cara Mengecek &amp; Memperbaikinya:</b></p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="6"><li><p data-path-to-node="6,0,0">Buka terminal baru di Kali fisik kamu (di luar <i data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="47">container</i>).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,1,0">Ketik perintah ini untuk mengecek statusnya:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-158 </code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="6,1,2"><i data-path-to-node="6,1,2" data-index-in-node="0">Perhatikan baris pertama outputnya. Jika ada tulisan <code data-path-to-node="6,1,2" data-index-in-node="53">&lt;BROADCAST,MULTICAST&gt;</code> tanpa tulisan <code data-path-to-node="6,1,2" data-index-in-node="89">UP</code>, berarti dia sedang mati.</i></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,2,0">Bangunkan antarmuka tersebut secara paksa:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-159 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-159">sudo ip link <span class="hljs-built_in">set</span> vboxnet0 up
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,3,0"><b data-path-to-node="6,3,0" data-index-in-node="0">Paling Penting:</b> Pastikan <b data-path-to-node="6,3,0" data-index-in-node="25">Ubuntu VM</b> kamu dalam keadaan <b data-path-to-node="6,3,0" data-index-in-node="54">menyala (Running)</b>. VirtualBox butuh pancingan mesin hidup agar jalurnya terbuka.</p></li></ol><h3 data-path-to-node="7">2. Salah Tempat Mengatur Promiscuous Mode</h3><p data-path-to-node="8">Pengaturan <i data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="11">Promiscuous Mode</i> <b data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="28">tidak ada</b> di menu <i data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="46">Host Network Manager</i> yang kamu kirim fotonya. Pengaturan itu ada di level spesifik masing-masing VM agar mengizinkan lalu lintas data yang bukan miliknya masuk ke dalam mesin.</p><p data-path-to-node="9"><b data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="0">Cara Mengaturnya:</b></p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="10"><li><p data-path-to-node="10,0,0">Buka aplikasi VirtualBox (pastikan Ubuntu VM dalam keadaan mati sementara jika ingin mengubah pengaturan).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="10,1,0">Klik kanan pada <b data-path-to-node="10,1,0" data-index-in-node="16">Ubuntu VM</b> &gt; Pilih <b data-path-to-node="10,1,0" data-index-in-node="34">Settings</b> (Pengaturan).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="10,2,0">Masuk ke menu <b data-path-to-node="10,2,0" data-index-in-node="14">Network</b> (Jaringan).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="10,3,0">Pastikan <b data-path-to-node="10,3,0" data-index-in-node="9">Adapter 1</b> tersetting ke <b data-path-to-node="10,3,0" data-index-in-node="33">Host-Only Adapter</b> dengan nama <code data-path-to-node="10,3,0" data-index-in-node="63">vboxnet0</code>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="10,4,0">Klik tanda panah kecil bertuliskan <b data-path-to-node="10,4,0" data-index-in-node="35">Advanced</b> (Tingkat Lanjut).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="10,5,0">Pada bagian <b data-path-to-node="10,5,0" data-index-in-node="12">Promiscuous Mode</b>, ubah dari <i data-path-to-node="10,5,0" data-index-in-node="40">Deny</i> menjadi <b data-path-to-node="10,5,0" data-index-in-node="53">Allow All</b> (Izinkan Semua).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="10,6,0">Simpan, lalu nyalakan kembali Ubuntu VM kamu.</p></li></ol><h3 data-path-to-node="11">3. Container DVWA Berhenti Berjalan</h3><p data-path-to-node="12">Terkadang, karena kegagalan jaringan sementara, <i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="48">container</i> web yang sudah kita <i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="78">deploy</i> tadi berhenti secara otomatis (<i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="116">exited</i>).</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="13"><li><p data-path-to-node="13,0,0">Buka terminal di Kali Linux.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,1,0">Cek apakah DVWA dan WebGoat masih hidup dengan perintah:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-160 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div langsung mengeksekusi serangan <code data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="202">arp.spoof</code>-nya!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_64d4f41a6662d5c1" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_64d4f41a6662d5c1" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Ah, saya langsung melihat penyebabnya dari <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="43">prompt</i> terminal kamu!</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Coba perhatikan baris ini:
<code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="27">┌──(miftahul㉿valleys)-[~]</code></p><p data-path-to-node="2">Itu artinya kamu menjalankan perintah <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="38">ping</code> dari <b data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="48">terminal Kali Linux fisik (host)</b> kamu, bukan dari dalam <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="104">container</i> attacker.</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Ingat satu aturan/batasan penting dari Docker Macvlan yang sempat saya singgung di awal?</p><blockquote data-path-to-node="4"><p data-path-to-node="4,0"><b data-path-to-node="4,0" data-index-in-node="0">Macvlan memblokir komunikasi Host ↔ Container secara default.</b> Mesin induk (Kali fisik kamu yang IP-nya <code data-path-to-node="4,0" data-index-in-node="103">192.168.56.1</code>) memang sengaja <b data-path-to-node="4,0" data-index-in-node="132">diblokir</b> oleh kernel Linux untuk berbicara langsung dengan <i data-path-to-node="4,0" data-index-in-node="191">container</i> DVWA (<code data-path-to-node="4,0" data-index-in-node="207">.20</code>). Jadi, <i data-path-to-node="4,0" data-index-in-node="219">error</i> <code data-path-to-node="4,0" data-index-in-node="225">Destination Host Unreachable</code> dari <i data-path-to-node="4,0" data-index-in-node="259">host</i> ini sebenarnya <b data-path-to-node="4,0" data-index-in-node="279">sangat normal dan memang desain bawaan Macvlan</b>.</p></blockquote><h3 data-path-to-node="5">Langkah Perbaikan yang Benar</h3><p data-path-to-node="6">Untuk memastikan jalurnya aman, tes <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="36">ping</i> <b data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="41">harus dilakukan dari dalam container attacker</b> (mesin penyerang) atau dari <b data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="115">Ubuntu VM</b> (mesin korban).</p><p data-path-to-node="7">Mari kita lakukan tes dari dalam <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="33">container</i> attacker:</p><p data-path-to-node="8"><b data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="0">1. Masuk ke dalam Container Attacker</b>
Jika kamu sedang berada di terminal Kali fisik, masuklah ke dalam <i data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="103">container</i> penyerang dengan perintah:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-175 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-175 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" jslog="223238;track:impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_64d4f41a6662d5c1&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_f6f989b60059847f&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]]" </code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="10"><i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="0">(Prompt terminal kamu akan berubah, biasanya hanya menampilkan root@).</i></p><p data-path-to-node="11"><b data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="0">2. Lakukan Tes Ping Kembali</b>
Dari dalam <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="39">container</i> tersebut, jalankan:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-176 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div jslog="179062;track:generic_click,impression;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_64d4f41a6662d5c1&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_f6f989b60059847f&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]];mutable:true"><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols ng-tns-c289529910-176"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-176"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-176"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-176">ping -c 3 192.168.56.20
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="13">Jika ini berhasil, kamu akan melihat <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="37">output</i> balasan waktu dalam milidetik (ms).</p><hr data-path-to-node="14"><h3 data-path-to-node="15">Fokus ke Tujuan Utama: Mesin Korban (Ubuntu VM)</h3><p data-path-to-node="16">Sejujurnya, kamu tidak perlu terlalu pusing memikirkan apakah Kali fisik kamu bisa nge-ping DVWA atau tidak, karena <b data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="116">target simulasi kita adalah pengguna di Ubuntu VM</b>.</p><p data-path-to-node="17">Apakah kamu sudah menyalakan <b data-path-to-node="17" data-index-in-node="29">Ubuntu VM</b> di VirtualBox?
Jika sudah:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="18"><li><p data-path-to-node="18,0,0">Buka terminal di dalam <b data-path-to-node="18,0,0" data-index-in-node="23">Ubuntu VM</b> tersebut.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="18,1,0">Cek IP-nya dengan perintah <code data-path-to-node="18,1,0" data-index-in-node="27">ip a</code>. Berapa IP-nya? (Ingat, harus berada di <code data-path-to-node="18,1,0" data-index-in-node="72">192.168.56.xxx</code>).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="18,2,0">Coba lakukan <i data-path-to-node="18,2,0" data-index-in-node="13">ping</i> ke DVWA dari dalam Ubuntu: <code data-path-to-node="18,2,0" data-index-in-node="45">ping -c 3 192.168.56.20</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="18,3,0">Coba buka <i data-path-to-node="18,3,0" data-index-in-node="10">browser</i> di Ubuntu dan akses <code data-path-to-node="18,3,0" data-index-in-node="38">http://192.168.56.20</code>. Apakah halaman <i data-path-to-node="18,3,0" data-index-in-node="75">login</i> DVWA terbuka?</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="19">Jika halaman DVWA sudah bisa terbuka di Ubuntu, infrastruktur lab kamu sudah 100% sempurna! Kita tinggal memasukkan IP Ubuntu tersebut ke perintah Bettercap dan memulai serangannya.</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_f5117de66149fc97" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_f5117de66149fc97" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Mantap! Hasil <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="14">ping</i> dengan <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="26">0% packet loss</code> itu adalah kabar yang sangat bagus.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Artinya jaringan Macvlan kamu sudah berfungsi dengan sempurna. <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="63">Container attacker</i> kamu (mesin penyerang) sekarang sudah bisa melihat dan berkomunikasi langsung dengan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="167">container</i> DVWA (server target) di dalam subnet <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="214">192.168.56.x</code>.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Sekarang kita sudah berada di garis <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="36">finish</i> untuk melakukan serangan utamanya. Karena kamu sudah berada di dalam terminal <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="121">container attacker</i> (<code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="141">83c14daa7f63:/app#</code>), mari kita eksekusi <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="181">Credential Harvesting</i>!</p><h3 data-path-to-node="3">Langkah 1: Eksekusi Bettercap</h3><p data-path-to-node="4">Dari dalam terminal <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="20">container attacker</i> yang sedang terbuka itu, jalankan Bettercap menggunakan antarmuka jaringan utama <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="120">container</i> (biasanya <code data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="140">eth0</code>):</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-189 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-189 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation"
