ng-tns-c289529910-189"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-189"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-189"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-189">bettercap -iface eth0
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><h3 data-path-to-node="6">Langkah 2: Mulai Serangan ARP Spoofing</h3><p data-path-to-node="7">Setelah masuk ke <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="17">prompt</i> Bettercap (<code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="35">192.168.56.0/24 &gt; 192.168.56.10 »</code>), jalankan urutan perintah ini.</p><p data-path-to-node="8"><b data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="0">(PENTING: Ganti tulisan <code data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="24">&lt;IP_UBUNTU_KAMU&gt;</code> dengan IP Address asli dari Ubuntu VM kamu yang sedang menyala!)</b></p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-190 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-190 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" jslog="223238;track:impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_f5117de66149fc97&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_875523b1376c522c&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]]" style="display: block;" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQhtANahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQnQU"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block-decoration header-formatted gds-title-s ng-tns-c289529910-190 ng-star-inserted" style=""><span _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-190">Cuplikan kode</span><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="buttons ng-tns-c289529910-190 ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Download kode" mat-icon-button="" mattooltip="Download kode" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Salin kode" mat-icon-button="" jslog="179062;track:generic_click,impression;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_f5117de66149fc97&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_875523b1376c522c&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]];mutable:true"><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="content_copy"></mat-icon><!----><span class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----></div><!----><!----></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-190"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-190"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-190"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-190">set arp.spoof.fullduplex true
set arp.spoof.internal true
set arp.spoof.targets &lt;IP_UBUNTU_KAMU&gt;,192.168.56.20
arp.spoof on
net.sniff on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="10"><i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="0">Jika kamu memasukkan IP Ubuntu dengan benar, kali ini tidak akan ada pesan error "could not find spoof targets".</i></p><h3 data-path-to-node="11">Langkah 3: Berperan Sebagai Korban (Generate Traffic)</h3><p data-path-to-node="12">Biarkan terminal Bettercap kamu berjalan dan merekam paket. Sekarang, beralihlah ke layar <b data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="90">Ubuntu VM</b>:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="13"><li><p data-path-to-node="13,0,0">Buka aplikasi <i data-path-to-node="13,0,0" data-index-in-node="14">browser</i> di Ubuntu.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,1,0">Ketik URL target di <i data-path-to-node="13,1,0" data-index-in-node="20">address bar</i>: <code data-path-to-node="13,1,0" data-index-in-node="33">http://192.168.56.20</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,2,0">Saat halaman <i data-path-to-node="13,2,0" data-index-in-node="13">login</i> DVWA muncul, masukkan:</p><ul data-path-to-node="13,2,1"><li><p data-path-to-node="13,2,1,0,0">Username: <code data-path-to-node="13,2,1,0,0" data-index-in-node="10">admin</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,2,1,1,0">Password: <code data-path-to-node="13,2,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="10">password</code></p></li></ul></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,3,0">Klik <b data-path-to-node="13,3,0" data-index-in-node="5">Login</b>.</p></li></ol><h3 data-path-to-node="14">Langkah 4: Tangkap Hasilnya!</h3><p data-path-to-node="15">Segera kembali ke terminal fisik Kali Linux kamu (tempat Bettercap berjalan).</p><p data-path-to-node="16">Perhatikan log yang muncul. Kamu seharusnya melihat baris berwarna merah/kuning dari <code data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="85">[net.sniff.http]</code> yang membongkar <i data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="118">POST request</i> berisi <i data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="138">username</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="151">password</i> yang baru saja diketik oleh korban.</p><p data-path-to-node="17">Jangan lupa <i data-path-to-node="17" data-index-in-node="12">screenshot</i> hasilnya jika berhasil, karena itu adalah aset portfolio utama kamu! Kabari saya kalau datanya sudah berhasil disadap!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_27e737b5f3e887b1" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_27e737b5f3e887b1" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Ups, wajar banget! Ini terjadi karena ada sedikit kesalahpahaman tentang cara kerja <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="84">image</i> <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="90">bettercap/bettercap</code> yang kamu unduh.</p><p data-path-to-node="1"><i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="0">Image</i> resmi Bettercap itu didesain khusus (lewat <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="49">Entrypoint</i>) agar langsung menjalankan program Bettercap begitu <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="112">container</i> menyala. Jadi, ketika kamu masuk menggunakan <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="167">/bin/bash</code>, kamu malah "membypass" program utamanya, sehingga terminal kebingungan mencari letak <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="263">file</i> eksekusi Bettercap-nya.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Mari kita kembali ke jalur yang paling bersih dan pasti berhasil. Ikuti urutan ini:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="3">1. Keluar dari Shell Container</h3><p data-path-to-node="4">Ketik perintah ini untuk keluar dari terminal <code data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="46">/app#</code> tersebut:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-209 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div Jalankan Ulang Bettercap Secara Langsung (Interactive)</h3><p data-path-to-node="10">Sekarang, kita jalankan kembali <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="32">container</i>-nya persis seperti saat kamu berhasil pertama kali. Perintah ini akan langsung melemparkanmu ke dalam program Bettercap. <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="163">Copy-paste</i> ini:</p><response-element class="" ng-tns-c289529910-211"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-211"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-211"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-211">docker run -it \
  --name attacker \
  --network mitm-net \
  --ip 192.168.56.10 \
  --cap-add NET_ADMIN \
  --cap-add NET_RAW \
  bettercap/bettercap \
  -iface eth0
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><h3 data-path-to-node="12">4. Eksekusi MITM!</h3><p data-path-to-node="13">Jika layar terminalmu sudah berubah menjadi <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="44">prompt</i> hijau Bettercap (seperti <code data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="76">192.168.56.0/24 &gt; 192.168.56.10 »</code>), artinya kamu sudah siap tempur.</p><p data-path-to-node="14">Langsung masukkan urutan mantra ini (ingat, ganti <code data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="50">&lt;IP_UBUNTU&gt;</code> dengan IP dari Ubuntu VM kamu):</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-212 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div ng-tns-c289529910-212"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-212"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-212"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-212">set arp.spoof.fullduplex true
set arp.spoof.internal true
set arp.spoof.targets &lt;IP_UBUNTU&gt;,192.168.56.20
arp.spoof on
net.sniff on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="16">Setelah itu, silakan buka <i data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="26">browser</i> di Ubuntu VM, <i data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="48">login</i> ke <code data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="57">http://192.168.56.20</code> dengan <code data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="85">admin</code> / <code data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="93">password</code>, dan lihat kredensialnya tertangkap basah di terminal Bettercap kamu!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts ng-star-inserted" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" xapautoid="" class="model-thoughts ng-tns-c35387575-215" id="xap-auto-id-15"><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" jslog="247951;track:generic_click,impression"><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-button__ripple"></span><span class="mdc-button__label"><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" class="thoughts-header-button-content animated-content"><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" role="status" class="thoughts-header-button-label ng-tns-c35387575-215"><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" class="ng-tns-c35387575-215 ng-star-inserted">Tampilkan alur berpikir</span><!----></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" class="thoughts-header-button-icons ng-tns-c35387575-215"><!----><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" role="img" fonticon="expand_more" class="mat-icon notranslate thoughts-header-button-icon ng-tns-c35387575-215 google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color ng-star-inserted" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="expand_more"></mat-icon><!----></div></div></span><!----><span class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button></div><!----><!----></div></model-thoughts><!----></div><!----></div><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><h2 _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_5281e3baf2474186" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_5281e3baf2474186" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Tenang, jangan panik! Itu <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="26">error</i> yang sangat umum dan solusinya sebenarnya sederhana.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Mari kita bahas dengan analogi yang mudah dipahami.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Bayangkan Bettercap (mesin <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="27">attacker</i> kamu) sedang berdiri di tengah ruangan jaringan. Saat kamu mengetik perintah <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="113">set arp.spoof.targets 192.168.56.101</code>, kamu menyuruh Bettercap: <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="176">"Coba panggil orang yang namanya 192.168.56.101, lalu tipu dia."</i></p><p data-path-to-node="3">Bettercap pun berteriak memanggil IP tersebut berulang-ulang, tapi <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="67">tidak ada satupun mesin yang menyahut</b>. Karena "dicuekin", Bettercap jadi kebingungan dan terus mengeluarkan <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="175">error</i> <code data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="181">"could not find spoof targets"</code> (tidak bisa menemukan target).</p><p data-path-to-node="4">Ada 3 alasan utama mengapa mesin Ubuntu VM kamu tidak menjawab panggilan Bettercap. Mari kita periksa satu per satu:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="5">1. Angka IP-nya Salah (Penyebab Paling Sering)</h3><p data-path-to-node="6">Angka <code data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="6">192.168.56.101</code> di perintah sebelumnya itu <b data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="48">hanya angka tebakan/contoh</b> dari saya. Sangat besar kemungkinannya IP asli Ubuntu VM kamu bukan itu. Jika Bettercap memanggil nama yang salah, tentu saja Ubuntu tidak akan merespons.</p><p data-path-to-node="7"><b data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="0">Solusi:</b></p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="8"><li><p data-path-to-node="8,0,0">Nyalakan dan masuk ke <b data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="22">Ubuntu VM</b> di VirtualBox kamu.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="8,1,0">Buka terminal di dalam Ubuntu, ketik perintah <code data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="46">ip a</code>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="8,2,0">Cari alamat IP yang berawalan <code data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="30">192.168.56...</code> (misalnya <code data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="54">.102</code> atau <code data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="64">.105</code>).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="8,3,0">Nah, IP itulah yang harus kamu masukkan ke dalam perintah Bettercap nanti!</p></li></ol><h3 data-path-to-node="9">2. Jalur Diblokir oleh VirtualBox</h3><p data-path-to-node="10">Agar serangan MITM berhasil, VirtualBox harus mengizinkan paket data "nyasar" masuk ke mesin yang bukan tujuannya. Jika fitur ini tertutup, teriakan Bettercap tadi akan dicegat oleh VirtualBox dan tidak pernah sampai ke telinga Ubuntu.</p><p data-path-to-node="11"><b data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="0">Solusi:</b></p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="12"><li><p data-path-to-node="12,0,0">Di layar utama VirtualBox, klik kanan pada <b data-path-to-node="12,0,0" data-index-in-node="43">Ubuntu VM</b> kamu &gt; <b data-path-to-node="12,0,0" data-index-in-node="60">Settings</b> (Pengaturan).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="12,1,0">Buka menu <b data-path-to-node="12,1,0" data-index-in-node="10">Network</b> (Jaringan).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="12,2,0">Pastikan <b data-path-to-node="12,2,0" data-index-in-node="9">Adapter 1</b> adalah <b data-path-to-node="12,2,0" data-index-in-node="26">Host-Only Adapter</b> (<code data-path-to-node="12,2,0" data-index-in-node="45">vboxnet0</code>).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="12,3,0">Klik tombol <b data-path-to-node="12,3,0" data-index-in-node="12">Advanced</b> (Tingkat Lanjut).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="12,4,0">Pada bagian <b data-path-to-node="12,4,0" data-index-in-node="12">Promiscuous Mode</b>, pastikan pilihannya adalah <b data-path-to-node="12,4,0" data-index-in-node="57">Allow All</b> (Izinkan Semua). Jika tidak <i data-path-to-node="12,4,0" data-index-in-node="95">Allow All</i>, ARP Spoofing tidak akan pernah berhasil.</p></li></ol><h3 data-path-to-node="13">3. Jaringan Masih "Dingin"</h3><p data-path-to-node="14">Terkadang, jaringan <i data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="20">Macvlan</i> Docker dan VirtualBox butuh "pemanasan" agar saling mengenali. Mereka harus saling bersalaman dulu secara resmi sebelum Bettercap bisa mulai menipu.</p><p data-path-to-node="15"><b data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="0">Solusi:</b>
Dari dalam terminal <i data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="28">container attacker</i> (tempat kamu menjalankan Bettercap), coba lakukan <i data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="97">ping</i> ke IP Ubuntu VM kamu:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-222 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-222 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" style="display: block;" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQhtANahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQ0QU"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block-decoration header-formatted gds-title-s ng-tns-c289529910-222 ng-star-inserted" style=""><span _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-222">Bash</span><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="buttons class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----></div><!----><!----></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-222"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-222"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-222"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-222">ping -c 3 &lt;IP_ASLI_UBUNTU_KAMU&gt;
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="17"><i data-path-to-node="17" data-index-in-node="0">(Kalau hasil ping-nya merespons dengan waktu <code data-path-to-node="17" data-index-in-node="45">0.xxx ms</code>, berarti jalurnya sudah terbuka sempurna).</i></p><hr data-path-to-node="18"><h3 data-path-to-node="19">Apa yang harus kamu lakukan sekarang?</h3><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="20"><li><p data-path-to-node="20,0,0">Tekan <code data-path-to-node="20,0,0" data-index-in-node="6">Ctrl + C</code> dulu di terminal Bettercap kamu untuk menghentikan <i data-path-to-node="20,0,0" data-index-in-node="66">error</i> yang berulang-ulang.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="20,1,0">Cek <b data-path-to-node="20,1,0" data-index-in-node="4">IP asli Ubuntu VM</b> kamu dan pastikan <b data-path-to-node="20,1,0" data-index-in-node="40">Promiscuous Mode</b> sudah <code data-path-to-node="20,1,0" data-index-in-node="63">Allow All</code>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="20,2,0">Kasih tahu saya berapa IP asli Ubuntu kamu, nanti saya buatkan perintah Bettercap yang sudah disesuaikan dengan angkamu!</p></li></ol></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts data-path-to-node="1">Berikut adalah panduan langkah demi langkah dari awal sampai kamu mendapatkan buktinya:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="2">Langkah 1: Jalankan Mesin Penyerang (Bettercap)</h3><p data-path-to-node="3">Jika kamu sudah menutup terminal sebelumnya, buka terminal baru di Kali fisik kamu dan jalankan <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="96">container attacker</i>-nya dengan perintah ini:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-235 ng-star-inserted" ng-tns-c289529910-235"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-235"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-235"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-235">docker run -it --rm \
  --name attacker \
  --network mitm-net \
  --ip 192.168.56.10 \
  --cap-add NET_ADMIN \
  --cap-add NET_RAW \
  bettercap/bettercap \
  -iface eth0
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="5"><i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="0">(Catatan: Tambahan <code data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="19">--rm</code> akan otomatis menghapus container ini setelah kamu keluar nanti, biar sistemmu tetap bersih).</i></p><h3 data-path-to-node="6">Langkah 2: Mulai Serangan Man-in-the-Middle (MITM)</h3><p data-path-to-node="7" id="p-rc_7c457479eb6503f0-89"><span data-path-to-node="7,0"><span class="citation-147"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="7,1"><span class="citation-147">Setelah layar berubah menjadi </span><i data-path-to-node="7,1" data-index-in-node="30"><span class="citation-147">prompt</span></i><span class="citation-147"> hijau milik Bettercap (</span><code data-path-to-node="7,1" data-index-in-node="60"><span class="citation-147">192.168.56.0/24 &gt; 192.168.56.10 »</span></code><span class="citation-147">), ketik perintah berikut satu per satu</span></span><span data-path-to-node="7,2"><span class="citation-147 citation-end-147"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="2"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="2"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="2"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="2"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="7,3">.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button multiple-button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. kamu yang sebenarnya (misal: <code data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="88">192.168.56.105</code>).</p><response-element class="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-236">set arp.spoof.fullduplex true
set arp.spoof.internal true
set arp.spoof.targets &lt;IP_UBUNTU_ASLI&gt;,192.168.56.20
arp.spoof on
net.sniff on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="10" id="p-rc_7c457479eb6503f0-90"><span data-path-to-node="10,0"><span class="citation-146"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="10,1"><span class="citation-146">Saat kamu menekan </span><i data-path-to-node="10,1" data-index-in-node="18"><span class="citation-146">Enter</span></i><span class="citation-146"> di </span><code data-path-to-node="10,1" data-index-in-node="27"><span class="citation-146">net.sniff on</span></code><span class="citation-146">, Bettercap akan mulai menyadap data</span></span><span data-path-to-node="10,2"><span class="citation-146 citation-end-146"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="3"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="10,3">. Kamu akan mendapati baris log baru dari <code data-path-to-node="16,0" data-index-in-node="65">[net.sniff.http]</code> (biasanya berwarna merah atau kuning terang). </span><span data-path-to-node="16,1"><span class="citation-140"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="16,2"><span class="citation-140">Di sana, kamu akan melihat dengan jelas tangkapan data rahasia (</span><i data-path-to-node="16,2" data-index-in-node="64"><span class="citation-140">credential capture</span></i><span class="citation-140">)</span></span><span data-path-to-node="16,3"><span class="citation-140 citation-end-140"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="9"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="9"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="9"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="9"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="16,4">:</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button multiple-button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. class="ng-tns-c35387575-239 ng-star-inserted">Tampilkan alur berpikir</span><!----></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" class="thoughts-header-button-icons ng-tns-c35387575-239"><!----><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_412ef0ac787adfa3" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_412ef0ac787adfa3" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Kasus seperti ini sangat wajar terjadi dalam simulasi jaringan L2 (Layer 2) yang kompleks.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Kondisinya sekarang: <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="21">Container</i> DVWA terbukti menyala sehat di dalam Docker, tetapi Ubuntu VM tidak tahu jalan menuju ke sana. Karena Ubuntu VM mendapatkan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="155">error</i> <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="161">Destination Host Unreachable</code> (bukan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="197">Request Timeout</i>), ini biasanya berarti <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="236">proses pencarian alamat MAC (ARP Request) dari Ubuntu gagal di tengah jalan</b>, atau <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="318">Ubuntu kebingungan mau mengirim lewat jalur mana</b>.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Mari kita pecahkan "tembok gaib" yang menghalangi komunikasi Ubuntu dan DVWA dengan 3 langkah jitu ini:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="3">1. Paksa Promiscuous Mode di Level Host (Kali Linux)</h3><p data-path-to-node="4">Meskipun kamu sudah mengaktifkan <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="33">Allow All</i> di pengaturan Ubuntu VM, terkadang <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="78">kernel</i> utama Kali Linux kamu masih memblokir <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="123">traffic</i> Macvlan yang lewat di antarmuka <code data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="163">vboxnet0</code>. Kita harus memaksanya terbuka lebar.</p><p data-path-to-node="5">Buka terminal di <b data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="17">Kali Linux (fisik)</b> kamu, dan jalankan perintah ini:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-249 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-249 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" jslog="223238;track:impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_412ef0ac787adfa3&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_e594fe59c1f9caaf&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]]" style="display: block;" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQhtANahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQlgY"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block-decoration header-formatted gds-title-s ng-tns-c289529910-249 ng-star-inserted" style=""><span _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-249">Bash</span><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="buttons ng-tns-c289529910-249 ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Download kode" mat-icon-button="" mattooltip="Download kode" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-button-base mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger download-button ng-tns-c289529910-249 mat-unthemed ng-star-inserted" mat-ripple-loader-uninitialized="" mat-ripple-loader-class-name="mat-mdc-button-ripple" mat-ripple-loader-centered=""><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="download" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="download"></mat-icon><!----><span class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Salin kode" mat-icon-button="" mattooltip="Salin kode" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-button-base mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger copy-button ng-tns-c289529910-249 mat-unthemed ng-star-inserted" mat-ripple-loader-uninitialized="" mat-ripple-loader-class-name="mat-mdc-button-ripple" mat-ripple-loader-centered="" jslog="179062;track:generic_click,impression;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_412ef0ac787adfa3&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_e594fe59c1f9caaf&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]];mutable:true"><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="content_copy"></mat-icon><!----><span class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----></div><!----><!----></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-249"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-249"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-249"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-249">sudo ip link <span class="hljs-built_in">set</span> vboxnet0 promisc on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="7"><i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="0">(Perintah ini akan menjadi "magic fix" agar kabel virtual <code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="58">vboxnet0</code> mau mengantar paket yang bukan ditujukan untuk host-nya sendiri).</i></p><h3 data-path-to-node="8">2. Cek Nama "Pintu" Jaringan di Ubuntu VM</h3><p data-path-to-node="9">Terkadang Ubuntu punya dua antarmuka jaringan (misal: satu NAT untuk internet, satu Host-Only untuk lab). Jika dia mencoba melempar <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="132">ping</i> ke saluran internet, pasti akan <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="169">Unreachable</i>.</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="10"><li><p data-path-to-node="10,0,0">Masuk ke terminal <b data-path-to-node="10,0,0" data-index-in-node="18">Ubuntu VM</b> kamu.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="10,1,0">Ketik perintah: <code data-path-to-node="10,1,0" data-index-in-node="16">ip a</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="10,2,0">Cari antarmuka yang memegang IP <code data-path-to-node="10,2,0" data-index-in-node="32">192.168.56.xxx</code>. Biasanya namanya adalah <b data-path-to-node="10,2,0" data-index-in-node="72"><code data-path-to-node="10,2,0" data-index-in-node="72">enp0s8</code></b> atau <b data-path-to-node="10,2,0" data-index-in-node="84"><code data-path-to-node="10,2,0" data-index-in-node="84">eth1</code></b>. (Catat nama ini).</p></li></ol><h3 data-path-to-node="11">3. Tembak Ping dari Pintu yang Benar</h3><p data-path-to-node="12">Masih di dalam terminal <b data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="24">Ubuntu VM</b>, coba paksa Ubuntu untuk mengirim <i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="68">ping</i> secara spesifik melalui antarmuka Host-Only tersebut.</p><p data-path-to-node="13">Jika nama antarmukanya adalah <code data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="30">enp0s8</code>, gunakan perintah ini:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-250 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-250 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" jslog="223238;track:impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_412ef0ac787adfa3&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_e594fe59c1f9caaf&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]]" style="display: block;" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQhtANahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQlwY"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block-decoration header-formatted gds-title-s ng-tns-c289529910-250 ng-star-inserted" style=""><span _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-250">Bash</span><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="buttons ng-tns-c289529910-250 ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Download kode" mat-icon-button="" mattooltip="Download kode" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-button-base mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger download-button ng-tns-c289529910-250 mat-unthemed ng-star-inserted" mat-ripple-loader-uninitialized="" mat-ripple-loader-class-name="mat-mdc-button-ripple" mat-ripple-loader-centered=""><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="download" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="download"></mat-icon><!----><span class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Salin kode" mat-icon-button="" jslog="179062;track:generic_click,impression;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_412ef0ac787adfa3&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_e594fe59c1f9caaf&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]];mutable:true"><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="content_copy"></mat-icon><!----><span class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----></div><!----><!----></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-250"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-250"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-250"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-250">ping -I enp0s8 -c 3 192.168.56.20
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="15"><i data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="0">(Perhatikan huruf <code data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="18">-I</code> besar, itu adalah singkatan dari Interface).</i></p><hr data-path-to-node="16"><h3 data-path-to-node="17">Momen Pembuktian</h3><p data-path-to-node="18">Jika hasil ping-nya berubah dari <code data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="33">Unreachable</code> menjadi waktu dalam <i data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="65">milisecond</i> (misal: <code data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="84">time=0.45 ms</code>), <b data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="99">BINGO!</b> Jalurnya sudah terbuka sempurna.</p><p data-path-to-node="19">Jika sudah tembus, kamu tinggal mengulangi skenario eksekusi utamanya:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="20"><li><p data-path-to-node="20,0,0">Jalankan <code data-path-to-node="20,0,0" data-index-in-node="9">bettercap -iface eth0</code> di <i data-path-to-node="20,0,0" data-index-in-node="34">container</i> attacker.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="20,1,0">Setel target <code data-path-to-node="20,1,0" data-index-in-node="13">arp.spoof</code> dengan IP Ubuntu kamu dan IP DVWA (<code data-path-to-node="20,1,0" data-index-in-node="58">.20</code>), lalu aktifkan.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="20,2,0">Buka <i data-path-to-node="20,2,0" data-index-in-node="5">browser</i> di Ubuntu, akses <code data-path-to-node="20,2,0" data-index-in-node="30">http://192.168.56.20</code> dan <i data-path-to-node="20,2,0" data-index-in-node="55">login</i>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="20,3,0">Tangkap <i data-path-to-node="20,3,0" data-index-in-node="8">password</i>-nya di terminal Bettercap!</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="21">Silakan terapkan langkah pemaksaan jaringan ini, dan kabari hasilnya!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_a289ea5ee7dc7a14" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_a289ea5ee7dc7a14" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Ah, saya paham persis apa yang terjadi!</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Coba perhatikan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="16">prompt</i> terminal kamu: <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="38">┌──(miftahul㉿valleys)-[~]</code>.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Itu artinya kamu saat ini sedang berada di terminal <b data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="52">Kali Linux fisik (host)</b> kamu, bukan di dalam <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="97">container</i> Docker. Di laptop fisikmu, nama antarmuka jaringannya memang bukan <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="174">eth0</code> (biasanya <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="189">wlan0</code> atau <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="200">eth0</code> untuk internet, dan <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="225">vboxnet0</code> untuk VirtualBox). Itulah mengapa muncul <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="275">error</i> <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="281">no interface matching 'eth0' found</code>.</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Menjawab pertanyaanmu: <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="23">Apakah harus pakai <code data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="42">vboxnet0</code>?</b>
<b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="52">JANGAN!</b> 🛑</p><p data-path-to-node="4">Jika kamu menjalankan <code data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="22">sudo bettercap -iface vboxnet0</code> langsung dari Kali fisikmu, kita akan kembali ke masalah paling awal: <b data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="123">same-interface routing problem</b>. Serangan <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="164">ARP Spoofing</i> kamu akan gagal lagi karena paket data masuk dan keluar dari pintu yang sama.</p><h3 data-path-to-node="5">Cara Memperbaikinya (Kembali ke Docker)</h3><p data-path-to-node="6">Ingat, seluruh arsitektur rancangan baru kita mengharuskan mesin <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="65">attacker</i> berada di <b data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="84">dalam Docker Macvlan</b> agar dia punya identitas <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="130">MAC address</i> sendiri. Di dalam <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="160">container</i> Docker itulah, nama antarmukanya diset menjadi <code data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="217">eth0</code>.</p><p data-path-to-node="7">Jadi, dari terminal Kali fisikmu saat ini, langsung saja <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="57">copy-paste</i> perintah pemanggilan <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="89">container</i> Bettercap ini (ini akan otomatis membuat <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="140">container</i> baru dan langsung masuk menjalankan Bettercap di <code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="199">eth0</code>):</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-263 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-263 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" ng-tns-c289529910-263"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-263"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-263"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-263">docker run -it --rm \
  --name attacker \
  --network mitm-net \
  --ip 192.168.56.10 \
  --cap-add NET_ADMIN \
  --cap-add NET_RAW \
  bettercap/bettercap \
  -iface eth0
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="9">Begitu kamu menekan Enter, layar akan berubah menjadi <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="54">prompt</i> hijau khas Bettercap (<code data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="83">192.168.56.0/24 &gt; 192.168.56.10 »</code>).</p><p data-path-to-node="10">Di situlah kamu baru mengetikkan perintah serangan utamanya:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-264 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-264">set arp.spoof.fullduplex true
set arp.spoof.internal true
set arp.spoof.targets &lt;IP_UBUNTU_ASLI&gt;,192.168.56.20
arp.spoof on
net.sniff on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="12">Ayo dicoba lagi perintah <code data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="25">docker run</code>-nya! _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_6ba95bc0c53cfdf6" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_6ba95bc0c53cfdf6" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Ah, ini <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="8">error</i> yang sangat wajar di dunia Docker!</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Pesan <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="6">The container name "/attacker" is already in use</code> artinya nama <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="68">attacker</code> masih "disandera" atau dipakai oleh <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="113">container</i> lama yang sebelumnya gagal kita eksekusi. Meskipun <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="174">container</i> itu tidak sedang berjalan di layar, dia masih membekas di latar belakang sistem Docker kamu.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Solusinya sangat gampang. Kita hanya perlu "menyapu" <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="53">container</i> lama tersebut secara paksa, lalu menjalankan perintahmu lagi.</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Ikuti dua langkah ini di terminal Kali Linux kamu:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="4">Langkah 1: Hapus Container Lama</h3><p data-path-to-node="5">Jalankan perintah ini untuk menghapus <i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="38">container</i> yang menyangkut secara paksa (opsi <code data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="83">-f</code> berarti <i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="94">force</i>):</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-277 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-277 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" data-path-to-node="7">Langkah 2: Jalankan Kembali Perintahmu</h3><p data-path-to-node="8">Setelah terhapus, kamu bisa langsung menjalankan perintah yang sama persis seperti yang kamu ketik tadi:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-278 ng-star-inserted" class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----></div><!----><!----></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-278"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-278"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-278"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-278">docker run -it --rm \
  --name attacker \
  --network mitm-net \
  --ip 192.168.56.10 \
  --cap-add NET_ADMIN \
  --cap-add NET_RAW \
  bettercap/bettercap \
  -iface eth0
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="10">Begitu kamu menekan <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="20">Enter</i>, kamu seharusnya akan langsung disambut oleh terminal hijau milik Bettercap (<code data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="103">192.168.56.0/24 &gt; 192.168.56.10 »</code>).</p><p data-path-to-node="11">Jika sudah masuk, kamu tinggal jalankan mantra <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="47">ARP Spoofing</i>-nya (jangan lupa masukkan IP Ubuntu kamu), dan kita siap memanen <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="125">password</i>-nya!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts complete"><!----><!----><!----><sources-list _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="sources-list ng-star-inserted"><overview-carousel _nghost-ng-c2960487965="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_3aabbf4b1d2ff3ed" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_3aabbf4b1d2ff3ed" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Ini adalah <b data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="11">petunjuk (clue) yang sangat luar biasa!</b> Jangan frustrasi dulu, karena dari log yang kamu kirim, kita sebenarnya sudah mencapai <b data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="138">90% keberhasilan</b>.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Coba perhatikan baik-baik baris pertama log kamu ini:
<code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="54">[endpoint.new] endpoint 192.168.56.102 detected as 08:00:27:84:19:fe</code></p><h3 data-path-to-node="2">🔍 Analisis Breakdown Penyebab</h3><p data-path-to-node="3">Log tersebut adalah bukti sah bahwa arsitektur jaringan kamu <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="61">SUDAH BENAR &amp; BERHASIL</b>.</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="4"><li><p data-path-to-node="4,0,0">Mesin <i data-path-to-node="4,0,0" data-index-in-node="6">attacker</i> (Bettercap di dalam Docker) <b data-path-to-node="4,0,0" data-index-in-node="43">berhasil mendeteksi</b> kehadiran Ubuntu VM (<code data-path-to-node="4,0,0" data-index-in-node="84">.102</code>). Izin <i data-path-to-node="4,0,0" data-index-in-node="96">Promiscuous mode</i> kamu terbukti sukses bekerja!</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="4,1,0">Lalu, kenapa masih <i data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="19">error</i> <code data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="25">could not find spoof targets</code>?
Karena target kita ada dua: <code data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="83">192.168.56.102</code> (Ubuntu) dan <code data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="111">192.168.56.20</code> (DVWA).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="4,2,0">Jika Ubuntu sudah terdeteksi, berarti <b data-path-to-node="4,2,0" data-index-in-node="38">tersangkanya adalah DVWA (<code data-path-to-node="4,2,0" data-index-in-node="64">.20</code>)</b>. DVWA sedang "bersembunyi". Mesin <i data-path-to-node="4,2,0" data-index-in-node="103">container</i> Linux secara bawaan sangat sunyi (tidak mengirim sinyal <i data-path-to-node="4,2,0" data-index-in-node="169">broadcast</i> apa-apa jika tidak diakses). Akibatnya, Bettercap belum tahu <i data-path-to-node="4,2,0" data-index-in-node="240">MAC Address</i> dari DVWA, sehingga gagal memulai penipuan (karena targetnya kurang satu).</p></li></ol><h3 data-path-to-node="5">🛠️ Solusi Tuntas (Membangunkan DVWA)</h3><p data-path-to-node="6">Kita hanya perlu menyuruh Bettercap melakukan <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="46">scanning</i> aktif (menyapu jaringan) sebentar agar dia menemukan tempat persembunyian DVWA, sebelum mulai menyadap.</p><p data-path-to-node="7">Di dalam terminal Bettercap kamu saat ini, tekan <code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="49">Ctrl + C</code> untuk menghentikan spam <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="82">error</i> tersebut, lalu ikuti urutan mantra sakti ini secara berurutan:</p><p data-path-to-node="8"><b data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="0">1. Hidupkan Radar Jaringan (PENTING)</b>
Ketik perintah ini untuk memaksa Bettercap mencari semua mesin yang bersembunyi:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block </code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="10"><i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="0">(Tunggu sekitar 3-5 detik. Kamu akan melihat log bermunculan yang menandakan mesin-mesin baru ditemukan. Pastikan IP <code data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="117">192.168.56.20</code> muncul di log sebagai <code data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="153">[endpoint.new] detected</code>).</i></p><p data-path-to-node="11"><b data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="0">2. Matikan Radar (Agar tidak berisik)</b>
Kalau <code data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="44">.20</code> sudah terdeteksi, matikan radar agar log kita bersih lagi:</p><response-element class="" Mulai Serangan Penuh!</b>
Sekarang Bettercap sudah punya <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="56">MAC Address</i> kedua korban. Jalankan kembali seranganmu:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-296 role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-296">set arp.spoof.fullduplex true
set arp.spoof.internal true
set arp.spoof.targets 192.168.56.102,192.168.56.20
arp.spoof on
net.sniff on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="15">Boom! Kali ini pasti tidak akan ada lagi <i data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="41">error</i> "could not find spoof targets" karena kedua target sudah dikunci oleh Bettercap.</p><p data-path-to-node="16">Selanjutnya, kamu tinggal beralih ke layar Ubuntu VM, buka <i data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="59">browser</i>, akses <code data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="74">http://192.168.56.20</code>, <i data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="96">login</i> menggunakan <code data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="114">admin</code> / <code data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="122">password</code>, dan saksikan <i data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="145">password</i>-nya telanjang bulat di terminal Kali kamu! 🔥</p><p data-path-to-node="17">Lakukan sekarang, kita sudah di langkah paling akhir!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div data-index-in-node="6">[endpoint.lost]</code> yang kamu lihat itu adalah hal yang sangat normal!</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Itu terjadi karena jaringan sedang sepi (kamu tidak sedang membuka apa-apa di Ubuntu). Karena tidak ada lalu lintas data, Bettercap secara otomatis "melupakan" Ubuntu tersebut untuk menghemat memori.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Di sisi lain, target utama kita yaitu DVWA (<code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="44">192.168.56.20</code>) masih belum muncul di log. Kita harus memaksa Bettercap untuk memindai seluruh ruangan agar menemukan keduanya secara bersamaan.</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Lakukan urutan langkah ini persis dari dalam terminal Bettercap kamu:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="4">Langkah 1: Hidupkan Sonar Jaringan</h3><p data-path-to-node="5">Kita paksa Bettercap untuk mengirim sinyal sapaan ke semua IP di jaringan agar mereka "menjawab" dan ketahuan posisi MAC Address-nya. role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-317">net.probe off
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><h3 data-path-to-node="14">Langkah 4: Luncurkan Serangan MITM</h3><p data-path-to-node="15">Sekarang Bettercap sudah memegang data MAC Address kedua korban, serangan pasti akan berhasil. Eksekusi mantra ini satu per satu:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-318 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-318 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger style="display: block;" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQhtANahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQigc"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block-decoration header-formatted gds-title-s ng-tns-c289529910-318 ng-star-inserted" style=""><span _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-318">Cuplikan kode</span><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="buttons class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols ng-tns-c289529910-318"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-318"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-318"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-318">set arp.spoof.fullduplex true
set arp.spoof.internal true
set arp.spoof.targets 192.168.56.102,192.168.56.20
arp.spoof on
net.sniff on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="17"><i data-path-to-node="17" data-index-in-node="0">(Kali ini, log <code data-path-to-node="17" data-index-in-node="15">could not find spoof targets</code> dijamin tidak akan muncul lagi!)</i></p><h3 data-path-to-node="18">Langkah 5: Praktik Credential Harvesting</h3><p data-path-to-node="19">Biarkan terminal Kali kamu merekam.</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="20"><li><p data-path-to-node="20,0,0">Beralih ke layar <b data-path-to-node="20,0,0" data-index-in-node="17">Ubuntu VM</b>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="20,1,0">Buka aplikasi <i data-path-to-node="20,1,0" data-index-in-node="14">browser</i>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="20,2,0">Akses <code data-path-to-node="20,2,0" data-index-in-node="6">http://192.168.56.20</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="20,3,0">Masuk menggunakan <i data-path-to-node="20,3,0" data-index-in-node="18">username</i>: <code data-path-to-node="20,3,0" data-index-in-node="28">admin</code> dan <i data-path-to-node="20,3,0" data-index-in-node="38">password</i>: <code data-path-to-node="20,3,0" data-index-in-node="48">password</code>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="20,4,0">Tekan tombol <b data-path-to-node="20,4,0" data-index-in-node="13">Login</b>.</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="21">Langsung kembali ke terminal Kali fisik kamu. Kamu akan melihat teks berwarna memperlihatkan <code data-path-to-node="21" data-index-in-node="93">POST /login.php</code> beserta <i data-path-to-node="21" data-index-in-node="117">username</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="21" data-index-in-node="130">password</i> yang baru saja diketik! Jangan lupa di-<i data-path-to-node="21" data-index-in-node="178">screenshot</i> untuk dokumentasi portofoliomu.</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts id="model-response-message-contentr_1501e59f1e27d9b5" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Ini adalah progres yang sangat bagus! Jangan khawatir, kamu tidak gagal. Log tersebut justru membuktikan bahwa <b data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="111">serangan MITM kamu 100% berjalan sukses</b>.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Buktinya, kamu bisa melihat log <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="32">[net.sniff.http.response]</code>. Itu adalah paket data balasan dari <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="94">server</i> DVWA yang sedang "mampir" ke mesin Kali kamu sebelum diteruskan ke Ubuntu.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Lalu, pertanyaannya: <b data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="21">Kenapa username dan password (HTTP POST Request) tidak muncul?</b></p><p data-path-to-node="3">Ada dua penyebab utama yang paling sering terjadi di skenario lab seperti ini:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="4">1. Korban (Browser) Tidak Mengirim Password Baru</h3><p data-path-to-node="5">Perhatikan log <code data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="15">302 Found</code> diikuti <code data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="33">200 OK</code>. Ini adalah ciri khas <i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="62">browser</i> yang melakukan <i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="85">redirect</i>. Sangat besar kemungkinan <i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="120">browser</i> di Ubuntu kamu <b data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="143">sudah menyimpan sesi login (cookies)</b> atau kamu hanya me-<i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="199">refresh</i> halaman.
Jika <i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="221">browser</i> tidak benar-benar mengirim ulang form <i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="267">username/password</i> dari awal, Bettercap tentu tidak akan bisa menangkapnya.</p><h3 data-path-to-node="6">2. Filter Bawaan Bettercap Terlalu Ketat</h3><p data-path-to-node="7">Secara <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="7">default</i>, modul <code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="22">net.sniff</code> pada Bettercap versi terbaru kadang hanya menampilkan <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="86">summary</i> (ringkasan) dan menyembunyikan <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="125">raw request</i> agar terminal tidak terlalu penuh. Kita harus memaksanya untuk menampilkan semuanya (Mode <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="227">Verbose</i>).</p><p data-path-to-node="8">Mari kita lakukan penyesuaian sedikit agar target kita benar-benar tertangkap basah:</p><hr data-path-to-node="9"><h3 data-path-to-node="10">Langkah Eksekusi Ulang (Pasti Tembus)</h3><p data-path-to-node="11">Di terminal Kali kamu (yang sedang menjalankan Bettercap), ketik <code data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="65">net.sniff off</code> sebentar, lalu ubah pengaturannya dengan mengetik perintah ini:</p><p data-path-to-node="12"><b data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="0">1. Paksa Bettercap Menampilkan Semua Detail (Verbose):</b></p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-337 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-337 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" ng-tns-c289529910-337"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-337"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-337"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-337">set net.sniff.verbose true
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="14"><b data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="0">2. Aktifkan Kembali Sniffer:</b></p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-338 ng-tns-c289529910-338"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-338"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-338"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-338">net.sniff on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="16"><b data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="0">3. Beralih ke Ubuntu VM (SANGAT PENTING):</b></p><ul data-path-to-node="17"><li><p data-path-to-node="17,0,0">Di <i data-path-to-node="17,0,0" data-index-in-node="3">browser</i> Ubuntu kamu, jangan langsung <i data-path-to-node="17,0,0" data-index-in-node="40">login</i>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="17,1,0">Jika kamu masih dalam keadaan <i data-path-to-node="17,1,0" data-index-in-node="30">login</i> di DVWA, klik tombol <b data-path-to-node="17,1,0" data-index-in-node="57">Logout</b> terlebih dahulu.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="17,2,0">Atau cara paling ampuh: <b data-path-to-node="17,2,0" data-index-in-node="24">Buka Jendela Private/Incognito baru</b> di <i data-path-to-node="17,2,0" data-index-in-node="63">browser</i> Ubuntu kamu.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="17,3,0">Akses ulang <code data-path-to-node="17,3,0" data-index-in-node="12">http://192.168.56.20</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="17,4,0">Ketikkan <i data-path-to-node="17,4,0" data-index-in-node="9">username</i>: <code data-path-to-node="17,4,0" data-index-in-node="19">admin</code> dan <i data-path-to-node="17,4,0" data-index-in-node="29">password</i>: <code data-path-to-node="17,4,0" data-index-in-node="39">password</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="17,5,0">Klik <b data-path-to-node="17,5,0" data-index-in-node="5">Login</b>.</p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="18"><b data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="0">4. Cek Terminal Kali Kamu!</b>
Sekarang, karena mode <i data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="49">verbose</i> sudah aktif dan kamu melakukan <i data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="88">login</i> dari sesi yang benar-benar baru, kamu seharusnya akan melihat baris log <code data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="166">[net.sniff.http.request]</code> (biasanya berwarna kuning atau merah) yang berisi <i data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="241">method</i> <code data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="248">POST</code> lengkap dengan form kredensialnya di bagian bawah log.</p><p data-path-to-node="19">Ayo coba gunakan mode <i data-path-to-node="19" data-index-in-node="22">Incognito</i> dan mode <i data-path-to-node="19" data-index-in-node="41">Verbose</i> ini. Ini adalah langkah validasi terakhirmu!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap
