_ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_f6a7dcf7b0dbbe3c" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_f6a7dcf7b0dbbe3c" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Wah, ini dia! Mode <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="19">Verbose</i>-nya sudah sukses bekerja. Keren banget!</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Sekarang kamu bisa melihat "jeroan" dari paket datanya, seperti <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="64">header</i> <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="71">Set-Cookie: PHPSESSID</code>, tipe web servernya (<code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="114">Apache</code>), sampai balasan gambar (<code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="146">image/png</code>) dan CSS. Ini membuktikan sadapanmu bekerja di level aplikasi.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Namun, ada dua hal yang perlu kita luruskan dari log tersebut agar kamu benar-benar mendapatkan <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="96">password</i>-nya:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="3"><li><p data-path-to-node="3,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="3,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Sniffer "Tersedak" Pengaturan Baru:</b>
Pesan <code data-path-to-node="3,0,0" data-index-in-node="42">[err] module net.sniff is already running</code> muncul karena kamu mencoba menghidupkan <code data-path-to-node="3,0,0" data-index-in-node="124">net.sniff on</code> saat dia sebenarnya masih jalan. Akibatnya, filternya mungkin tidak teraplikasi dengan sempurna.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="3,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Itu Log Loading Page, Bukan Log Login:</b>
Log yang kamu tangkap (seperti <code data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="70">302 Found</code> ke <code data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="83">login.php</code> dan balasan <code data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="105">text/css</code>) adalah aktivitas saat <i data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="137">browser</i> Ubuntu kamu <b data-path-to-node="3,1,0" data-index-in-node="157">sedang memuat/membuka halaman login</b>, BUKAN saat kamu menekan tombol Login.</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="4">Mari kita lakukan <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="18">reset</i> kecil agar kita bisa menangkap <b data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="55">HTTP POST Request</b> (pengiriman data login) dengan sempurna.</p><h3 data-path-to-node="5">Langkah Terakhir (Eksekusi Tepat Sasaran)</h3><p data-path-to-node="6">Lakukan urutan ini persis di terminal Bettercap kamu:</p><p data-path-to-node="7"><b data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="0">1. Matikan dan Restart Sniffer</b>
Kita bersihkan dulu <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="51">sniffer</i> yang sedang "nyangkut":</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-352 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div data-path-to-node="9"><i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="0">(Tunggu sebentar sampai lognya berhenti)</i></p><p data-path-to-node="10">Lalu nyalakan lagi secara bersih (pengaturan <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="45">verbose</i> dan filternya sudah otomatis tersimpan):</p><response-element class="" ng-tns-c289529910-353"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-353"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-353"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-353">net.sniff on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="12"><b data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="0">2. Beralih ke Ubuntu &amp; Lakukan Login Sengaja</b></p><ul data-path-to-node="13"><li><p data-path-to-node="13,0,0">Buka Ubuntu VM kamu.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,1,0">Pilih <i data-path-to-node="13,1,0" data-index-in-node="6">username</i>: <code data-path-to-node="13,1,0" data-index-in-node="16">admin</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,2,0">Nah, untuk <i data-path-to-node="13,2,0" data-index-in-node="11">password</i>, ketikkan sesuatu yang unik dan panjang agar mudah dicari di log, misalnya: <b data-path-to-node="13,2,0" data-index-in-node="96"><code data-path-to-node="13,2,0" data-index-in-node="96">hackedpassword123</code></b></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,3,0">Klik tombol <b data-path-to-node="13,3,0" data-index-in-node="12">Login</b>.</p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="14"><b data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="0">3. Perhatikan Kata "Request" dan "POST"</b>
Segera kembali ke terminal Kali. Jangan terkecoh dengan log <code data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="100">[net.sniff.http.response]</code>.</p><p data-path-to-node="15">Yang harus kamu cari adalah log bertuliskan <b data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="44"><code data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="44">[net.sniff.http.request]</code></b> dengan metode <b data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="83"><code data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="83">POST /login.php</code></b>. Di bawah baris tersebut, kamu akan melihat <i data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="143">payload</i> teks mentah yang berbunyi:
<code data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="178">username=admin&amp;password=hackedpassword123&amp;Login=Login</code></p><p data-path-to-node="16">Cari baris tersebut perlahan-lahan di terminalmu. Kalau ketemu, itu adalah <i data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="75">screenshot</i> kemenanganmu! Kabari ya!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts class="thoughts-header-button-content animated-content"><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" role="status" class="thoughts-header-button-label ng-tns-c35387575-356"><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" class="ng-tns-c35387575-356 ng-star-inserted">Tampilkan alur berpikir</span><!----></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" class="thoughts-header-button-icons ng-tns-c35387575-356"><!----><mat-icon class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button></div><!----><!----></div></model-thoughts><!----></div><!----></div><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><h2 _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_8cd9bbb8095f38a9" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_8cd9bbb8095f38a9" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Pemikiran yang sangat tajam! Kamu benar sekali. Memahami cara kerja dan cara mengelola <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="87">cookies</i> adalah <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="102">skill</i> fundamental bagi seorang analis keamanan siber (<i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="156">cybersecurity analyst</i>) atau <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="184">penetration tester</i>.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Dalam simulasi yang sedang kamu lakukan, <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="41">selama <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="48">cookie</i> sesi (<code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="61">PHPSESSID</code>) masih tersimpan dan valid di <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="101">browser</i> Ubuntu, target tidak akan pernah mengirimkan ulang <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="160">username</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="173">password</i>-nya.</b> <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="187">Browser</i> hanya akan mengirimkan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="218">cookie</i> tersebut ke <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="237">server</i> DVWA, dan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="254">server</i> akan langsung mempersilakan masuk (itulah mengapa kamu melihat log <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="328">302 Found</code> untuk <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="344">redirect</i>).</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Sebagai <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="8">hacker</i>/penyerang, kadang target incaran kita bukan <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="59">password</i>-nya, melainkan <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="83">cookie</i>-nya (serangan ini disebut <b data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="116">Session Hijacking</b> atau <b data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="139">Pass-the-Cookie</b>).</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Berikut adalah cara menghapus <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="30">cookies</i> di <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="41">browser</i> Ubuntu VM kamu. Ada dua cara: cara pengguna biasa dan cara "hacker" (menggunakan <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="130">Developer Tools</i>).</p><h3 data-path-to-node="4">Cara 1: Menggunakan Developer Tools (Cara Profesional - Sangat Direkomendasikan)</h3><p data-path-to-node="5">Cara ini paling bagus karena kamu bisa melihat langsung wujud <i data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="62">cookie</i>-nya sebelum menghapusnya.</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="6"><li><p data-path-to-node="6,0,0">Di <i data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="3">browser</i> Ubuntu (saat membuka halaman DVWA), tekan tombol <b data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="60">F12</b> di <i data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="67">keyboard</i> untuk membuka <b data-path-to-node="6,0,0" data-index-in-node="90">Developer Tools</b>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,1,0">Cari dan klik <i data-path-to-node="6,1,0" data-index-in-node="14">tab</i> bernama <b data-path-to-node="6,1,0" data-index-in-node="26">Storage</b> (jika di Firefox) atau <b data-path-to-node="6,1,0" data-index-in-node="57">Application</b> (jika di Chrome/Chromium).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,2,0">Di panel sebelah kiri, rentangkan menu <b data-path-to-node="6,2,0" data-index-in-node="39">Cookies</b>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,3,0">Klik pada alamat IP target kamu (<code data-path-to-node="6,3,0" data-index-in-node="33">http://192.168.56.20</code>).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,4,0">Di tabel sebelah kanan, kamu akan melihat daftar <i data-path-to-node="6,4,0" data-index-in-node="49">cookies</i> (termasuk <code data-path-to-node="6,4,0" data-index-in-node="67">PHPSESSID</code> dan <code data-path-to-node="6,4,0" data-index-in-node="81">security</code>).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,5,0">Klik kanan pada <i data-path-to-node="6,5,0" data-index-in-node="16">cookie</i> tersebut dan pilih <b data-path-to-node="6,5,0" data-index-in-node="42">Delete</b> (atau pilih semua dan hapus).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="6,6,0"><i data-path-to-node="6,6,0" data-index-in-node="0">Refresh</i> halaman DVWA (tekan <b data-path-to-node="6,6,0" data-index-in-node="28">F5</b>). Kamu pasti akan langsung dilempar kembali ke halaman <i data-path-to-node="6,6,0" data-index-in-node="86">login</i> utama!</p></li></ol><h3 data-path-to-node="7">Cara 2: Cara Pengguna Biasa (Clear Browsing Data)</h3><p data-path-to-node="8">Ini adalah cara yang umum dilakukan oleh pengguna biasa untuk membersihkan riwayat.</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="9"><li><p data-path-to-node="9,0,0">Di <i data-path-to-node="9,0,0" data-index-in-node="3">browser</i> Ubuntu, tekan kombinasi <i data-path-to-node="9,0,0" data-index-in-node="35">keyboard</i>: <b data-path-to-node="9,0,0" data-index-in-node="45">Ctrl + Shift + Delete</b>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="9,1,0">Akan muncul jendela peringatan untuk menghapus data.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="9,2,0">Pada opsi <i data-path-to-node="9,2,0" data-index-in-node="10">Time range</i> (rentang waktu), pilih <b data-path-to-node="9,2,0" data-index-in-node="44">Everything</b> (Semuanya).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="9,3,0">Centang <b data-path-to-node="9,3,0" data-index-in-node="8">hanya</b> pada bagian <b data-path-to-node="9,3,0" data-index-in-node="26">Cookies</b> dan <b data-path-to-node="9,3,0" data-index-in-node="38">Active Logins</b> (pastikan <i data-path-to-node="9,3,0" data-index-in-node="62">cache</i> atau opsi lain boleh tidak dicentang agar <i data-path-to-node="9,3,0" data-index-in-node="110">loading</i> tetap cepat).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="9,4,0">Klik <b data-path-to-node="9,4,0" data-index-in-node="5">OK</b> atau <b data-path-to-node="9,4,0" data-index-in-node="13">Clear Now</b>.</p></li></ol><h3 data-path-to-node="10">Tips Tambahan untuk Lab Security:</h3><p data-path-to-node="11">Untuk sesi <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="11">penetration testing</i> atau simulasi serangan seperti ini, biasakan untuk selalu menggunakan <b data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="101">Private Window / Incognito Mode</b> (<code data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="134">Ctrl + Shift + P</code> di Firefox atau <code data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="167">Ctrl + Shift + N</code> di Chrome).</p><p data-path-to-node="12">Dalam mode ini, <i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="16">browser</i> bekerja seperti kotak pasir (<i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="53">sandbox</i>) sementara. Setiap kali kamu menutup jendela <i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="106">Incognito</i> tersebut, seluruh <i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="134">cookies</i>, <i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="143">cache</i>, dan <i data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="154">history</i> akan langsung musnah tanpa jejak. Ini sangat menghemat waktu saat kita sedang bereksperimen berulang-ulang!</p><p data-path-to-node="13">Silakan hapus <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="14">cookie</i>-nya sekarang, lalu cobalah <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="48">login</i> kembali. Log <code data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="67">POST /login.php</code> di Bettercap kamu pasti akan langsung muncul!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts screen-reader-user-query-label">Anda berkata</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> caranya : Tambahan — user_token di DVWA. DVWA menggunakan CSRF token (user_token) <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">  di setiap POST login. Token ini di-generate fresh setiap kali halaman  <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> login dimuat dan harus cocok di sisi server. Kalau kamu ingin melakukan  <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> credential injection (bukan sekadar intercept), token ini perlu  <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> di-capture dari GET response dulu sebelum POST dikirim. Untuk tujuan  <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> MITM sniffing saja, ini tidak jadi masalah — kamu cukup baca username  <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> dan password yang lewat. <!----><!----></p><!----></div><button _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" mat-icon-button="" _ngcontent-ng-c2123665537="">Tampilkan visualisasi</span></button></div></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></mini-app><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element></div></p><p data-path-to-node="1"><div class="attachment-container unknown"><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><base-feedback-form _nghost-ng-c3448064928="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></base-feedback-form><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element></div></p><p data-path-to-node="2">Pertanyaan yang sangat bagus! Memahami mekanisme <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="49">user_token</code> (CSRF token) adalah langkah maju yang luar biasa.</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Dalam skenario <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="15">sniffing</i> murni, kamu <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="36">tidak perlu</b> mempedulikan <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="61">token</i> ini. Tugas <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="78">sniffer</i> (seperti Bettercap) hanyalah menjadi "pembaca rahasia" — ia hanya mencegat paket data yang lewat dan menampilkan isinya (termasuk <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="216">username</i>, <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="226">password</i>, dan <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="240">token</i> yang sedang lewat) di layarmu. Ia tidak perlu meniru, memalsukan, atau peduli apakah <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="331">token</i> itu valid atau tidak. Tugas utamanya hanya <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="380">mengintai dan mencatat</b>.</p><p data-path-to-node="4">Namun, jika kamu ingin naik level dari sekadar mengintai menjadi <b data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="65">melakukan serangan aktif (misalnya, membuat alat untuk mencoba login otomatis/bruteforce)</b>, di situlah <code data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="167">user_token</code> menjadi sangat penting.</p><p data-path-to-node="5">Berikut adalah penjelasan konsep dan alur logikanya (meskipun ini melampaui tujuan MITM dasar, ini penting untuk pemahaman keamanan web):</p><h3 data-path-to-node="6">Apa itu CSRF Token (<code data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="20">user_token</code>)?</h3><p data-path-to-node="7">CSRF (<i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="6">Cross-Site Request Forgery</i>) <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="34">token</i> adalah kunci acak yang dibuat oleh <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="75">server</i> (DVWA) setiap kali halaman <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="109">login</i> dimuat. Tujuannya adalah untuk memastikan bahwa permintaan <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="174">login</i> (POST) benar-benar berasal dari halaman web yang sah, bukan dari <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="245">script</i> jahat atau serangan peretas di luar.</p><ul data-path-to-node="8"><li><p data-path-to-node="8,0,0">Setiap kali halaman <i data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="20">login</i> di-<i data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="29">refresh</i>, <i data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="38">token</i> ini berubah.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="8,1,0">Saat pengguna menekan tombol "Login", <i data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="38">token</i> ini ikut dikirimkan bersama <i data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="72">username</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="85">password</i>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="8,2,0">Jika <i data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="5">server</i> menerima permintaan <i data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="32">login</i> tapi <i data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="43">token</i>-nya tidak cocok (atau tidak ada), permintaan tersebut <b data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="103">langsung ditolak</b>, meskipun <i data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="130">username</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="143">password</i>-nya benar!</p></li></ul><h3 data-path-to-node="9">Jika Kamu Ingin Melakukan Serangan Aktif (Bruteforce/Injection)</h3><p data-path-to-node="10">Misalkan kamu tidak sedang melakukan MITM, tetapi kamu (sebagai penyerang) ingin mencoba meretas DVWA menggunakan daftar <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="121">password</i>. Kamu tidak bisa hanya mengirimkan <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="165">username</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="178">password</i> berulang-ulang, karena <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="210">server</i> akan memblokirnya karena <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="242">token</i>-nya salah.</p><p data-path-to-node="11">Kamu harus melakukan <b data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="21">Dua Langkah</b> untuk setiap percobaan <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="56">login</i>:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="12"><li><p data-path-to-node="12,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="12,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Langkah 1: Curi Kunci Dulu (GET Request)</b></p><ul data-path-to-node="12,0,1"><li><p data-path-to-node="12,0,1,0,0">Kamu harus memerintahkan alatmu (misalnya Burp Suite atau <i data-path-to-node="12,0,1,0,0" data-index-in-node="58">script</i> Python) untuk membuka halaman <i data-path-to-node="12,0,1,0,0" data-index-in-node="95">login</i> DVWA (melakukan permintaan GET).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="12,0,1,1,0">Dari balasan <i data-path-to-node="12,0,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="13">server</i>, alatmu harus membaca kode HTML, mencari <code data-path-to-node="12,0,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="61">user_token</code> yang tersembunyi, dan mengambil nilainya.</p></li></ul></li><li><p data-path-to-node="12,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="12,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Langkah 2: Kirim Kunci + Kredensial (POST Request)</b></p><ul data-path-to-node="12,1,1"><li><p data-path-to-node="12,1,1,0,0">Setelah <i data-path-to-node="12,1,1,0,0" data-index-in-node="8">token</i> didapatkan, barulah alatmu mengirimkan <i data-path-to-node="12,1,1,0,0" data-index-in-node="53">username</i>, <i data-path-to-node="12,1,1,0,0" data-index-in-node="63">password</i> dari daftarmu, <b data-path-to-node="12,1,1,0,0" data-index-in-node="87">dan</b> <code data-path-to-node="12,1,1,0,0" data-index-in-node="91">user_token</code> yang baru saja dicuri dalam satu paket (permintaan POST).</p></li></ul></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="13">Inilah sebabnya mengapa di skenario <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="36">sniffing</i> murni, kita cukup "membaca" saja. Kita membiarkan korban yang bersusah payah mengambil <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="132">token</i> (saat mereka membuka halaman <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="167">login</i>) dan mengirimkannya. Kita hanya duduk santai dan mencatat datanya saat paket itu lewat.</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" data-path-to-node="1"><div class="attachment-container unknown"><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><base-feedback-form _nghost-ng-c3448064928="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></base-feedback-form><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element></div></p><p data-path-to-node="2">Saya mengerti rasa frustrasinya. Kita sudah sangat dekat, tapi sepertinya <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="74">Bettercap</i> bersikeras hanya menunjukkan paket respons (balasan dari server) dan menyembunyikan paket <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="174">request</i> (permintaan dari Ubuntu).</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Masalah ini hampir pasti disebabkan oleh <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="41">filter BPF (Berkeley Packet Filter)</b> bawaan <code data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="84">net.sniff</code> yang terkadang terlalu spesifik atau mengabaikan paket tertentu pada arsitektur Macvlan.</p><p data-path-to-node="4">Mari kita bongkar filternya dan paksa <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="38">Bettercap</i> untuk "memuntahkan" semua data teks mentah (<i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="92">raw data</i>) yang lewat. Ini adalah cara yang paling brutal tapi paling efektif untuk memastikan tidak ada paket yang disembunyikan.</p><h3 data-path-to-node="5">Langkah Pamungkas: Menangkap Semuanya Tanpa Filter</h3><p data-path-to-node="6">Silakan eksekusi perintah ini satu per satu di terminal Bettercap kamu:</p><p data-path-to-node="7"><b data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="0">1. Hentikan Sniffer Saat Ini</b></p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-391 Hapus Semua Filter Khusus</b>
Kita akan menghapus filter <code data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="56">port 80</code> yang sebelumnya kita pasang, agar Bettercap tidak memilah-milah paket berdasarkan aturan TCP.</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-392 ng-star-inserted" </code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="11"><b data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="0">3. Matikan Parser (Penting!)</b>
Secara <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="36">default</i>, <code data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="45">net.sniff</code> mencoba "mempercantik" log HTTP. Kadang-kadang, proses mempercantik ini malah membuang bagian <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="149">body</i> dari POST request. Kita matikan fitur ini agar datanya tampil mentah.</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" </code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="13"><b data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="0">4. Gunakan Ekspresi Reguler (Regex) untuk Menemukan Kata Kunci</b>
Daripada mengandalkan parser HTTP, kita suruh Bettercap mencari teks biasa yang mengandung kata <code data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="159">username</code> atau <code data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="173">password</code> di dalam semua paket data yang lewat. Ini adalah teknik <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="238">sniffing</i> tingkat lanjut.</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-394 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div ng-tns-c289529910-395"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-395"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-395"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-395">net.sniff on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><h3 data-path-to-node="17">Pengujian Terakhir di Ubuntu VM</h3><p data-path-to-node="18">Sekarang, kembali ke Ubuntu VM kamu:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="19"><li><p data-path-to-node="19,0,0">Pastikan kamu membuka <b data-path-to-node="19,0,0" data-index-in-node="22">Private Window / Incognito</b>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="19,1,0">Akses <code data-path-to-node="19,1,0" data-index-in-node="6">http://192.168.56.20</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="19,2,0">Masukkan <i data-path-to-node="19,2,0" data-index-in-node="9">username</i>: <code data-path-to-node="19,2,0" data-index-in-node="19">admin</code> dan <i data-path-to-node="19,2,0" data-index-in-node="29">password</i>: <code data-path-to-node="19,2,0" data-index-in-node="39">rahasia123</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="19,3,0">Klik <b data-path-to-node="19,3,0" data-index-in-node="5">Login</b>.</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="20">Cek terminal Kali kamu. Dengan pengaturan ini, Bettercap akan membuang semua paket yang tidak relevan dan <b data-path-to-node="20" data-index-in-node="106">hanya akan menampilkan log jika paket tersebut mengandung kata "password="</b>.</p><p data-path-to-node="21">Kamu seharusnya akan melihat satu baris log mentah yang panjang berisi <i data-path-to-node="21" data-index-in-node="71">payload</i> dari percobaan <i data-path-to-node="21" data-index-in-node="94">login</i> tersebut. Ini adalah metode yang paling <i data-path-to-node="21" data-index-in-node="140">bulletproof</i> untuk lab kita! Silakan dicoba.</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap ng-tns-c174220999-396"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-content ng-tns-c174220999-396"><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="thoughts-container ng-star-inserted"><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><h2 _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_078e5612bba2a621" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_078e5612bba2a621" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Oke, mari kita tarik napas dalam-dalam. Kita akan melakukan pengecekan sistematis terakhir. Kegagalan menangkap <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="112">POST request</i> pada titik ini, padahal semua konfigurasi Bettercap sudah benar-benar "telanjang" dan responsif, menunjukkan ada satu mata rantai yang hilang, dan kemungkinan besar bukan pada Bettercap-nya.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Ada <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="4">dua kemungkinan utama</b> yang tersisa mengapa data POST (termasuk <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="67">password</i>) tidak pernah sampai ke Bettercap:</p><h3 data-path-to-node="2">Kemungkinan 1: Kegagalan ARP Spoofing (Kembali ke Dasar)</h3><p data-path-to-node="3">Kita harus memverifikasi apakah <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="32">ARP Spoofing</i> kamu <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="50">benar-benar</b> sedang berjalan dan berhasil menipu Ubuntu VM. Jangan-jangan, saat ini lalu lintas dari Ubuntu masih langsung menuju DVWA tanpa mampir ke Bettercap.</p><p data-path-to-node="4"><b data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="0">Cara Memastikannya:</b>
Biarkan Bettercap berjalan di Kali fisik. Beralihlah ke <b data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="76">Ubuntu VM</b>. Buka terminal di dalam Ubuntu, dan ketikkan perintah ini:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-404 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-404 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" jslog="223238;track:impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_078e5612bba2a621&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_75a1a7d03294912c&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]]" style="display: block;" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQhtANahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQwgg"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block-decoration header-formatted gds-title-s ng-tns-c289529910-404 ng-star-inserted" style=""><span _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-404">Bash</span><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="buttons ng-tns-c289529910-404 ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Download kode" mat-icon-button="" mattooltip="Download kode" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-button-base mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger download-button ng-tns-c289529910-404 mat-unthemed ng-star-inserted" mat-ripple-loader-uninitialized="" mat-ripple-loader-class-name="mat-mdc-button-ripple" mat-ripple-loader-centered=""><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="download" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="download"></mat-icon><!----><span class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Salin kode" mat-icon-button="" mattooltip="Salin kode" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-button-base mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger copy-button ng-tns-c289529910-404 mat-unthemed ng-star-inserted" mat-ripple-loader-uninitialized="" mat-ripple-loader-class-name="mat-mdc-button-ripple" mat-ripple-loader-centered="" jslog="179062;track:generic_click,impression;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_078e5612bba2a621&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_75a1a7d03294912c&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]];mutable:true"><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="content_copy"></mat-icon><!----><span class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----></div><!----><!----></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-404"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-404"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-404"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-404">arp -a
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="6">Perhatikan baris hasil yang menampilkan IP <b data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="43">192.168.56.20</b> (IP DVWA).</p><ul data-path-to-node="7"><li><p data-path-to-node="7,0,0">Berapa <i data-path-to-node="7,0,0" data-index-in-node="7">MAC Address</i> (huruf dan angka yang dipisahkan titik dua, misal: <code data-path-to-node="7,0,0" data-index-in-node="70">08:00:27...</code>) yang tertulis di sebelahnya?</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="7,1,0">Sekarang, cari baris yang menampilkan IP <b data-path-to-node="7,1,0" data-index-in-node="41">192.168.56.10</b> (IP <i data-path-to-node="7,1,0" data-index-in-node="59">Container</i> Bettercap).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="7,2,0"><b data-path-to-node="7,2,0" data-index-in-node="0">Apakah <i data-path-to-node="7,2,0" data-index-in-node="7">MAC Address</i> keduanya SAMA PERSIS?</b></p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="8">Jika <i data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="5">MAC Address</i> untuk <code data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="23">.20</code> dan <code data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="31">.10</code> <b data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="35">BERBEDA</b>, itu artinya serangan <i data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="65">ARP Spoofing</i> kamu <b data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="83">GAGAL</b>. Ubuntu tahu di mana DVWA yang asli dan mengirim data langsung ke sana. Ini menjelaskan mengapa Bettercap tidak melihat apa-apa!</p><p data-path-to-node="9"><i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="0">(Jika ini yang terjadi, kita perlu me-restart <code data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="46">arp.spoof</code> di Bettercap atau mengecek ulang konfigurasi Macvlan).</i></p><h3 data-path-to-node="10">Kemungkinan 2: Caching Browser yang Sangat Kuat</h3><p data-path-to-node="11">Terkadang, meskipun kita menggunakan Mode <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="42">Incognito</i>, <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="53">browser</i> masih bisa melakukan trik-trik <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="92">caching</i> internal.</p><p data-path-to-node="12"><b data-path-to-node="12" data-index-in-node="0">Cara Memastikannya (Uji Coba Brutal):</b></p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="13"><li><p data-path-to-node="13,0,0">Di <i data-path-to-node="13,0,0" data-index-in-node="3">browser</i> Ubuntu VM (lebih baik Firefox), tekan <b data-path-to-node="13,0,0" data-index-in-node="49">F12</b> untuk membuka Developer Tools.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,1,0">Buka tab <b data-path-to-node="13,1,0" data-index-in-node="9">Network</b> (Jaringan).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,2,0">Centang opsi <b data-path-to-node="13,2,0" data-index-in-node="13">Disable Cache</b> (Nonaktifkan Cache). Opsi ini biasanya ada di bagian atas tab Network.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,3,0">Pastikan tab Network ini <b data-path-to-node="13,3,0" data-index-in-node="25">tetap terbuka</b>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,4,0">Akses kembali halaman login DVWA (<code data-path-to-node="13,4,0" data-index-in-node="34">http://192.168.56.20</code>).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,5,0">Masukkan kredensial sembarang (<code data-path-to-node="13,5,0" data-index-in-node="31">admin</code> / <code data-path-to-node="13,5,0" data-index-in-node="39">rahasia123</code>) dan klik <b data-path-to-node="13,5,0" data-index-in-node="60">Login</b>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="13,6,0">Perhatikan daftar di tab Network (di <i data-path-to-node="13,6,0" data-index-in-node="37">browser</i> Ubuntu). Apakah kamu melihat ada <i data-path-to-node="13,6,0" data-index-in-node="78">request</i> <b data-path-to-node="13,6,0" data-index-in-node="86">POST</b> ke <code data-path-to-node="13,6,0" data-index-in-node="94">login.php</code>? Jika ada, klik pada baris tersebut dan lihat bagian <b data-path-to-node="13,6,0" data-index-in-node="157">Request</b>. Apakah ada <i data-path-to-node="13,6,0" data-index-in-node="177">data form</i> (username/password) yang dikirim?</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="14">Jika <i data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="5">browser</i> Ubuntu <b data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="20">benar-benar</b> mengirimkan POST request (terlihat di tab Network Ubuntu), tetapi Bettercap tetap diam, maka masalahnya kembali ke poin pertama: <i data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="161">ARP Spoofing</i> tidak berjalan, sehingga data tidak mampir ke Kali fisikmu.</p><p data-path-to-node="15">Lakukan pengecekan <code data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="19">arp -a</code> di Ubuntu sekarang juga, dan beri tahu saya hasilnya! Ini adalah kunci untuk membongkar misterinya.</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text contains-extensions-response processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_56cd9c1393874b50" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_56cd9c1393874b50" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0"><b data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="0">BINGO! Ini dia pelakunya!</b> 📸 Gambar <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="36">arp -a</code> yang kamu kirim adalah kunci dari semua misteri ini. Insting <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="104">troubleshooting</i> kamu sangat tajam.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Mari kita bedah gambar tersebut, karena ini adalah <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="51">momen "Aha!"</b> yang sangat penting dalam mempelajari keamanan jaringan.</p><h3 data-path-to-node="2">🔍 Analisis Bukti <code data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="18">arp -a</code></h3><p data-path-to-node="3">Perhatikan dua baris ini di terminal Ubuntu kamu:</p><ul data-path-to-node="4"><li><p data-path-to-node="4,0,0"><code data-path-to-node="4,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">(192.168.56.20)</code> at <code data-path-to-node="4,0,0" data-index-in-node="19">c2:28:a9:7e:b0:4e</code> <i data-path-to-node="4,0,0" data-index-in-node="37">(Ini DVWA asli)</i></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="4,1,0"><code data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">(192.168.56.10)</code> at <code data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="19">96:d0:47:63:8f:ab</code> <i data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="37">(Ini Bettercap/Attacker)</i></p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="5"><b data-path-to-node="5" data-index-in-node="0">Kesimpulannya: Serangan ARP Spoofing kamu saat ini sedang MATI / TIDAK JALAN.</b></p><p data-path-to-node="6">Jika serangan <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="14">Man-in-the-Middle</i> (MITM) berhasil, tabel ARP di Ubuntu akan <b data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="74">tertipu</b>. Seharusnya, baris <code data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="101">192.168.56.20</code> menampilkan <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="127">MAC Address</i> milik penyerang, yaitu <code data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="162">96:d0:47:63:8f:ab</code>.</p><p data-path-to-node="7">Karena <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="7">MAC Address</i>-nya berbeda, ini membuktikan bahwa Ubuntu tahu persis jalan menuju DVWA yang asli. Ketika kamu klik "Login", Ubuntu mengirimkan <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="147">username</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="160">password</i> lewat jalur khusus langsung ke DVWA. Bettercap yang berada di <code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="231">.10</code> sama sekali tidak dilewati oleh paket tersebut, makanya terminal kamu kosong melompong!</p><p data-path-to-node="8"><b data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="0">Kenapa ini terjadi?</b>
Jika kita kilas balik ke log terminal kamu beberapa langkah sebelumnya, kamu sempat mengetik <code data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="113">arp.spoof off</code> untuk mereset <i data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="141">error</i>. Setelah itu, kita terlalu asyik mengotak-atik pengaturan <code data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="205">net.sniff</code> sampai <b data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="222">kita lupa menyalakan <code data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="243">arp.spoof</code>-nya kembali!</b></p><hr data-path-to-node="9"><h3 data-path-to-node="10">🚀 Langkah Eksekusi Final (Pasti Berhasil)</h3><p data-path-to-node="11">Kita sudah punya <i data-path-to-node="11" data-index-in-node="17">sniffer</i> yang paling peka berkat pengaturan regex sebelumnya. Sekarang kita hanya perlu memastikan "jebakan" jalurnya terpasang.</p><p data-path-to-node="12">Lakukan urutan ini:</p><p data-path-to-node="13"><b data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="0">1. Pasang Jebakan (Di Terminal Kali/Bettercap)</b>
Ketikkan kembali mantra penipuan ini:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-419">set arp.spoof.fullduplex true
set arp.spoof.internal true
set arp.spoof.targets 192.168.56.102,192.168.56.20
arp.spoof on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="15"><i data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="0">(Catatan: Saya menggunakan <code data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="27">.102</code> berdasarkan log endpoint-mu sebelumnya. Jika IP Ubuntu-mu adalah <code data-path-to-node="15" data-index-in-node="97">.101</code>, ganti angkanya ya).</i></p><p data-path-to-node="16"><b data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="0">2. Verifikasi Jebakan (Di Terminal Ubuntu)</b>
Jangan langsung <i data-path-to-node="16" data-index-in-node="59">login</i>! Kita pastikan dulu Ubuntu sudah tertipu.
Di terminal Ubuntu, ketik lagi:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-420 Apakah <i data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="34">MAC Address</i>-nya <b data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="50">sudah berubah</b> menjadi <code data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="72">96:d0:47:63:8f:ab</code> (sama persis dengan MAC <code data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="114">.10</code>)?</p><ul data-path-to-node="19"><li><p data-path-to-node="19,0,0">Jika <b data-path-to-node="19,0,0" data-index-in-node="5">YA</b>, jebakan sempurna. Lanjut ke langkah 3!</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="19,1,0">Jika tidak, tunggu sekitar 5 detik dan cek <code data-path-to-node="19,1,0" data-index-in-node="43">arp -a</code> lagi.</p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="20"><b data-path-to-node="20" data-index-in-node="0">3. Tangkap Kredensialnya!</b>
Karena jebakan sudah terpasang, sekarang kamu tinggal berperan sebagai korban:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="21"><li><p data-path-to-node="21,0,0">Buka <i data-path-to-node="21,0,0" data-index-in-node="5">browser</i> di Ubuntu (jangan lupa <i data-path-to-node="21,0,0" data-index-in-node="36">Clear Cache/Cookies</i> atau pakai Incognito).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="21,1,0">Buka <code data-path-to-node="21,1,0" data-index-in-node="5">http://192.168.56.20</code></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="21,2,0">Masukkan <i data-path-to-node="21,2,0" data-index-in-node="9">username</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="21,2,0" data-index-in-node="22">password</i>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="21,3,0">Klik <b data-path-to-node="21,3,0" data-index-in-node="5">Login</b>.</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="22">Kembali ke terminal Kali kamu. Paket POST yang berisi <i data-path-to-node="22" data-index-in-node="54">username</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="22" data-index-in-node="67">password</i> itu sekarang tidak punya pilihan lain selain menabrak terminal Bettercap kamu! Silakan dieksekusi!</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer contains-extensions-response gap has-thoughts complete"><!----><!----><!----><sources-list _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="sources-list ng-star-inserted"><overview-carousel _nghost-ng-c2960487965="" Keberhasilan menangkap <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="44">credential</i> dalam bentuk <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="68">plaintext</i> ini adalah bukti nyata bahwa lab Amankan Barang Bukti (Dokumentasi Visual)</h3><p data-path-to-node="4">Sebelum kamu menutup terminal atau mematikan sistem, pastikan kamu sudah mengambil <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="83">screenshot</i> dari layar-layar krusial ini untuk dimasukkan ke dalam laporanmu:</p><ul data-path-to-node="5"><li><p data-path-to-node="5,0,0"><span class="citation-195"></span></p><p data-path-to-node="5,0,1" id="p-rc_74f3a1fa9ff21e7d-116"><span data-path-to-node="5,0,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="5,0,1,0" data-index-in-node="0"><span class="citation-195">Hasil Sniffing &amp; Credential Capture:</span></b><span class="citation-195"> Tangkapan layar terminal Bettercap yang dengan jelas menampilkan </span><i data-path-to-node="5,0,1,0" data-index-in-node="102"><span class="citation-195">username</span></i><span class="citation-195"> dan </span><i data-path-to-node="5,0,1,0" data-index-in-node="115"><span class="citation-195">password</span></i><span class="citation-195"> yang baru saja berhasil kamu sadap</span></span><span data-path-to-node="5,0,1,1"><span class="citation-195 citation-end-195"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="2"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="5,0,1,2">.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click,impression,attention" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQvoAQahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQugk"><!----><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" role="img" fonticon="link" class="mat-icon notranslate symbol gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color ng-star-inserted" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="link"></mat-icon><!----></button><!----><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></source-inline-chip><!----><!----><!----></sources-carousel-inline></p></li></ul><h3 data-path-to-node="6">2. Normalkan Kembali Jaringan (Lab Clean-Up)</h3><p data-path-to-node="7">Sebagai analis keamanan yang baik, sangat penting untuk mengembalikan sistem ke keadaan normal setelah simulasi selesai.</p><ul data-path-to-node="8"><li><p data-path-to-node="8,0,0">Di terminal Bettercap kamu, ketik <code data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="34">arp.spoof off</code> lalu <code data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="53">net.sniff off</code> untuk menghentikan serangan, kemudian ketik <code data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="111">exit</code> untuk keluar dari <i data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="134">container</i>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="8,1,0">Karena sebelumnya kita menggunakan <i data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="35">flag</i> <code data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="40">--rm</code>, <i data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="46">container</i> penyerang akan otomatis terhapus dengan bersih. Jalur komunikasi Ubuntu dan DVWA kini sudah kembali normal.</p></li></ul><h3 data-path-to-node="9">3. Susun Analisis Portfolio (The Write-Up)</h3><p data-path-to-node="10" id="p-rc_74f3a1fa9ff21e7d-119"><span data-path-to-node="10,0"><span class="citation-192"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="10,1"><span class="citation-192">Di sinilah letak nilai profesionalitas dari </span><i data-path-to-node="10,1" data-index-in-node="44"><span class="citation-192">project</span></i><span class="citation-192"> kamu</span></span><span data-path-to-node="10,2"><span class="citation-192 citation-end-192"><source-footnote data-path-to-node="10,3">. </span><span data-path-to-node="10,4"><span class="citation-191"></span></span><span data-path-to-node="10,5"><span class="citation-191">Mulailah menyusun </span><i data-path-to-node="10,5" data-index-in-node="18"><span class="citation-191">draft</span></i><span class="citation-191"> tulisan (misalnya dalam format Markdown untuk </span><code data-path-to-node="10,5" data-index-in-node="70"><span class="citation-191">README.md</span></code><span class="citation-191"> GitHub) yang membahas poin-poin analisis penting ini</span></span><span Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click,impression,attention" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQvoAQahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQvAk"><!----><mat-icon data-path-to-node="11,1,0"><span class="citation-189"></span></p><p data-path-to-node="11,1,1" id="p-rc_74f3a1fa9ff21e7d-121"><span data-path-to-node="11,1,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="11,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="0"><span class="citation-189">Mengapa HTTPS lebih aman?</span></b><span class="citation-189"> Jelaskan secara logis mengapa </span><i data-path-to-node="11,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="56"><span class="citation-189">traffic</span></i><span class="citation-189"> HTTPS tidak bisa sekadar di-</span><i data-path-to-node="11,1,1,0" data-index-in-node="92"><span class="citation-189">sniff</span></i><span class="citation-189"> semudah ini (membutuhkan bypass sertifikat TLS/SSL)</span></span><span data-path-to-node="11,1,1,1"><span class="citation-189 citation-end-189"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="8"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="11,1,1,2">.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click,impression,attention" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQvoAQahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQvQk"><!----><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" role="img" fonticon="link" class="mat-icon notranslate symbol gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color ng-star-inserted" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="link"></mat-icon><!----></button><!----><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></source-inline-chip><!----><!----><!----></sources-carousel-inline></p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="11,2,0"><span class="citation-188"></span></p><p data-path-to-node="11,2,1" id="p-rc_74f3a1fa9ff21e7d-122"><span data-path-to-node="11,2,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="11,2,1,0" data-index-in-node="0"><span class="citation-188">Dampak &amp; Mitigasi:</span></b><span class="citation-188"> Analisis relevansi serangan ini ke dunia nyata (misal: bahaya menggunakan Wi-Fi publik), dan jelaskan cara mencegahnya (seperti penegakan HSTS atau menggunakan </span><i data-path-to-node="11,2,1,0" data-index-in-node="179"><span class="citation-188">switch</span></i><span class="citation-188"> dengan fitur </span><i data-path-to-node="11,2,1,0" data-index-in-node="199"><span class="citation-188">Dynamic ARP Inspection</span></i><span class="citation-188">)</span></span><span data-path-to-node="11,2,1,1"><span class="citation-188 citation-end-188"><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="9"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="9"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="9"><!----></sup></source-footnote><source-footnote ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c354214316=""><sup _ngcontent-ng-c354214316="" class="superscript" data-turn-source-index="9"><!----></sup></source-footnote></span></span><span data-path-to-node="11,2,1,2">.</span><sources-carousel-inline ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER" _nghost-ng-c903137091=""><source-inline-chip _ngcontent-ng-c903137091="" _nghost-ng-c1570102388="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" class="source-inline-chip-container ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" cdkoverlayorigin="" class="button multiple-button ng-star-inserted" aria-label="Lihat detail sumber. Membuka panel samping." jslog="262206;track:generic_click"><!----><!----><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" hide-from-message-actions="" class="button-label gds-label-m hide-from-message-actions ng-star-inserted"><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c1570102388="" role="img" fonticon="link" class="mat-icon notranslate symbol gds-icon-s google-symbols mat-ligature-font mat-icon-no-color" aria-hidden="true" data-mat-icon-type="font" data-mat-icon-name="link"></mat-icon>+1</span><!----><!----><!----></button><!----><!----><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></source-inline-chip><!----><!----><!----></sources-carousel-inline></p></li></ul><h3 data-path-to-node="12">4. Eksekusi Fase Berikutnya: Web Attack</h3><p data-path-to-node="13">Simulasi <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="9">Network Attack</i> kamu telah berhasil dengan gemilang. Sesuai dengan konsep besar <i data-path-to-node="13" data-index-in-node="88">project</i> yang kamu rancang, langkah teknis berikutnya adalah mengalihkan fokus ke kerentanan aplikasi web.
Karena target seperti DVWA dan Juice Shop sudah berjalan di jaringan lab kamu, kamu sudah siap untuk mempraktikkan hal-hal seperti SQL Injection dan XSS.</p><p data-path-to-node="14">Untuk langkah selanjutnya saat ini, apakah kamu ingin berfokus menyusun kerangka <i data-path-to-node="14" data-index-in-node="81">draft</i> untuk publikasi portofolio GitHub ini terlebih dahulu, atau ingin langsung melompat ke panduan eksekusi serangan SQL Injection pada DVWA?</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" ng-tns-c289529910-457"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-457"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-457"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-457"><span class="hljs-section">## 🏗️ Arsitektur Lab &amp; Topologi Jaringan</span>

Project ini menggunakan arsitektur <span class="hljs-emphasis">*hybrid*</span> yang menggabungkan Virtual Machine (VM) dan Docker Container. Untuk mengatasi limitasi routing bawaan <span class="hljs-emphasis">*host*</span> (same-interface routing problem), lab ini memanfaatkan <span class="hljs-strong">**Docker Macvlan**</span> untuk memberikan isolasi <span class="hljs-emphasis">*MAC Address*</span> yang presisi bagi mesin penyerang dan target web.

<span class="hljs-section">### 1. Skema Topologi (Subnet: 192.168.56.0/24)</span>
Jaringan berjalan di atas antarmuka Host-Only VirtualBox (<span class="hljs-code">`vboxnet0`</span>) yang dikonfigurasi pada <span class="hljs-emphasis">*Promiscuous Mode: Allow All*</span>.

<span class="hljs-bullet">*</span> <span class="hljs-strong">**[Victim] Ubuntu VM**</span> (<span class="hljs-code">`192.168.56.102`</span>) - Mensimulasikan pengguna biasa yang melakukan akses <span class="hljs-emphasis">*login*</span> ke aplikasi web menggunakan <span class="hljs-emphasis">*browser*</span>.
<span class="hljs-bullet">*</span> <span class="hljs-strong">**[Attacker] Bettercap Container**</span> (<span class="hljs-code">`192.168.56.10`</span>) - Mesin penyerang terisolasi yang bertugas melakukan <span class="hljs-emphasis">*ARP Spoofing*</span> dan <span class="hljs-emphasis">*Packet Sniffing*</span>.
<span class="hljs-bullet">*</span> <span class="hljs-strong">**[Target] DVWA Container**</span> (<span class="hljs-code">`192.168.56.20`</span>) - Server web rentan yang menyimpan halaman otentikasi target.

<span class="hljs-section">### 2. Tools &amp; Teknologi yang Digunakan</span>
<span class="hljs-bullet">*</span> <span class="hljs-strong">**Docker &amp; Docker Macvlan:**</span> Mengelola environment target dan attacker agar ringan (resource-efficient) dan terisolasi secara jaringan layer 2.
<span class="hljs-bullet">*</span> <span class="hljs-strong">**VirtualBox:**</span> Menyediakan infrastruktur jaringan lokal (vboxnet0) dan meng-host mesin korban.
<span class="hljs-bullet">*</span> <span class="hljs-strong">**Bettercap (v2.41.5):**</span> Framework utama untuk eksekusi serangan Man-in-the-Middle (MITM).
<span class="hljs-bullet">*</span> <span class="hljs-strong">**DVWA (Damn Vulnerable Web App):**</span> Aplikasi web target untuk simulasi eksploitasi web.

<span class="hljs-section">### 3. Konfigurasi Infrastruktur (Setup Commands)</span>

Berikut adalah perintah inti yang digunakan untuk membangun <span class="hljs-emphasis">*mini cyber range*</span> ini:

<span class="hljs-strong">**A. Membuat Jaringan Macvlan**</span>
Membuat <span class="hljs-emphasis">*bridge*</span> jaringan agar container Docker dapat berinteraksi langsung dengan jaringan VirtualBox:
<span class="hljs-code">```bash
docker network create \
  --driver macvlan \
  --subnet=192.168.56.0/24 \
  --gateway=192.168.56.1 \
  --opt parent=vboxnet0 \
  mitm-net
</span></code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="4"><b data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="0">B. Deploy Web Target (DVWA)</b>
Menjalankan aplikasi rentan dengan IP statis agar mudah ditargetkan:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block   --network mitm-net \
  --ip 192.168.56.20 \
  vulnerables/web-dvwa

Deploy Mesin Penyerang (Attacker Node)</b>
Menjalankan container Bettercap dengan hak akses jaringan penuh (<code data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="107">NET_ADMIN</code> dan <code data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="121">NET_RAW</code>) untuk memanipulasi paket ARP:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-459">docker run -it --rm \
  --name attacker \
  --network mitm-net \
  --ip 192.168.56.10 \
  --cap-add NET_ADMIN \
  --cap-add NET_RAW \
  bettercap/bettercap \
  -iface eth0
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-460 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-460 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" jslog="223238;track:impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_0a9cb7377f188657&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_bdda7c91c31cb28c&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]]" style="display: block;" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQhtANahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQ4wk"><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-460"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-460"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-460"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-460 no-decoration-radius">
***

### Tips Tambahan untuk Portofoliomu:
Di bawah bagian kode perintah di atas, sangat disarankan untuk menyisipkan **Screenshot Topologi Visual**. Kamu bisa membuat bagan/diagram sederhana menggunakan *tools* gratis seperti **draw.io** (diagrams.net) atau **Excalidraw** yang menggambarkan kotak Ubuntu, kotak Bettercap, dan kotak DVWA saling terhubung.

Dengan format dokumentasi seperti ini, perekrut atau *reviewer* teknis akan langsung melihat bahwa kamu tidak hanya bisa menjalankan *tools*, tetapi juga **paham secara mendalam bagaimana merancang dan membangun arsitektur jaringannya**.

Bagaimana menurutmu kerangka *draft* ini? Kalau sudah oke, kita bisa mulai membahas kerentanan langkah selanjutnya: SQL Injection di DVWA!
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div
