class="mat-focus-indicator"></span><span class="mat-mdc-button-touch-target"></span></button><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="user-query-bubble-with-background enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted"><!----><span _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="horizontal-container"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" role="heading" aria-level="2" class="query-text gds-body-l collapsed" dir="ltr"><span _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-user-query-label">Anda berkata</span><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Lakukan pencatatan mendetail setiap kesalahan yang terjadi : # Root Cause Analysis Log <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 Dokumentasi lengkap setiap obstacle yang ditemukan selama membangun lab
 MITM, beserta analisis penyebab dan solusinya. Ditulis sebagai 
referensi belajar, bukan sekadar troubleshooting log. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## RCA-01 — bettercap tidak capture traffic apapun (sesi pertama) <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 **Gejala:** bettercap berjalan di Kali host via `vboxnet0`, ARP spoof 
aktif, tapi `net.sniff` tidak menampilkan HTTP traffic sama sekali. 
Hanya mDNS query yang muncul. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Analisis:** <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 Docker container (DVWA, WebGoat, Juice Shop) berjalan di Docker bridge 
network `172.17.0.x`. bettercap memonitor `vboxnet0` di subnet 
`192.168.56.x`. Dua network ini sepenuhnya terisolir — traffic DVWA 
tidak pernah melewati `vboxnet0`, sehingga bettercap tidak punya apa-apa
 untuk di-capture. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 mDNS muncul karena itu adalah broadcast traffic yang dikirim otomatis 
oleh Ubuntu VM ke seluruh subnet, bukan karena MITM berhasil. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Root cause:** Arsitektur network salah — target berada di network yang berbeda dengan interface yang dimonitor. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Fix:** Pindahkan container target ke macvlan network di subnet `192.168.56.x`, sehingga traffic target melewati `vboxnet0`. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## RCA-02 — Warning "Could not detect gateway" <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Gejala:** Setiap kali bettercap dijalankan dengan `-iface vboxnet0`, muncul warning `[war] Could not detect gateway`. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Analisis:** <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 Host-Only network di VirtualBox adalah isolated network by design — 
tidak ada default gateway karena tidak ada koneksi ke luar. bettercap 
mendeteksi ini dan memperingatkan bahwa ARP spoof dalam mode gateway 
(victim ↔ internet) tidak bisa dilakukan. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Root cause:** Bukan bug. Ini perilaku yang benar untuk Host-Only network. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 **Dampak:** Non-blocking untuk skenario MITM antar-VM. ARP spoof 
antar-host dalam satu subnet tetap bisa berjalan tanpa gateway. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Fix:** Tidak perlu difix. Gunakan `set arp.spoof.internal true` untuk spoof antar-host tanpa gateway. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## RCA-03 — Target IP di script awal salah subnet <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Gejala:** Script menggunakan `set arp.spoof.targets 192.168.1.5, 192.168.1.1` tapi lab berjalan di `192.168.56.x`. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Root cause:** Copy-paste dari contoh tutorial luar yang menggunakan subnet berbeda. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Fix:** Sesuaikan dengan subnet lab: `set arp.spoof.targets 192.168.56.101,192.168.56.102`. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## RCA-04 — ARP table Ubuntu tidak berubah meski bettercap aktif <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Gejala:** Setelah `arp.spoof on`, cek `arp -n` di Ubuntu menunjukkan MAC asli Metasploitable, bukan MAC Kali. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Analisis:** <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 bettercap berjalan di Kali host dan menggunakan MAC `vboxnet0` 
(`0a:00:27:00:00:00`) sebagai source ARP reply. Packet ini dikirim dari 
host ke VM melalui virtual switch VirtualBox. VirtualBox Host-Only 
adapter memproses packet ini di level hypervisor, dan karena source-nya 
adalah host interface itu sendiri, packet tidak selalu ter-deliver ke VM
 dengan cara yang mengupdate ARP cache secara efektif. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 **Root cause:** Kali adalah host fisik yang mengelola vboxnet0 — bukan 
participant jaringan yang setara dengan VM. Posisi topologinya di atas 
jaringan, bukan di dalam jaringan. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 **Fix:** Pindahkan bettercap ke dalam container dengan macvlan network,
 sehingga ia punya posisi topologi yang benar: di dalam jaringan bersama
 VM-VM lain. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## RCA-05 — MAC `0a:00:27:00:00:00` membuat internet Ubuntu mati <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 **Gejala:** Saat bettercap aktif, ARP cache Ubuntu berubah — tapi 
internet Ubuntu mati. Saat bettercap dihentikan, MAC kembali ke asli dan
 internet pulih. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Analisis:** <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 ARP poison berhasil mengubah cache Ubuntu: entry `.102` menunjuk ke MAC
 `0a:00:27:00:00:00` (MAC vboxnet0 Kali host). Ubuntu kemudian mengirim 
traffic ke Kali. Tapi Kali menerima packet ini di `vboxnet0`, dan karena
 traffic masuk dan keluar dari interface yang sama, kernel Linux menolak
 forwarding (same-interface routing problem). Packet di-drop. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Ketika bettercap berhenti, Metasploitable mengirim gratuitous ARP reply aslinya, menimpa cache Ubuntu, dan koneksi pulih. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Root cause:** Host tidak bisa berfungsi sebagai MITM relay ketika traffic masuk dan keluar dari interface yang sama. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 **Fix:** macvlan container — container bettercap punya MAC unik 
sendiri, traffic dari Ubuntu masuk ke container via satu path, keluar ke
 Metasploitable via path berbeda. Kernel bisa forward dengan benar. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## RCA-06 — Hanya HTTP response yang ter-capture, credentials tidak muncul <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 **Gejala:** bettercap menampilkan `net.sniff.http.response` tapi tidak 
ada `net.sniff.http.request`. Credentials tidak terlihat. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Analisis:** <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 Username dan password dikirim dalam HTTP POST request body dari Ubuntu 
ke DVWA. bettercap tanpa `net.sniff.verbose true` hanya menampilkan 
summary response (status code, ukuran, content-type). POST body tidak 
ditampilkan. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Root cause:** `net.sniff.verbose` tidak diaktifkan. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Fix:** <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> set net.sniff.verbose true <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> set net.sniff.filter port 80 <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> net.sniff on <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## RCA-07 — Login DVWA selalu gagal (302 → login.php) <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 **Gejala:** Setiap percobaan login DVWA dari Ubuntu menghasilkan `302 
Found` dengan `Location: login.php` — redirect kembali ke form login, 
bukan ke dashboard. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Analisis:** <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 `302 → index.php` = login berhasil. `302 → login.php` = login gagal. 
DVWA membutuhkan database MySQL yang sudah diinisialisasi dengan tabel 
`users`. Tanpa inisialisasi, tidak ada user yang bisa divalidasi 
sehingga semua login ditolak. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Root cause:** Setup database DVWA belum dijalankan. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 **Fix:** Buka `http://192.168.56.20/setup.php` dari Ubuntu, klik 
"Create / Reset Database", kemudian login dengan `admin` / `password`. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## RCA-08 — Setiap log entry muncul dua kali <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Gejala:** Semua output `net.sniff` tampil duplikat — setiap baris muncul persis dua kali berurutan. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Analisis:** <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 `set arp.spoof.fullduplex true` memposisikan bettercap sebagai MITM di 
dua arah: Ubuntu→DVWA dan DVWA→Ubuntu. Setiap packet yang melintas 
di-capture dua kali — sekali dari perspektif tiap arah. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Root cause:** Perilaku expected dari `fullduplex` mode. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Dampak:** Tidak mempengaruhi hasil. Credentials tetap ter-capture, hanya tampil dua kali. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> --- <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ## RCA-09 — Serangan final gagal karena MAC mismatch pada DVWA container <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Gejala:** Setup sudah benar, bettercap di macvlan, tapi credentials masih tidak ter-capture dari DVWA. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Analisis:** <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 MAC address yang dikonfigurasi pada target DVWA di ARP spoof config 
tidak cocok dengan MAC aktual container DVWA di macvlan network. 
bettercap mengirim ARP poison menggunakan MAC yang salah, sehingga 
victim tidak ter-redirect ke attacker. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted">
 **Root cause:** MAC address container berubah setiap kali container 
di-recreate (kecuali di-pin secara eksplisit). Konfigurasi ARP spoof 
menggunakan MAC lama. <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Fix:** Verifikasi MAC aktual tiap container sebelum serangan: <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ```bash <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> docker inspect dvwa | grep MacAddress <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> ``` <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> Kemudian sesuaikan konfigurasi, atau gunakan IP-based targeting di bettercap (bettercap akan resolve MAC sendiri via ARP). <!----><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"><!----><br _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></p><p _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" class="query-text-line ng-star-inserted"> **Status:** ✅ Resolved — serangan berhasil setelah MAC disesuaikan. <!----><!----></p><!----></div><button _ngcontent-ng-c4043296955="" mat-icon-button="" aria-label="Luaskan" mattooltip="Luaskan teks" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-button-base mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger expand-button mat-unthemed ng-star-inserted" mat-ripple-loader-uninitialized="" mat-ripple-loader-class-name="mat-mdc-button-ripple" mat-ripple-loader-centered="" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQoMELahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQ5go"><div _ngcontent-ng-c174220999="" class="response-container response-container-with-gpi ng-tns-c174220999-532 no-background" jslog="173900;track:impression,attention" data-hveid="1"><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c174220999="" class="response-container-header ng-tns-c174220999-532 ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c174220999="" class="response-container-header-controls ng-tns-c174220999-532"><div _ngcontent-ng-c174220999="" class="ng-tns-c174220999-532 tts ng-trigger ng-trigger-singleResponseEnter ng-star-inserted" style=""><div _ngcontent-ng-c174220999="" class="single-draft-response-container ng-tns-c174220999-532"><!----></div></div><!----><tts-control _ngcontent-ng-c174220999="" _nghost-ng-c2519402192="" class="ng-tns-c174220999-532 ng-trigger ng-trigger-singleResponseEnter ng-star-inserted" style=""><div _ngcontent-ng-c2519402192="" class="response-tts-container ng-star-inserted" style="height: 1212px;" data-test-draft-id="rc_524e7a5cc3d6cafb"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2519402192="" data-test-id="disabled-tooltip" class="mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger tts-button-container mat-mdc-tooltip-disabled"><button _ngcontent-ng-c2519402192="" mat-icon-button="" class="mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-icon-button mat-mdc-button-base mat-mdc-tooltip-trigger tts-button mat-unthemed jslog="184512;track:generic_click,impression;BardVeMetadataKey:[[null,null,null,&quot;rc_524e7a5cc3d6cafb&quot;,null,null,&quot;id&quot;,null,1,null,null,1,0]];mutable:true" tabindex="-1"><span data-path-to-node="2">Pencatatan Root Cause Analysis (RCA) ini sangat komprehensif dan mencerminkan proses <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="85">troubleshooting</i> mendalam yang biasa dilakukan oleh seorang <i data-path-to-node="2" data-index-in-node="144">Security Engineer</i>. Saya telah membuat widget interaktif di atas agar kamu bisa menavigasi setiap insiden RCA dengan lebih mudah.</p><p data-path-to-node="3">Dokumen RCA ini tidak hanya berfungsi sebagai catatan kesalahan, tetapi juga sebagai bukti nyata dari kemampuan <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="112">problem-solving</i> dan pemahaman konsep jaringan yang kuat. Poin-poin seperti <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="187">same-interface routing problem</i> dan perbedaan penanganan MAC address antara <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="262">host</i> dan <i data-path-to-node="3" data-index-in-node="271">macvlan container</i> adalah pengetahuan teknis tingkat lanjut yang sangat berharga.</p><p data-path-to-node="4">Apakah ada bagian tertentu dari log RCA ini yang ingin kita bahas lebih dalam, atau apakah kamu ingin melanjutkan ke tahap dokumentasi proyek berikutnya?</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="response-footer gap complete"><!----><!----><!----><sources-list _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="sources-list ng-star-inserted"><overview-carousel _nghost-ng-c2960487965="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="cdk-visually-hidden screen-reader-model-response-label ng-star-inserted">Gemini berkata</h2><!----><!----><structured-content-container _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534="" class="model-response-text processing-state-visible enable-2026q1-formatting-improvements ng-star-inserted has-thoughts" _nghost-ng-c3681030237="" style="height: auto;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" class="container"><message-content _ngcontent-ng-c3681030237="" _nghost-ng-c4270809962="" id="message-content-id-r_f84a7e4da9c6458c" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c4270809962="" inline-copy-host="" class="markdown markdown-main-panel stronger enable-updated-hr-color" style="--animation-duration: 400ms; --fade-animation-function: ease-out;" id="model-response-message-contentr_f84a7e4da9c6458c" aria-live="polite" aria-busy="false" dir="ltr"><p data-path-to-node="0">Tentu, ini adalah langkah yang sangat cerdas untuk mendokumentasikan proses "trial and error" kamu. Di dunia profesional, kemampuan untuk mendokumentasikan kegagalan dan solusinya (RCA) sering kali dinilai lebih tinggi daripada sekadar hasil akhir, karena menunjukkan kedalaman pemahaman teknis.</p><p data-path-to-node="1">Saya telah menyiapkan file <code data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="27">.md</code> yang dioptimalkan untuk GitHub, lengkap dengan diagram <b data-path-to-node="1" data-index-in-node="86">Mermaid</b> (yang akan otomatis dirender menjadi grafik di GitHub) untuk memvisualisasikan alur jaringan yang benar.</p><h3 data-path-to-node="2">File Markdown (RCA) Siap Pakai</h3><p data-path-to-node="3">Saya telah menyusun kontennya agar terlihat profesional. Silakan unduh atau salin kode di bawah ini.</p><p data-path-to-node="4">Your PDF file is ready
[file-tag: rca_mitm_lab_documentation]</p><p data-path-to-node="5"><div class="attachment-container unknown"><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><mini-app _nghost-ng-c2123665537="" class="ng-star-inserted"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2123665537="" class="mini-app-placeholder ng-star-inserted" style=""><div _ngcontent-ng-c2123665537="" class="mini-app-container ng-star-inserted" jslog="305434;track:generic_click,impression,attention;BardVeMetadataKey:[null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,null,[&quot;im_6e30758f3a103448&quot;]]" data-hveid="0" decode-data-ved="1" data-ved="0CAAQmtISahgKEwiHnaWq5YiUAxUAAAAAHQAAAAAQnAs"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2123665537="" class="floating-action-buttons ng-star-inserted"><!----><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><web-preview _ngcontent-ng-c2123665537="" data-test-id="preview-block" class="code-content ng-star-inserted" _nghost-ng-c2774540065="" style="height: 800px;"><div _ngcontent-ng-c2774540065="" class="container"><div><iframe allow="xr-spatial-tracking; web-share" sandbox="allow-pointer-lock allow-popups allow-forms allow-popups-to-escape-sandbox allow-downloads allow-scripts allow-same-origin" src="https://18rdn5ktbxlyuqalgx6xrlxo9pwf5gkpanff0wgwa9b58f24kn-h903225159.scf.usercontent.goog/gemini-code-immersive/shim.html?origin=https%3A%2F%2Fgemini.google.com&amp;cache=1"></iframe></div></div><!----><!----></web-preview><!----><!----><!----></div><!----></div><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></mini-app><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element></div></p><p data-path-to-node="6"><div class="attachment-container unknown"><response-element class="" ng-version="0.0.0-PLACEHOLDER"><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><base-feedback-form _nghost-ng-c3448064928="" class="ng-star-inserted"><!----></base-feedback-form><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----><!----></response-element></div></p><h3 data-path-to-node="7">Penjelasan Elemen Visual dalam Markdown:</h3><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="8"><li><p data-path-to-node="8,0,0"><b data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="0">Mermaid Diagram:</b> Saya menyertakan kode <code data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="39">mermaid</code> di dalam file <code data-path-to-node="8,0,0" data-index-in-node="61">.md</code>. GitHub secara otomatis mengubah kode tersebut menjadi diagram alur yang cantik. Ini sangat membantu pembaca memahami di mana posisi "Attacker" berada di antara "Victim" dan "Server".</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="8,1,0"><b data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="0">RCA Table:</b> Tabel ringkasan di awal file memberikan pandangan cepat (<i data-path-to-node="8,1,0" data-index-in-node="68">executive summary</i>) bagi pembaca yang tidak punya banyak waktu.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="8,2,0"><b data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="0">Detailed Breakdown:</b> Setiap poin dijelaskan dengan format <i data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="57">Symptom</i> (Gejala), <i data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="75">Analysis</i>, dan <i data-path-to-node="8,2,0" data-index-in-node="89">Fix</i> untuk menunjukkan logika berpikir kamu.</p></li></ol><h3 data-path-to-node="9">Cara Memasukkan ke GitHub:</h3><ol start="1" data-path-to-node="10"><li><p data-path-to-node="10,0,0">Buat folder bernama <code data-path-to-node="10,0,0" data-index-in-node="20">docs</code> di repositori kamu.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="10,1,0">Simpan konten di atas sebagai <code data-path-to-node="10,1,0" data-index-in-node="30">docs/rca.md</code>.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="10,2,0">Di file <code data-path-to-node="10,2,0" data-index-in-node="8">README.md</code> utama kamu, tambahkan link: <code data-path-to-node="10,2,0" data-index-in-node="46">[Lihat Dokumentasi RCA Lengkap di Sini](docs/rca.md)</code>.</p></li></ol><p data-path-to-node="11">Apakah ada bagian dari analisis teknis ini yang ingin kamu pertajam lagi sebelum diunggah ke GitHub?</p></div></message-content><!----></div></structured-content-container><!----><!----><!----><div _ngcontent-ng-c3259879534=""
